Mourning Savior Epic Destiny.name: 哀悼救主 Mourning Savior
Mourning Savior Epic Destiny.description:
没有什么能比完全复兴塞尔（Cyre）更让你满足。

Prerequisite:

In the final years of the Last War, prophets and soothsayers warned of impending doom. They described a singular event that would change the face of Khorvaire and bring ruin and death to the land. These warnings culminated with the Day of Mourning, and none can now deny the truth of these prophecies. A few of Cyre's survivors remember that these same mystics also spoke of salvation, of a person who would undo what had befallen Cyre. This person, the prophets said, would heal the land and prevent similar catastrophes from ravaging the world. You are the mourning savior the foretellings predicted, chosen by the Prophecy to stand fast against the threat of the Mournland and stop its corruption from spreading farther across Khorvaire.

不朽 Immortality

As a mourning savior, you face a daunting task. You must shoulder the responsibility of restoring health and vigor to the land and of stopping the spread of an inexplicable taint.

哀悼灵药 Mourning Panacea: Once you complete your final quest and unlock the Mourning's secret, you realize what must be done to remove the taint that plagues the land. Only through sacrifice can you contain the wellspring of evil that contaminates Cyre. Once you make peace with this terrible task, you walk into the Mournland and vanish into its mists.

For a time, there is no change. As the seasons pass, though, the gloom shrouding Cyre thins. The horrors stalking the ruined landscape turn against one another in an orgy of violence. When the transformation is complete, nothing remains of the magical phenomenon that erased an entire nation. Wreckage lies strewn across the countryside, but rather than disheartening the Cyran refugees, it emboldens them. They resolve to rebuild what was lost and restore their homeland to its former glory. You might be an unsung hero, but through your sacrifice, the Mourning is reversed, and life can thrive in Cyre once more.

21级：哀悼之地奉献 Mournland Dedicate

Benefit: 你已经习惯了哀悼之地的影响。你在与哀悼之地的危险有关的技能挑战上获得+5加值。你免疫哀悼之地的疾病，并且你无视哀悼之地特有的障碍和奇幻地形。另外，当位于哀悼之地时，你和离你5格内的所有盟友能从医疗威能中受益。

在哀悼之地以外，以你或离你5格内的盟友为目标的医疗威能恢复2d6额外生命值。

24级：塞尔记忆 Memory of Cyre

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，任何邻近你的非构装体、非不死敌人在攻击骰和所有防御上受到-2减值（豁免终止）

26级：净化风采 Cleansing Presence

30级：塞尔之仇 Cyran Vengeance

Benefit: 每当你在遭遇中首次重伤时，你获得一个行动点。你必须在你下一回合结束前使用此行动点。使用此行动点不会和你在遭遇中通常使用的行动点冲突。另外，如果你花费一个行动点对一个不死或异界生物进行攻击，你在此攻击的攻击骰和伤害骰上获得等同于你魅力调整值的加值。

Avatar of Io Epic Destiny.name: 艾欧化身 Avatar of Io
Avatar of Io Epic Destiny.description:
在黎明之时被分割成两个神灵古老的龙神，在你身上重生。唯一的问题是巴哈姆特和提亚马特是否会让你获得他的力量。

Prerequisite:

当一位神死去，祂的力量不会突然消失。它可能被吞噬，多半是被强大到足以杀死祂的生物。例如，当阿斯莫迪斯（Asmodeus）杀死了他曾经侍奉过的神，他夺取这力量，并将自己神化。当恐怖之主杀死艾欧，艾欧那被分割的身体化为巴哈姆特和提娅玛特，而这两位新生的神在厄瑞克·胡兹（Erek-Hus）之前获取了艾欧的力量。

然而，据说艾欧力量的碎片依然保持自由，既没有被新生神祗吸收，也没有被原始力量夺取。或许它被艾欧意志的碎片控制，同时这神圣力量维持了它自己的安全，以准备——据说——龙神在某个时刻复活。有些人说一位忠心于祂的天使守护着祂力量的碎片，也有人说这碎片被牢牢地嵌入一位祂的凡仆——一位龙裔（更多创意参见「艾欧碎片」背景）。

不知为何，这神圣力量的碎片在你体内沉眠。现在，你不仅仅是一个半神或是化身，你与龙神全部的力量有了些许共鸣。你获得越多的力量，这样，艾欧就愈发强壮。通过你，艾欧将回归，并重新成为所有龙种生物的神。

不朽 Immortality

你将永生，这可能有些不够确定——但至少，你体内艾欧的力量将使你的凡躯免于死亡。一旦你恰当的完成了你的天命，这将成为艾欧重生之时，要么取代巴哈姆特和提娅玛特在众神殿(Pantheon)的位置，就是让他们成为新建的天空王庭的圣灵。

巨龙神化 Draconic Apotheosis: 当你完成你的最终任务，无论是你整合了足够多的艾欧力量碎片，还是积聚了足够艾欧复生的力量。经过一次光彩夺目的变换，你的身体被开发强化，如蝶化茧。巨大的翅膀自你的背后伸展开，厚厚的鳞片覆盖了你的全身，你雷鸣般的咆哮晃动着大地。你化为强大神力中的艾欧。

或者，你对神圣力量的积累不足以将你自己的身体化为神的形态。作为替代，你可能着手重建远古艾欧的星之领地，并重建祂的身体。你的终极天命不是自己化为艾欧，而是成为祂最宠爱的圣灵，作为对你忠贞的复活祂的回报，服务于祂身旁。

21级：精炼龙息 Breath Mastery

Benefit: 你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.MW2qXnwLDplZxk3v]{龙息 Dragon Breath}威能无视目标的任何抗力或免疫。

每次使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.MW2qXnwLDplZxk3v]{龙息 Dragon Breath}时，你可以选择造成强酸，寒冰，火焰，闪电或毒素伤害。

在你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.MW2qXnwLDplZxk3v]{龙息 Dragon Breath}后，你在造成与你的龙息伤害类型相同的威能的攻击骰和伤害骰上获得+2加值。此增益持续到你下一回合结束。

21级：龙神化身 Draconic Incarnation

Benefit: 你的力量和魅力属性都增加2点。

24级：艾欧之翼 Wings of Io

Benefit: 你获得飞行速度8，并可以盘旋。

26级：神圣抗力 Divine Resistance

30级：神圣毁灭 Divine Discorporation

Benefit: 每天一次，当你死亡并且至少还有1个回复力剩余时，你的精华会从你的身体里逃逸，返回众星之海里恢复它的活力。在你每个回合结束时进行一次豁免检定，当你成功时，你会复活，花费1个回复力，并出现在你死亡地点10格内的任何空间。

Arcane Sword Epic Destiny.name: 奥法剑使 Arcane Sword
Arcane Sword Epic Destiny.description:
毁灭之咒文灌注于剑刃，没有任何敌人能阻挡你的道路。

Prerequisite:

散发着微光的奥术屏障覆盖着你的身体，偏斜并消散敌人的攻击。你手中的剑成为了你意志的延伸，如同一只由剑技和魔法组成的手臂一样。奥术的渠道连接着你和你的剑，磅礴的奥术能量回响于你与你的剑之间，毁灭任何挡在你面前的敌人。你是个剑法师，一个追求完美的剑法师。

你已成为了这门技艺的极致者；离你上次请教别人剑法师的奥秘已经过了很久了。你早已成为了自己的老师，你投入剑与魔法无止尽的练习让你收获了许多将武术和魔法结合起来的技巧。

其它人认为你运用你强大且不断增强的力量来追寻你的目标。从某种意义上来讲，这是对的。事实上，你参与你的天命任务并打败强敌的目的就是磨练你的技艺。你的雄心抱负远远重要于其他的事情，但也不妨将它们作为陪衬。你也许会拯救世界，但这么做的时候，你其实在追求着成为极致的剑法师，一位奥法剑使。

不朽？ Immortality?

奥法剑使都渴望着精进他们的技巧，但即使是他们当中的完美主义者也总有一天会认识到他们已经达到了这门技艺的最高点。不同的奥法剑使走向了通往不朽的不同道路，以下当中也许就有你的那条。

归隐 Martial Seclusion: 当你完成你最后的任务后，你把自己隔绝在一个很少有人能找到你的地方。在这里你建立了自己的秘密圣所，一个你可以日日夜夜训练的平和之地。这里也将最终成为了你剑与魔法的一部分。

道馆宗师 Dojo Master: 当你完成最终任务时，你也许决定去教授他人你所领悟到的技巧。相较于隐居，你创建了一所道馆。你将自己所钻研出的技艺倾囊相授，教导出一代里最棒的剑法师。

圣剑 Relic Sword: 一些故事记载了一些奥法剑使是怎么样和他们的剑合为一体，成为一把在未来流传的知名神器

21级：法剑召回 Spellsword Recall

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，在使用该动作前，你恢复一个已经消耗的剑法师遭遇攻击威能

24级：剑之复仇 Sword's Vengeance

Benefit: 每日一次，当你死亡时，你的剑替代你战斗直到遭遇结束。每一轮，你的剑可以移动和进行攻击，就如同你仍在持用它一般，但它不会成为任何攻击的目标。

在遭遇结束时，一次短休息后，这把剑将回到你的身体，如果你的身体还存在的话，则你复活并带有1点生命值。

如果你的身体不在了，则你需要其它魔法来复活。

26级：群体庇护 Mass Aegis

30级：完美法剑 Spellsword Perfection

Benefit: 选择一个你已知的剑法师遭遇攻击威能，你可以将这个威能作为随意威能使用，而不是遭遇威能。

Bahamut's Vessel Epic Destiny.name: 巴哈姆特之容器 Bahamut's Vessel
Bahamut's Vessel Epic Destiny.description:
你伟大的美德和正义的天性使你获得了捍卫巴哈姆特神性的神圣任务。

Prerequisite:

Having long championed Bahamut in the world, taking up his causes and making them your own, you garner the god's attention. Seeing in you a reflection of his own noble character, he bestows on you a portion of his divine essence, both to make you a more effective servant and to protect a portion of his divinity against some future calamity. Great power accompanies this grave responsibility, power you can use to resemble your patron and access his own divine qualities.

The holy burden in no way restricts your personal objectives and you are free to pursue your own ends, though your goals likely coincide with those of the Platinum Dragon. You must have special care, however, for the fate of a god—and perhaps more—rests within your imperfect shell. From time to time, Bahamut might call upon you for a special task, to go places where he is unable, and act on his behalf, giving you a look into a possible future where you might serve as his exarch.

不朽？ Immortality?

The divine fragment you carry enables Bahamut to be reborn into the world, to live even if his divine form is slain, as unlikely an event as that might be. If your patron neverfaces destruction, good and constant service undoubtedly rewards you with a place in your god's dominion, perhaps as an exarch, perhaps as something more. Indeed, Bahamut keeps council with the greatest champions to have ever served him, and these allies attend him in all things.

巴哈姆特已死，巴哈姆特永存 Bahamut is Dead, Long Live Bahamut: While all gods are immortal, no being is truly unkillable. Should Bahamut die, omens and visions reveal your final quest. Your purpose, to return Bahamut to the world, is made clear. You may carry the divine embryo, but you must take bold steps to allow the godling within to awaken and resume its proper place. When you fulfill every condition, divine fire consumes your very existence to restore the god to corporeal form. The sacrifice required is absolute, its destruction required to facilitate the rebirth. Though you no longer exist, your memory lives on within the god and those who follow him, granting you a rare form of immortality—within the fondest memories of a god.

21级：祝福觉醒 Blessed Awakening

Benefit: 你的力量，感知或魅力属性增加2点。当你花费一个行动点，你恢复生命值如同你花费了一个回复力一样，且在所有防御上获得+2加值直到你下一回合开始。

24级：勇敢风采 Courageous Presence

Benefit: 离你5格内所有可以看见你的盟友在豁免检定上获得+2加值，并且，当成为神术医疗威能的目标时，在攻击骰和所有防御上获得+2加值直到他下一回合结束。

26级：七只金丝雀 Seven Canaries

30级：白金重生 Platinum Rebirth

Benefit: 每天一次，当你的生命值降至0时，你恢复所有生命值并变为一个大型白金巨龙。在此形态下，你获得黑暗视觉，20点寒冰抗力，20点火焰抗力，飞行10（盘旋），@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.P3mkwKbJvuzNWXAa]{龙咬 Dragon Bite}威能，和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.A4jbRfhrF5ZtmUJP]{龙息武器 Breath Weapon}威能。另外，当你保持此形态时，离你5格内的所有敌人在攻击骰上受到-2减值。

在这些改变之外，成为一只巨龙不会改变你的游戏数据。你的装备成为你巨龙形态的一部分，但是你会掉落除了你能使用的法器之外所有你手持的物品。你继续获得你穿戴的装备的好处。你能使用法器和你穿戴的魔法物品的特性和威能，但不能是武器的特性和威能，也不能是奇物的威能。当你的装备成为你巨龙形态的一部分时，他们不能被移除，并且成为你巨龙形态一部分的任何容器都无法打开。

此效果持续到遭遇结束，或直到你使用了@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.A4jbRfhrF5ZtmUJP]{龙息武器 Breath Weapon}威能，那时你恢复通常形态。

Grandmaster of Flowers Epic Destiny.name: 百花大师 Grandmaster of Flowers
Grandmaster of Flowers Epic Destiny.description:
你已经度过了你的最后一生，并实现了你长期以来所追求的开悟完美。

Prerequisite:

It is said that not even the gods themselves know what lies in store for souls loosed from their bodies. You believe that beyond death is rebirth. Each lifetime is spent improving on the lifetime before, shedding imperfections in the hope of attaining the perfect state of enlightenment.

Your soul is like a great garden, and its beauty and perfection depend on how you tend it during all seasons. When the winter of death approaches, the garden becomes dormant for a time. Then, as the warm winds chase away snow and ice, new life begins. With the spring comes the chance to clear away the detritus and weeds of each life that has passed before. Only when you achieve perfection in your soul will you find the enlightenment that is your ultimate reward.

不朽 Immortality

You have lived many lives, each improving on the one before. In this last life, you have come closer than ever to achieving perfect harmony. If you can succeed in purging yourself of the last traces of imperfection, you will know enlightenment.

完美平静 Perfect Peace: The state you seek removes all grief, all craving, all fear to bring mind, body, and soul into harmonious balance. In attaining this state, you are no longer troubled by the world's demands, and you spend your final days in quiet contemplation. During those days, many who seek the path to enlightenment will come to you in hopes of learning from your wisdom. When you are ready, you step free from this world to merge with those souls who have already attained the perfect peace for which you have long strived.

21级：心如止水 Balanced Mind

Benefit: 当你做一次豁免检定来结束魅惑，恐惧或心灵效果时，你能选择使用10或你掷出的更好的结果。

另外，当一个敌人对抗你的意志防御的攻击失手时，那个敌人受到10点心灵伤害。

21级：开悟 Enlightenment's Blessing

Benefit: 你的敏捷属性增加2点。

24级：自在 Ubiquity

Benefit: 当你用近战攻击命中时，你能以一个自由动作传送3格到与目标邻近的未被占据的一格。

26级：落英缤纷 A Scattering of Petals

30级：心大光明 Luminous Consciousness

Benefit: 你超越了凡人的限制。你的移动永远不会引发借机攻击。当一个效果允许你快步时，你能以你的速度移动作为代替。你无视困难地形。你能移动穿过并停留在垂直或液体表面。最后，当你移动，奔跑或冲锋时，你能把其中的一部分或全部移动力改为飞行。如果你在结束移动时仍在空中，则你安全地降落到最近的未被占据的一格。

Demigod Epic Destiny.name: 半神 Demigod
Demigod Epic Destiny.description:
圣洁之光点燃了你的灵魂，指引着你走向登神之路。

Prerequisite:

你的肉体超越了凡人的极限，带有神性的光彩。你的传奇级别的伙伴迅捷、强壮而聪明，而你所拥有的神性光彩让你更胜一筹。

所有位面的神最后都将了解你的名字、你的本性，还有你的成就。有些神会监视你的动向，观察你是否拥有真正半神的品质，还有个别则会在你的道路上给你设置重重障碍。是让造物主留下深刻印象，还是让他们彻底失望，这完全掌握在你的手中。

如果你幸存下来，战胜了你面前的所有挑战，并达到了只有少数人才拥有的能力与高度，那么当之无愧的，你的神格等级将得到提升。

圣灵还是自由自在？ Exarch or Free Agent?

当你在努力完成你神圣的目标时，可能有一个或者多个神要求你成为临时主教为他们服务。即使你同意，你也不会获得任何额外的能力，但是你这么做就有机会接近神，他们也许会给你提供一些如何完成任务的信息。但是另一方面，成为主教的你也可能被要求去执行一些工作，这些工作可能会延缓你的目标，甚至与你的目标相违背。没有人敢说拥有神格是一件很惬意的事情，如果不同意神的要求你同样会遇到各种困难的问题，比如各种各样的星界角色会对你采取一些措施来阻挠你前进。

不朽之路 Route to Immortality

一些半神会选择以下的升天之路。你的登神之路或许会与之不同。

登神升天 Divine Ascension: 当你完成你的最终任务时，在你的神性驱使下你渴望成为真正的神。在你完成凡间的事情后，你被星界之火灼烧直至爆炸，你凡人的肉躯被完全毁灭，没有留下一点残骸。

星界之火最后留下的只有一个刚刚新任的神，充满了只有真神才拥有和使用的强大力量。你成功登神了，如初升的太阳一样照耀世界（如果你倾向黑暗，那么就如日蚀般将黑暗笼罩整个天空）。你穿越了星海，在神的欢迎下进入了众神国度。你加入了万神殿，并显现出神的样貌。

不久以后，你那卓越的感知让你看到无数的凡人在向你祈祷。

21级：神圣火花 Divine Spark

Benefit: 你选择的两个属性都增加2点。

24级：神圣复苏 Divine Recovery

Benefit: 每天当你的生命值首次降至0或更低时，你恢复等同于你最大生命值的一半的生命值。

26级：神力再生 Divine Regeneration

30级：神圣奇迹 Divine Miracle

Benefit: 在一场遭遇中，当你第一次用完最后一个剩余的遭遇攻击威能时，你恢复一个你选择的遭遇攻击威能。

Immanence Epic Destiny.name: 不灭 Immanence
Immanence Epic Destiny.description:
所有的生命都是能量。其他人只能看到无生命物质的地方，你能看到流动和联系。

Prerequisite:

Magic is less complex than most believe it to be. Beneath the incantations, the beautifully fashioned implements, the intricately carved circles and sigils, and the lore scribbled in tomes unnumbered lies one simple truth: Everything is energy. Energy comes in many forms, but once the first fundamental truth is grasped, all later use of magic becomes applied manipulation of energy. Energy can be tuned, directed, drawn away, or multiplied. It can be slowed so that it seems to be a solid, or converted to an insubstantial fluid of potential.

Others who lack your understanding find you obscure or mystical, but in fact you could not be more practical. In the grand scheme of things, only energy is eternal and true; all its shapes and flows are temporary, and will shift into unrecognizable patterns as time advances.

Your comprehension of these truths grants you exceptional and growing power over the world that others believe is mostly physical. Hazardous discharges flow around you like water. You can even extend a fraction of your protection to your allies. So powerful is your control over energy that when your body takes too much hurt, you can convert yourself to a field of substanceless particles.

不朽？ Immortality?

When you complete your final quest, your understanding over the nature of energy expands. You suddenly grasp the final truth with which you have so long struggled: Only one energy field exists, and the entirety of the cosmos is made up of this undulating, many-layered expanse. The cosmos and you are one and the same. The same field that makes up everything else is part of you.

After putting your mortal affairs in order, you transform spontaneously into a being of pure energy, leapfrogging the state of divinity to become a fixture of the cosmos itself. After all, even the gods and the primordials are made of energy. You are an Immanence; you are everywhere.

21级：可变抗力 Variable Resistance

Benefit: 当你在遭遇中第一次受到一种特定类型的伤害时，你对那种伤害类型获得20点抗力直到遭遇结束。

24级：能量之魂 Spirit of Energy

Benefit: 每天一次，当你的生命值降至0或更低时，你恢复一半最大生命值并且成为一个能量之魂。直到你从医疗威能或短休息中恢复生命值，你具有虚体和相位移动。

另外，在你下回合开始时，每个邻近你的敌人受到20点下列一种类型的伤害，当你成为此形态时选择：强酸，寒冰，火焰，闪电，暗蚀，毒素，心灵，光耀或雷鸣。

26级：改变抗力 Vary Resistance

30级：分享抗力 Shared Resistance

Benefit: 当任何你的盟友邻近你时，他获得你的抗力和免疫。

Unyielding Sentinel Epic Destiny.name: 不屈哨兵 Unyielding Sentinel
Unyielding Sentinel Epic Destiny.description:
直到你最后一口气，你是伫立于盟友身前唯一的盾牌，抵挡敌人的猛攻。

Prerequisite:

当你合上眼休息时，一场古老战斗的景象会不由自主地浮现于你的脑海。接连不断的敌人冲向你。你的盟友已经逃离，前往安全的地方。你自愿留下来，一夫当关，万夫莫开，阻止你敌人冲向他们的目标。面对压倒性的失败，你独自伫立，但是死亡并没有立刻带走你。当大地因为敌人的鲜血而变得光滑时，你阻止了军队。你的盟友得以逃脱，而你只有在他们的安全得以确保后，才会真正地倒下。

那已经是很久以前，是前世了。只有当你足够强大，强大到可以接受这样的命运时，那命中注定的，前世中牺牲你自己来保全你盟友的那天的记忆才会渐渐浮现。那一天，你已经成为了传奇，并且你知道你已经转世，你可以再次用你的生命来保卫你的盟友。你是伫立在敌人和你要守护之人中间的盾牌，就像你曾经阻挡过的军团一样，你也会再次让你的敌人如同潮水一般向你发动进攻。

随着你的力量和实力成长，那场古老战斗的景象以及更多前世中类似的战斗，已经慢慢成为焦点。每向前迈出一步，你都会回忆起更多细节并且从记忆中看得更加清晰，直到你能以水晶般清晰地回忆起每个英勇的死亡。当你了解到你的命定任务的本质时，你已经回忆起了数十场战斗，这些战斗跨越了许多世纪，在那些战斗中，你如同最后的堡垒，抵御敌人的进犯。现在，你开始将许多次前世中的宝贵经验集于自身，在你无数次战斗中获得的经验的基础上，你再次为最终之战做好准备，在那时，你也许将再一次伫立于千军万马之前。

不朽 Immortality

你过去的每一世都以英雄般的死亡结束，击退了大量的敌人。为了让他人求生而孤独死亡，你的命运真的总是如此吗？亦或者，每次死亡都会提供给你更多的知识，所以在某一世中，你会赢得胜利，而不是陷入敌阵之中？

逆流而上 Standing Against the Tide: 随着你的命定任务接近尾声，你意识到，你将要面对的几乎不可能的困难就要到来。 唯一的问题是…你能幸存吗？若你直面你的敌人，阻击战潮并保护你的盟友平安，你能否找到不以死亡而告终的胜利？若你活了下来，你的英勇事迹将为成为新的传奇，并且可以再次行走于世，作为你的战力的活生生的体现。若你在战斗中倒下，你的记忆会历久弥新，你的牺牲永远不会被忘却。神殿也许会为你而建，在你倒下的地方，也许会有雕像升起。其他的组织会把你视为他们的英雄和榜样，以你英雄般的死亡为基础，塑造一种会世代流传的精神。

21级：坚定守护者 Stalwart Guardian

Benefit: 你的体质属性增加2点，并选择一个其他属性增加2点

24级：牢不可破 Unbreakable

Benefit: 当你做一次豁免检定时（包括死亡豁免），你掷骰两次并取用任一结果。

26级：不死先锋 Undying Vanguard

你通过恢复前世记忆而积累的知识开始体现为一种包含了多种流派的战斗方式，既有当前的，也有早已被遗忘的。在前世中，你曾与压倒性的困难作斗争并为捍卫你的同伴而死，而每一次，你都在如何面对千军万马而伫立这件事上更进一步。

30级：战斗活力 Vigor of Battle

Benefit: 每轮一次，当你将一个非杂兵敌人的生命值降至0时，你恢复生命值如同你花费了一个回复力一样。

Indomitable Champion Epic Destiny.name: 不屈勇士 Indomitable Champion
Indomitable Champion Epic Destiny.description:
Prerequisite:

It is your destiny to stand against the encroaching darkness that threatens to overwhelm the world. You started with battles against goblins and kobolds, but as time passed and your skill grew you faced ever more dangerous foes. Now, you understand that your fate rests far beyond the borders of the lands you have defended. Great powers from other planes threaten the world, and it is up to you to endure their attacks and end their menace forever.

As an Indomitable Champion, you are almost impossible to sway from your quest. Drawing on reserves of vitality, energy, and vigor, you push on despite your enemies' efforts. Destiny has chosen you to achieve some great deed, and as an epic hero you soldier on despite the obstacles and foes you face.

21级：传奇豪气 Epic Heroism

Whether you boast the strength of a legion or the intellect of an entire academy of sages, your abilities are unparalleled among your people.

Benefit: 你选择两个不同的属性值各增加2点

24级：传奇耐性 Epic Resilience

Your dedication grants you the physical and mental toughness needed to survive and achieve your ultimate destiny.

Benefit: 你获得20点额外生命值，且在强韧，反射和意志上获得+1加值

26级：传奇坚韧 Epic Tenacity

You cannot afford to fall in battle. Instead, your duty to stand before evil gives you the strength to stand against all odds.

30级：无敌防御 Unmatched Defense

It is your destiny to bring peace and order to the world, to throw back the encroaching darkness forevermore. When a foe has you cornered, when a killing blow is about to fall upon you, fate twists its weave to leave you unscathed.

Undying Warrior Epic Destiny.name: 不朽斗士 Undying Warrior
Undying Warrior Epic Destiny.description:
你的身体和灵魂融为一体，不能超越钢铁，但是可以超越死亡。

Prerequisite:

You are the ultimate survivor. Kobold spears, goblin arrows, orc axes, dragon fire, the necrotic touch of a wraith—you've seen it all in your adventures. And you're still alive to tell the tales.

Death has tried to claim you many times, but it failed. You have either survived your wounds or returned from beyond mortality's shroud. Each time you faced death, your soul quickened within your body, attaching itself more deeply to your physical shell.

As you grow in epic power, destiny conspires to keep you breathing. You recover from wounds that would take the life of any lesser mortal. Your reserves appear limitless. Whenever an enemy tries to take you down, your retaliation seems assured.

不朽？ Immortality?

On the verge of your climactic confrontation, your body and soul become one. It seems you can't die.

永生 To Live Forever: When you have reached your career's destined end point, your immortality is assured. Simultaneously a being of soul and body, you pass through death's final mystery only if you choose to do so. Until you decide to abandon your body, it is your vehicle to eternity.

You could retire peacefully, perhaps taking up residence with your preferred deity. Fame and skill could serve you well as you live in a remote place in the world or among the planes, perhaps establishing a tradition to pass on your knowledge to younger would-be heroes. Alongside a Legendary General, you might fight the battle everlasting, or you could keep a vigil like that of the Eternal Defender. Perhaps you'll wander without end, or take up a wild card position in the cosmos. One day, you might ascend to literal godhood.

Your options are as limitless as your time now is. In the endless future, you might learn the method of your transfiguration into an undying being or some other form of wisdom the world needs. You choose whether to share this knowledge or to let it pass away if you finally give up everlasting life.

21级：受伤复苏 Wounded Resurgence

Benefit: 若你重伤，你能以一个次要动作花费一个回复力将你的生命值恢复至重伤值。另外，在你被「死者复活」仪式复活后，你不会受到死亡减值。

24级：不朽耐力 Undying Stamina

Benefit: 每次你抵达里程碑时，你恢复1d4个回复力。

26级：不朽恩怨 Undying Enmity

30级：自我复活 Spontaneous Resurrection

Benefit: 每当你死亡时，你可以在你下一回合开始时复活。这样做不需要花费动作。你会出现在你死亡地点5格内你所选择的空间内，并拥有等同你重伤值的生命值。你不再受到你死亡时存在的任何临时效果，但持久性的效果仍然存在。在同一天内，你每多被杀死一次，你可以复活的时间也会增加。

第二次死亡：在遭遇结束时复活。

第三次死亡：在遭遇结束后1小时复活。

第四次死亡：在遭遇结束后12小时复活。

第五次死亡或更多：在遭遇结束后24小时复活。

如果你不使用这个能力，你仍然可以正常被复活。

Hordemaster Epic Destiny.name: 部落主宰 Hordemaster
Hordemaster Epic Destiny.description:
游牧民族和流亡者，奴隶和自由民，他们都团结在你的旗帜下，扫除文明的腐败。

Prerequisite:

You reject civilization and the temptations of the cities. You see the city-states groan beneath the sorcerer-kings' tyrannies, and you observe how the people fear to speak out. The city dwellers, even non-slaves, give up freedom and morality for the promise of wealth and protection, but you do not make that choice. You have turned to the wilds to be your haven, abandoning “civilized” folk to the fate they deserve. You hone your body and master your techniques until the day comes when you will be powerful enough to tear down the city walls and bring an end to the sorcerer-kings' villainy.

As you embark on this destiny, your actions win you renown throughout the land. Wherever you go, people come to glimpse you. Throughout Athas, people whisper about your power and your intentions. Cities and merchant houses send envoys, bringing you tribute and seeking your favor. Raiders, refugees, escaped slaves, and fugitives flock to you. Some come to learn from you, and others come to fight on your behalf. Between your adventures, a mighty entourage surrounds you. Yet despite your acclaim, you are quick to strike out on your own or with a few trusted companions when adventure calls. Only cowards would have others fight on their behalf.

不朽 Immortality

The desert tribes of your race—human, halfling, elf, thri-kreen, goliath, whatever your kind—flock to your banner. With them come exiles, brigands, mercenaries, and adventurers, all of whom sense the winds of change blowing across the deserts. A mighty storm gathers around you, a storm of war and blood that will cleanse the world of corruption. Whether you lead your horde away from the Tyr Region to found a realm elsewhere, or whether you challenge the cities of the sorcerer-kings, your decisions will forever change Athas.

权位动摇者 Shaker of Thrones: Upon completing your final quest, you unleash the long-awaited war. Cities burn, and your warriors conquer. Whether you are a blood-soaked warrior or an inspiring liberator, your horde reshapes history. When death arrives at last, your legend survives you; for a thousand years, your name will represent ferocity and military prowess.

21级：部落之王 Horde Champion

Benefit: 你选择的两个属性都增加2点。

21级：蜂拥追随者 Swarming Followers

Benefit: 当你邻近一个敌人时，任何开始其回合时邻近那个敌人的盟友，能在他的回合内以一个次要动作快步1格。

24级：传奇永存 The Legend Lives On

Benefit: 如果你死了并且在12小时内没有复活，一个忠实的追随者，比如一个值得信赖的副官，会取代你的位置，采用你的身份、装备还有目标。这个追随者和你是一样的，有相同的等级、种族、职业、典范之道、传奇天命、专长等等。你们两个在本质上是同一个人，甚至有相同的记忆和经历，只是因为你的追随者如此认真地听你的故事。如果你在死亡超过12小时后复活，你信任的追随者会回到他以前的角色。

26级：持续指挥 Persisting Command

30级：部落攻击 Horde Attack

Benefit: 每遭遇一次，当你或离你5格的盟友在遭遇中首次重伤时，你和离你5格内的所有盟友都能以一个自由动作使用一个随意攻击威能。

Avangion Epic Destiny.name: 超凡 Avangion
Avangion Epic Destiny.description:
奥术的力量在你的灵魂中歌唱，这是你帮助保护世界的祝福。

Prerequisite:

虽然你的魔法来自于对世界能量的汲取，但你是通过尊重和慈悲获得了你的力量。原初精魂—世界的古老力量—已经开始把你算作他们的亲属。通过你对守护者之路的奉献，你已经超越了凡人的界限，获得了神奇的力量。不过，随着你新发现的力量，你也将肩负着将世界从那些想玷污它的人手中解放出来的重大责任。

你能感受到世界的脉搏，听到世界精魂的低语。你的灵魂使你与创造物保持着持续的冥想联系。阿塔斯的生命力把它的线编织到你的存在中，把你的思想、身体和灵魂与世界联系起来。利用这种联系，你可以改变你的凡人形态，成为一个明亮、有翅膀的灵魂。

不朽 Immortality

作为一个魔力具现化的生物，死亡对你来说毫无意义。你不再衰老，试图杀死你就像试图摧毁风或星星。尽管风可能会变得平静，星星可能会变得暗淡，但它们总是会回来的。对你来说就是如此。

超凡神化 Avangion Apotheosis: 随着你命运的临近，创造的话语进入你的思想，教导你如何保存和培育生命。你获得力量和知识，引导阿塔斯进入一个充满生机的时代，这里有青翠的土地、流水与和平的生活。你成为希望的符号，在红日下为更光明的未来而努力。

21级：守护化身 Avatar of Preservation

Benefit: 你不再能使用「奥术亵渎」。同时，你在死亡豁免上获得等同于你最高属性调整值一半的加值，并且你不再衰老。

21级：完美精神 Perfection of Mind

Benefit: 在智力，感知和魅力属性中选择2个，选择的属性都增加2点。

24级：超凡转化 Avangion Transformation

Benefit: 获得昏暗视觉，和等同于你速度的飞行速度。此外，你能说天界语，并能理解和写所有语言。

你能以一个自由动作用明亮光照照明你周围5格。在提供照明时，你能选择让你的攻击在它们原有的其他伤害类型上还造成光耀伤害。例如，如果你的「炽热爆」通常造成火焰伤害，你可以选择在命中时造成火焰和光耀伤害。

26级：黄金之翼 Wings of Gold

30级：超凡崛起 Avangion Rising

Benefit: 每当你或你能看到的盟友的生命值降至0或更低时，你能以一个即时中断失去一个回复力来治疗该角色。他恢复等同于你的回复力值 + 你最高属性值的生命值。

Exalted Angel Epic Destiny.name: 崇高天使 Exalted Angel
Exalted Angel Epic Destiny.description:
你的智慧、勇气和献身精神为你赢得了千秋万世中只有少数凡人获得的荣誉——你被转化为天使。

Prerequisite:

By the favor of the gods, you transcend mortality and join the angelic hosts. Your mortal flesh and blood are transformed into immortal substance; even though you still have your mortal appearance, your spirit shines inside your perfected body like a blazing fire in a crystal vessel. As an angel, you no longer age, and all the infirmities of mortality fall away. In time you learn to assume more and more of the appearance and powers of angels.

You are closely bound to the god who raised you up. You can continue to pursue the quests and goals of your mortal life, but from time to time your deity summons you to specific missions or dispatches you on important errands, and you are expected to answer any such call. Because you were once mortal, you can resume your mortal appearance whenever you wish, hiding your immortal nature. This attribute makes you a valuable servant, since you can go where other angels cannot; exalted angels often serve as spies or advise mortals on important matters without ever revealing their true nature.

不朽 Immortality

Even saints and other elevated souls know the bitterness of death, but you are spared that fate. From the moment of your ascension, you are immortal. For a time you walk the world, an agent of whatever cause your deity holds dear. But eventually you are called away to serve your patron in the astral dominions, leaving the affairs of your mortal life behind.

21级：天使本质 Angelic Nature

Benefit: 你的起源变为星界，并且你不会衰老。你获得能够说天界语。你获得15点火焰抗力，15点光耀抗力。你免疫恐惧。

你获得一对天使之翼，你能以一个次要动作显现或隐藏它。当你的天使之翼显现时，你能以你的速度 + 2飞行，但是你在回合结束时着陆。若你在回合结束时仍在飞行，你会立刻下降并着陆，但不会受到坠落伤害。当你的隐藏你的天使之翼时，你的天使本质是隐藏的，就如同你曾经的凡人一样。

如果你从其他来源获得了翅膀（例如天佑之魂 Favored Soul神罚使典范之道），此天使之翼替代你之前获得的翅膀。

24级：光明重生 Reborn in Light

Benefit: 你每天一次，当你死亡时，你的身体会在一束光芒中消失。离你10格内的所有敌人受到2d10 + 感知调整值的伤害并目盲（豁免终止）。在遭遇结束时，你会在一束光芒中以满血重生，并且所有有害效果终止。

26级：天使之主 Angelic Hosts

30级：天使形态 Angelic Form

Benefit: 只要你未重伤，对你的攻击骰都会受到-2减值。另外，当你的天使之翼显现时，你能盘旋（你不再需要在你的回合结束时着陆）。

Sage of Ages Epic Destiny.name: 传古贤者 Sage of Ages
Sage of Ages Epic Destiny.description:
知识就是力量。一旦认识到这个事实，便能认知诸神之力。

Prerequisite:

知识是力量，是自由，是人生，是你的挚爱。只要有合适的信息，你可以揭开宇宙的奥秘，成为你自己命运的主人。你一直对此深信不疑。你对一切有着超乎常人的好奇。即使当你还是一个孩童的时候，“为什么”就总是你提的最多的问题。成年后，你追寻着那些难以抵达的地方的知识，为此，你周游世界，然后再去其它存在的位面。知识是你的慰藉，是你的希望，是你的支柱。信仰对其他人来说也许是不错的选择，但在你看来它不过是一种粗浅的支撑罢了。只有客观的研究和从中得来的知识才能让人明白事物的本质。

你开始对国王与贵族之间琐碎争执越来越没兴趣。肉体不过是灵魂藏匿的外壳，即使是尘世的欢愉在你眼中也开始失去了他们原本的色彩。在对纯粹知识的追求面前，其它的一切都显得苍白无力。

不朽？ Immortality?

当你完成了你的最终任务，你计划着从这个世界中撤离。你积累了如此多的知识，以至于你已经成为自然本身的一种力量。作为一名赢得“传古贤者”这个头衔的少数人，你承担起了孤独的守秘人的职责，独自看守着世界的秘密、历史、和不受拘束的知识。

时机合适时，你隐居到一处只有你知道的秘密场所，在时间和空间的自然弯曲和裂隙中寻找知识。你开始观察事件的河流，将它们刻在脑海之中。寿命，顾虑和肉体的需求从你身边流过却不经过你。你成为了知识的源泉。其它生物，有的时候甚至是神，会因你的完美启迪而寻找你。

21级：向学楷范 Paragon of Learning

Benefit: 你在神秘，地城，历史，自然，和宗教检定上获得+6加值。

24级：守秘预兆 Keeper's Prescience

Benefit: 在每个你的回合开始，掷一次d20。你可以用这次掷骰的结果来代替在你下一回合开始前你的任何一次d20掷骰。

26级：学究秘诀 Trick of Knowledge

30级：时间反转 Reverse Time

Benefit: 每日一次，当一次攻击将你的生命降至0或更低或杀死你时，你不会死去。相反，你恢复到你的最大生命值，并将你的先攻顺序调整至发动该攻击的生物之后。

Thief of Legend Epic Destiny.name: 传奇盗贼 Thief of Legend
Thief of Legend Epic Destiny.description:
你能偷走一切——一切。

Prerequisite:

很久以前，曾经有一个小偷的偷盗技巧十分娴熟，没什么东西能逃脱他的掌心。有人说，他能在国王的眼皮子底下偷走王冠，带着公主的微笑离开，并且在夜空中摘下星辰——而做到这一切仅需一晚！这个小偷的传说有多少是真的，又有多少被传颂成了荒诞的故事，长久以来饱受争议。这样的故事对很多人而言近乎荒谬，但是你知道真相：传说是真的，你就是那位传奇盗贼的转世。

这位传奇盗贼能够做到所有当今人们描述的神奇之事。这位盗贼的手指轻巧而灵活，有人说它可以偷走王后的王冠而不会引起注意。他的行动是如此的安静，死亡也追不上他。他的计划是如此的狡诈，他曾多次胜过众神。成百上千位天使守护的神器从众星之海的领地消失无踪，而这位盗贼留下的唯一证据,只有曾经放着宝物的地方隐约传来的嘲弄声。

尽管这些壮举，偶尔会被其他凡人复现。而盗贼大师和传奇盗贼之间真正的区别，是当一个盗贼学会如何偷走无形之物时。这位传奇盗贼的技巧是如此的高明，就连现实也会屈服于他的诡计。现在，数代人之后，那个盗贼重生了，你会逐渐意识到，你就是那位大盗的转世。随着时间的推移，你开始回忆起你在前世中掌握的技巧和技术，你又一次成长为仍在被传颂的故事中的盗贼大师。

不朽 Immortality

当你对前世中掌握的盗窃和欺骗更加明了时，现实再次开始向你臣服，这使得你可以去窃取那些他人声称永远不会被拿走的东西。

最伟大的奖赏 The Greatest Prize: 尽管你的技巧可以被用于贪欲和服务自我，但你还是因为某种目的重现于世。你有一个必须要偷走的重要事情——一件让你获得新生和转世的偷窃。这个奖赏就是你命运中的任务：你可能命中注定要从一位古老的龙巫妖那里偷走魔法或者要亲手触碰那件世间唯一能够杀死黑暗女神罗丝的神器上。一旦你窃取了命运任务的目标，那么你的角色在世间的任务就完成了。只有这样，你才能再次拥有力量去获取所有凡人都无法掌握的东西，因为你最终回想起了所有能让你窃取无形事物的技术。

21级：非凡技巧 Uncanny Prowess

Benefit: 你的敏捷属性增加2点，并选择一个其他属性增加2点

24级：盗回灵魂 Steal Back the Soul

Benefit: 当你死亡时，在1小时后你的肉体和财产会消失。在24小时后，你会重新出现在你自己选择的、熟悉的安全地点并恢复全部生命值，那个地点必须与你死亡的地点是同一个位面。

另外，当你将一个生物的生命值降至0或更低，你能偷取那个生物的无形之物，例如那个生物的瞳孔的颜色，或者他的王国有关的记忆。这种偷取的机制效果，如果有的话，由DM决定。

26级：不可能偷窃 Impossible Theft

你成为传奇盗贼的能力让你能够扭曲现实，让你能够窃取别人声称不可能的东西。

30级：无形之盗贼 Undetectable Thief

Benefit: 你获得一个等同于10 + 你的隐秘调整值的被动隐秘。任何被动侦查低于你的被动隐秘，或者主动侦查没有高于或等于你的被动隐秘的生物无法看见你，除非你选择主动让那个生物看见你。

Legendary General Epic Destiny.name: 传奇将领 Legendary General
Legendary General Epic Destiny.description:
你胜过历史上著名的领袖，对任何听从你话语的生物都是一种激励。

Prerequisite:

Dhuryan Flamebrow, Malachi of Bael Turath, Ossandrya of the Spiral Tower, Jarret the Twiceborn, and Bergrom Earthfast—these names live on in the annals of time because names of mighty leaders always do. Few leaders are more respected than those who have proven themselves on the field of battle and in the nightmare of war. It's no surprise that history remembers those who lead others through mortal danger. These figures have influenced entire military traditions the world over.

Long have you stood among such illustrious company, a celebrated captain. You have led your fellows in battle against uncountable foes and emerged victorious. Your leadership and encouragement inspired your allies and brought them home safely again and again. Perhaps you're the best commander the world has ever known.

不朽？ Immortality?

In taking responsibility for leading your comrades on the long and terrifying road you have traveled, you have displayed cunning, resolve, and courage. Now that you've arrived, you might receive an even higher calling.

持久战争 Battle Everlasting: Upon the accomplishment of your last epic quest, your soul is tugged at by a call to duty. More than one creature of godlike power is bound to offer you immortality, along with a position of power. The only question is whose side you'll take.

The battle between the gods and the primordials ended eons ago. Strife among planar agencies is still common, and the balance could tip to spark war across the cosmos yet again. Deities, especially malevolent ones, plot against one another to the detriment of all. Elemental powers still look with vengeful eyes upon the world and the heavens. Fey entities, and those of shadow, occasionally raise armies to shake the pillars of the universe. Hordes of demons threaten the very roots of existence. Until an unforeseen age takes hold in which evil is quelled and want is subdued, peace and stability feel tenuous. The need for a leader of legendary skill remains constant.

Is it your greater destiny to stand at the fore of united angelic legions as they hold back the chaos? Will you lead the gods to victory over their ancient foes? Do you prefer the side of the primordials? Might you command archons and efreets as they seize dominions in the Astral Sea, usurping the usurpers? Or will you choose a middle road, mercenary or enlightened, and pick your battles carefully as each situation calls you to war?

21级：神话激励 Mythic Inspiration

Benefit: 当你使用回气时，离你20格内的一个盟友能花费一个回复力。

24级：传奇战术行动 Legendary Tactical Action

Benefit: 任何盟友都可以花费一个你或他能看到的其他盟友的行动点，每遭遇一次。

26级：传奇伟业 Legendary Exploits

30级：不屈伙伴 Unyielding Company

Benefit: 当你有至少1生命值时，离你20格内的盟友不会因为生命值降至0或更低而失去意识或因负生命值而死亡。生命值低于或等于0的盟友如常进行死亡豁免，并且他们会因为死亡豁免失败而死亡。

Legendary Sovereign Epic Destiny.name: 传奇君王 Legendary Sovereign
Legendary Sovereign Epic Destiny.description:
你是万众期待的君王，注定要带领你的人民进入一个辉煌的黄金时代。

Prerequisite:

Legendary sovereigns come to power in a variety of ways. Some are born to royalty—the scions of existing dynasties. These sovereigns reverse the flagging fortunes of their homelands, defeat ancestral enemies, or usher in ages of expansion and prosperity. Other sovereigns establish new dynasties, building monarchies to heal a land or carve a new kingdom out of the wilderness. A few legendary sovereigns seize power by deposing tyrants and leading nations to freedom. Finally, a handful of legendary sovereigns win their thrones by acclaim. They are chosen by the people to take up the mantle of leadership after performing deeds of renown and demonstrating wisdom and courage.

In the days before acceding to your throne, you won ever-growing renown throughout the land you were destined to rule. An anonymous adventurer in other lands, you were a hero to the people of your home. People crowded the streets to catch a glimpse of you. You accrued accolades, honors, and titles, and the people began to wonder whether you might someday claim the throne. As threats arose, the people of the land sought your opinions and counsel. They treated you as a great leader, and soon, your destiny to become a lord was apparent.

不朽 Immortality

Though you might live for decades after completing your final quest, true immortality comes through your legacy.

黄金时代 The Golden Age: Upon completing your final quest, you ascend to the throne and begin your reign. For decades, your land flowers and your people prosper. Your victories shield your land from invasion and bring your ancestral enemies to their knees. Your descendants will mount the steps to your throne for centuries to come. When death comes for you at last, your tomb is a monument revered by your people.

21级：伟大统帅 Great Captain

Benefit: 每遭遇一次，当你造成重击时，离你10格内的所有盟友能以一个自由动作进行一次基本攻击。

21级：国土 Homeland

Benefit: 在DM的许可下，选择一个你注定要统治的国度。你在个国家上被认为是一个伟大的英雄。你在那个国家上进行的任何基于魅力的技能检定都会获得+4加值。你在那里有足够的财产或庄园来满足你的普通需求，包括维持一个家族和一小队忠诚的家臣的资源。

21级：传奇风采 Legendary Presence

Benefit: 你的魅力属性增加2点。

24级：此非吾命 This Is Not My Fate

Benefit: 每天一次，当你要进行一次死亡豁免时，你能改为恢复等同于你重伤值的生命值，结束你身上的任何效果，并起身。

26级：君王之剑 Sword of the Sovereign

30级：王者之剑 Sword of Kings

Benefit: 选择一个你已知的有武器关键字的遭遇攻击威能。当你使用那个威能时，除非你对每个目标都失手，否则它不会被消耗。

Harper of Legend Epic Destiny.name: 传奇竖琴手 Harper of Legend
Harper of Legend Epic Destiny.description:
在反对暴政和压迫的无休止的战斗中，你赢得了特殊的地位，你也获得了反对暴政和压迫的神祗的祝福。在未来的岁月里，你的名字将和其他在你之前的伟大竖琴手的名字一样被提及——风暴·银手，黎明之厅的塞莱利亚，阿莉琳·月刃，等等——而你，竖琴名手。

Prerequisite:

The Harpers are a secret society of good heroes who work against tyranny and darkness. Centuries ago, seven gods and goddesses opposed to evil and oppression— Corellon, Mielikki, Mystra, Oghma, Selûne, Silvanus, and Tymora—met one night in the sacred glade known as the Dancing Place to collectively extend their blessings to mortals who vowed to battle against the darkness. Harpers who serve long and well, showing exceptional wisdom and compassion, eventually earn the accolade of Master Harper. And a few Master Harpers who become the greatest champions of this ancient order become legendary figures, mantled in the divine blessings bestowed by the Seven long ago. You are a Harper of Legend, one of the most honored members of the society with a long record of bold deeds and daring exploits to your credit.

The Harpers have existed for twelve centuries in one form or another; the current one is the third incarnation of the ancient society. The Harpers of today were founded sixty years ago on the ashes of the previous society, which was split into opposing factions by the actions of Khelben Blackstaff a decade before the Spellplague and then overwhelmed in the chaos of the Spellplague years. For a time it seemed that this noble tradition would pass from the world entirely, but a small spark survived. Eaerlraun Shadowlyn, Master of Moongleam Tower in Everlund, kept alive the Harper traditions and nurtured a new generation of Harpers. In the shadows of Netheril he saw the greatest threat confronting the free peoples of Faerûn, and he dedicated his life to building a secret society capable of checking the shades' designs and uniting their enemies against them. So it is that today the Harpers are Netheril's secret enemies, and the protectors of Luruar, Evereska, the Dalelands, and all other people who stand against Netheril's dominion.

不朽 Immortality

The blessings of the Seven Gods of the Dancing Place protect and invigorate you for all your days, but they do not make you deathless. When death finally finds you, you become a disembodied protector and guide to other heroes following in your path—a Ghost Harper. Like other noble spirits such as Cylyria of Berdusk or Dathlue Mistwinter, you are part of a shining company whose vigilance remains undimmed by death.

21级：竖琴手研习 Harper's Study

Benefit: 竖琴手都有一个善于旅行的灵魂，他们比大多数人学习得更多。从你的职业（或你兼职的职业）中选择一个13级或更低的遭遇威能。你会获得该威能作为一个奖励遭遇威能。你之后可以重训这个选择，但你只能选择等级不高于你的等级 - 6的威能。

24级：梅丽凯之祝福 Blessing of Mielikki

Benefit: 你在每天开始时有2个行动点，而不是1个。每当遭遇中的敌人花费一个行动点时，你就获得在该遭遇中额外花费1个行动点的能力。当必须要战斗时，大胆而果断的行动是竖琴手的标志。

26级：泰摩拉之微笑 Tymora Smiles

30级：幽灵竖琴手 Spectral Harpist

Benefit: 你注定要成为幽灵竖琴手的命运已经在召唤你。每天一次，当你死亡时，你的身体会瓦解为银色的尘埃，且你的灵魂能自由行动。你恢复最大生命值，具有虚体和相位移动，免疫毒素，以及30点暗蚀抗力。你失去一半剩余的回复力次数。在长休息后，你重构你的身体。若你在幽灵竖琴手形态死亡，你死亡。
Harper of Legend Epic Destiny.requirements: 21级；善良或守序善良阵营；在交涉，洞察，自然或隐秘中受训至少两个；竖琴手成员

Archmage Epic Destiny.name: 大法师 Archmage
Archmage Epic Destiny.description:
作为大法师，你声称自己是世界上最杰出的巫师。

Prerequisite:

你将你一生都投入到魔法书籍，圣物，卷宗和法术书中，并最终得到一个伟大的发现：法术每一个微小的部分都蕴涵着大量奥术真理。每个法术都是远古伟大成就的一部分，都不过是一个最终公式的一个个微小的残片。随着你深入的学习，你的法术知识和力量越来越强大，它们也逐渐与你融为一体，赋予你对法术的熟练，这些天赋是那些法术使用者们根本无法企及的梦想。

你经常被请求使用你的知识去保护世界，与强大的邪恶势力对抗。但是在你追求更高的知识和魔法力量中，你偶尔会被会可疑的上古遗物，禁断的法术，强大的魔法道具诱惑。你的命运等待你的选择--你会成为一名大法师，还是成为一个可怕的恶魔？

不朽 Immortality, of a Sort

大法师是一类特殊的人群。我们无法说清一个优秀的法师在他完成他的命运时会选择什么。以下的部分是一部分大法师曾经的选择的路，但是你的选择也许会与他们不同。

神秘失踪 Arcane Seclusion: 当你完成你的最终任务后，你从世界中引退了，好让你把更多的时间和精力投入到最强的奥术公式——超法术——那些曾经或者将会出现的跨越位面的存在的少部分法术。

为了利于你的研究，你建造了一个法师的密室。由于你的选择，你的引退为了提供了隔离的场所给你全身心地钻研，你也可以为此在元素混沌中建立一个高塔隔离世界。尽管如此，你也可以保留联系世界的方式，并建立一个连接世界的法师组织。在这种情况下，你会被一些法师发现，但是他们仅仅认为你是一个高等级的法师。除此之外，你也许会建立一个法师学校，但你仅仅被认为是这个学校的校长。

不管你引退的方式和暂时的联系方式如何，你的奥术研究一直在持续着。尽管年代渐渐地流逝，但你所研究的法术的基础--这个宇宙的构造--让你彻底脱离了时间的流动。最后，你的躯壳逐渐地老化褪去，而你的灵魂与神之法术融为一体。

不久之后，你的名字与强大的法术或者仪式联系在一起，被少数强大的法师所使用。

21级：法术召回 Spell Recall

Benefit: 当你在每天开始时，选择一个你所知的奥术每日威能（并且是你今天所准备的，如果你准备法术的话）。你当天能使用那个威能两次，而不是一次。

24级：奥术之魂 Arcane Spirit

Benefit: 每天一次，当你死亡时，你能将你的灵魂从肉体中分离。在奥术之魂形态，你恢复至最大生命值并获得虚体和相位移动。你在奥术之魂形态下，你能使用随意和遭遇威能，但是你不能使用每日威能，激活魔法物品，或是施展一个仪式。如果你在奥术之魂状态死亡，你彻底死亡。

在遭遇结束时，在短休息后，如果你的身体还在，则你的奥术之魂将重新回到你的身体。你的当前生命值不会变化，但是你不再拥有成为奥术之魂的好处和缺点。

如果你的身体丢失了，则你需要其他的魔法来复活，但你也可以保持奥术之魂的状态继续冒险，如果你喜欢的话。

26级：塑形魔法 Shape Magic

30级：终极法术 ArchSpell

Benefit: 你通过终极奥术公式和法术的理解将法术重构，使之达到一个新的高度。选择一个你所知道的奥术每日攻击威能，你可以将其作为遭遇威能，而不是每日威能。

Archspell Epic Destiny.name: 大法术 Archspell
Archspell Epic Destiny.description:
当你特别钟爱一个法术时，你会在其施法中榨取所有的优势。

Prerequisite:

以你的专业之见，在历代施法者口中流传的各种法术中，有一种法术的优雅、力量和概念上的基本之美超越了所有其他法术。你应该知道，因为你为了掌握它已经忍受了许多。你把这个法术中的法术（带着一些自豪感）称为你的 "招牌法术"。

其他的奥术角色可能会施展同样的法术，但你对它的研究，关注任何人都无法企及的细节，已经解开了所有其他人都遗忘的错综复杂的力量。 当然，不可能如此严格地研究你法术书中的每一个法术。 任何人的一生都没有足够的时间来进行这样的项目。 这就是为什么你只选择了一种法术来全身心投入。 一个单一的法术，没有任何其他生物能像你施展它那样华丽。

有时你会怜悯那些碰巧遇到的同样施展你的招牌法术的其他人。你可能会接近这些未开化的法师，给他们以鼓励，并向他们解释，有一天他们可能会有所成就，但前提是他们必须精进他们的相关法术技术。如果他们表现出兴趣，你会非常乐意展示你的法术技巧。

随着你在力量和掌握方面的进步，你作为招牌法术行家的声誉也会增长。 事实上，你的名字开始成为咒语的同义词。 你很难想象有什么比这更令人满意的了：每次施法时，你的名字也会被大声说出。

不朽？ Immortality?

在完成最终任务后，你将最终了解法术中优雅的复杂性。 你已经施放了它如此多次，你唤醒了它和你自己的灵魂之间的共鸣。

一旦你把你的凡间事务整理好，你就会拥抱这种共鸣。 最后一次，你施展了你的招牌法术。 当最后一个音节从你的嘴唇说出时，法术注入了你身体的一分每一毫。 你和你的法术成为一体。 只要还有其他人知道你的法术，你就会存在于那个施法者的思想中，存在于老旧魔典上布满灰尘的文本中，存在于法术公式中。 或许有一天，当某个特殊的法师重新发现并施展这个法术时，你会以肉体的形式回归，准备好再次以只有你能提供的精湛技艺来帮助这个世界。

21级：招牌法术 Signature Spell

Benefit: 选择一个你的奥术每日攻击威能。你在该威能的攻击骰上获得+2加值。如果你重训此威能，你能选择一个新的奥术每日攻击威能作为你的「招牌法术」。

24级：法术回归 Returning Spell

Benefit: 每天一次，当你死亡时，你在你的下一回合内恢复一半你的最大生命值。如果你已经消耗了你的「招牌法术」每日攻击威能，则你恢复其使用。

26级：引导招牌法术 Channel the Signature

30级：不息法术 Living Spell

Benefit: 你能将你的「招牌法术」作为遭遇威能使用，而不是每日威能。

Master Hierophant Epic Destiny.name: 大祭司 Master Hierophant
Master Hierophant Epic Destiny.description:
Constant devotion and unswerving dedication to the Raven Queen won you a place in her service. Now you command death and wield its power against any who would subvert it for their own dark purposes.

Prerequisite:

Your fate is to peer through the veil of worlds and see reality as it truly is, to behold the wonder and splendor of creation and mold it in whatever way you desire. You have always sensed the inherent possibility in your surroundings, always sensed the energy that wells up from rocks and trees, wind and rain. At one time, you thought such power belonged to the spirit world. The more you studied, the more you realized that the spirits are only one part of a much grander story that began when the primordials merged form with substance.

This realization has helped you to harness the latent energy in all things, to call it forth, and to use it as you will. You realize that such knowledge is dangerous: Its reckless exploitation could complete the task the primordials began so long ago—that of unraveling the fabric of creation. It falls to you to husband your knowledge, to keep it safe and carry it with you until the end of your days.

As a Master Hierophant, you have perfected the blending of elemental and primal magic. One feeds into the other, and their fusion energizes a great cycle through which you can transcend your mortality and become something greater. Fire and wind, earth and water are yours to command. They serve you as you carve your name in history. As you progress up the ladder of knowledge, exposure to elemental power slowly changes you; your mortality is stripped away until you become something akin to the primordials of old.

不朽 Immortality

Your extensive use of elemental power exacts a terrible price. What you once thought was a boon born from an understanding of the world's true nature reveals itself to be a curse. Your mortal form becomes compromised as ancient forces that seek entry into the world try to use you as their vessel.

流亡和重生 Exile and Rebirth: Realizing the risk you pose to the natural world, you withdraw from it as far as you can—deep into the Astral Sea. After ages spent sailing the shimmering sea, the elemental energy contained within you finally slips free, transforming you into the primordial power you were destined to become. In this form, raw chaos bleeds from you and surrounds you with a swirling maelstrom. In time, you divide yourself until each mood, hope, and fear becomes distinct. As new versions of you appear in this primordial substance, each claims a share of the protoplasm, shaping it into matter until a new world is born. Thus you germinate the seeds that will become a new reality born from your mortal achievements. Someday it might resemble the world you left behind, or it could be unique in the multiverse.

21级：传奇感知 Epic Insight

Your understanding about reality and its characteristics transcends mortal limits and opens your mind to new possibilities.

Benefit: 你的感知和另一个属性增加2点。

你能流利地说，读和写荒神语。

24级：传奇超然 Epic Transcendence

There was a time when your body was as vulnerable as anyone else's. Elemental power eliminates your weaknesses and girds you against age and infirmity.

Benefit: 你免疫疾病。

你不再衰老。虽然时间不能杀死你，但是伤口会。除非你身上发生了什么灾难，否则你会保持你现在的年纪和外貌。

最后，每遭遇一次，以一个次要动作，你能将你的身体置于凝滞状态来加速恢复。在凝滞状态，你失去意识，在重伤时有再生5，能在回合开始时和结束时进行豁免检定。你的凝滞状态在遭遇结束时终止，或在你的回合结束时你选择终止。

26级：元素转化 Elemental Transmogrification

Your mastery over elemental power reaches a point at which you can transform yourself into an elemental creature. When you do, your flesh and possessions merge to become an enormous being of pure air, earth, fire, or water.

30级：元素升华 Elemental Ascension

You attain perfect mastery over the elements and can call upon their power whenever you choose.

Benefit: 当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.MnCG28TFm7tUro6W]{元素转化 Elemental Transmogrification}威能时，选择两个元素形态并获得两者的好处。

另外，每天第一次你的生命值降至低于1时，你恢复50点生命值。

Archlich Epic Destiny.name: 大巫妖 Archlich
Archlich Epic Destiny.description:
你未能保持活着，但也未能死亡。不死之身，你确保你永远有能力抵御邪恶。

Prerequisite:

你作为一个不死生物而追求永生。大多数通过深奥的死灵文字寻找并轻易获得永生的法师都是邪恶、贪婪的施法者，他们不惜一切代价来实现他们的最终目标。对某些人来说，这个目标就是自由本身。但你有一个更大、更崇高的目标。

与许多在你之前成为巫妖的人不同，你已经锤炼了自己的心智，以避免屈服于死灵存在通常带来的疯狂。例如，你没有在找到那个用你的生命力换取转化的邪恶仪式时就立刻施展它；你一直等到你的力量能够承担这种转化。你也没有接受不死的恶魔王子奥库斯的帮助来增强仪式的力量，而是等待着找到他控制之外的方法，通过这种方式，你逃离了他的掌控，直至今日你也背负他的私人恩怨。

不朽？ Immortality?

当你完成你的最终任务时，世间的一个时代就结束于此。是时候为新的英雄们让路了。然而，你并不会离开得太远。

你通过一批间谍和魔法感应器来监视这个世界和它所发生的一切。你居住在地下深处的一个隐蔽的堡垒里，或者在某个位面的一个遥远的角落里。你满足于让世界上的事件继续发展，观察；然而，你并不是完全无动于衷。时不时的，你可以提供一条线索，帮助那些需要帮助的人。

21级：大巫妖学识 Archlich Knowledge

Benefit: 你的智力属性增加2点

21级：大巫妖命匣 Archlich's Phylactery

Benefit: 你创造一个装着你的生命力的巫术容器。当你死亡时，你和你的所有财产化为灰烬。一天后，你以满血重新复活，携带着所有财产出现在邻近你命匣的空间。

你的命匣能被摧毁。它有40生命值和20点全伤害抗力。经典的命匣是一个密封的金属盒子，里面装满了用你血液书写着巫术之语的羊皮纸。命匣可以是其他形式，例如戒指，宝石，或者护身符。但是他们都有40生命值和20点全伤害抗力。如果你的命匣被摧毁，你能花费10天加上50,000gp制作一个新的。

21级：巫妖抗力 Lich Resistance

Benefit: 你获得等同于5 + 一半你等级的暗蚀抗力和毒素抗力。

21级：生死帷幕 Shroud of Life and Death

Benefit: 任何进入你3格内或者在此距离内开始其回合的活体敌人受到5点暗蚀伤害。任何进入你3格内或者在此距离内开始其回合的不死敌人受到5点光耀伤害。

24级：掌握死亡 Master over Death

Benefit: 每天一次，当你死亡时，你能赋予你自身不死形态代替死亡。你恢复等同于一半最大生命值的生命值。直到遭遇结束，你不能花费回复力，并且任何攻击你并造成伤害的生物受到20点持续暗蚀伤害（豁免终止）。

26级：大巫妖权柄 Archlich Potency

30级：不死精华 Essence of Undeath

Benefit: 当一个离你5格内的敌人生命值降至0或更低时，你恢复一个已消耗的的奥术遭遇威能的使用。

Prince of Hell Epic Destiny.name: 地狱王子 Prince of Hell
Prince of Hell Epic Destiny.description:
Better to rule in hell, than to serve in heaven.

Prerequisite:

One way or another, you're going to Hell. The reasons are many. You might have drawn the fell attention of an archdevil who seeks to name you as its heir. You might have made an unwise bargain, selling your soul in exchange for temporal power. Or you could be a devil's lost scion, only now realizing your heritage's full potential. It might not be fair and could be a gross injustice, but you can't change fate. Your place lies within the fiery dominion and only by accepting your destiny can you use it to your advantage.

Undoubtedly, your curse (or blessing) has manifested itself in omens and the behavior of those you meet. Babies cry, animals grow uneasy, and your eyes have a tendency to flash red when you're angry, all pointing toward darkness in your blood. Consultations with seers and soothsayers offer glimpses of what's in store for you, including grim warnings of plots and treacheries fomented hidden rivals and enemy archdevils who fear your ascent. Indeed, the emergence of a new archdevil comes at a price to those who hold their own kingdoms in the Nine Hells, and none are willing to surrender their might to an upstart mortal. As a result, enemies lay in wait to all sides, plotting and conniving to bring about your downfall.

Contrary to what you might expect, you don't have to be evil to rule in the Nine Hells, though being all dark and nasty goes far to making sure you hold onto what you take. Anyone with a firm hand can claim a place in the infernal realms, and maybe, just maybe, change the dominion in a small way, at least until the Lord of Nessus smacks you down.

不朽 Immortality

There are many paths to joining the archdevils' ranks, and they include murder, betrayal, treachery, and everything in between. The following describes one possible route to a palace overlooking a sea of fire.

地狱尊神 Infernal Apotheosis: Knowing what's in store for you, you spent your career working to secure a place of power within the Nine Hells' hierarchy. You might take a hand in infernal politics, moving through mortal spheres to pit the archdevils and their dukes against one another, or you might wage war against a particular archdevil, vowing to end the dark lord's evil regime. Regardless of the method, your final enemy's defeat brings about the appointed hour and your time in the mortal world is at an end.

For your efforts, Asmodeus summons you to his grim palace in a puff of brimstone smoke. The Lord of Nessus demands your fealty, compelling you to intone the blasphemous oaths of service whether you want to or not. In recognition for your mortal deeds, you are awarded a domain within the Nine Hells, perhaps as a vassal to another archdevil or replacing an archdevil as a lord of Hell, gaining its lands, vassals, and armies to use as you wish.

You ascent is not without its peril. Hidden enemies plot against you, while you might find it hard to stomp out old loyalties to the one you supplanted. As well, the devils are ever working against one another, each casting hungry eyes at their peer's lands. In theory, you will live forever as an immortal steward of a brooding land, but some are ready to slip a knife in your back or send armies to shatter your legions. At any time, another ambitious fool with designs on your demesne might be prepared to use the luck and favor granted by the same dread forces that raised you up.

21级：地狱形态 Infernal Form

Benefit: 命运的重量压在你身上，你开始微妙地转变为一个恶魔。应用以下变化：

* 你的魅力属性增加2点。 * 如果你还没有黑暗视觉，则你获得黑暗视觉。 * 如果你的起源不是星界，改为星界。 * 获得20 + 一半等级的火焰抗力。

24级：地狱火大师 Hellfire Master

Benefit: 你的带有火焰关键字的攻击威能无视火焰抗力。此外，你能选择一个遭遇威能；如果那个威能没有火焰关键字，则获得火焰关键字。如果那个威能造成一种特定类型的伤害（寒冰，闪电，暗蚀等等）那么此威能可以同时造成火焰和那些伤害类型（火焰和寒冰，火焰和闪电，寒冰和暗蚀，等等）。在一次短休后，你能选择一个不同的遭遇威能获得此增益。

26级：地狱盟友 Infernal Allies

30级：硫磺步 Brimstone Step

Benefit: 你获得传送5。当你传送离开时，所有邻近你的生物受到10点火焰伤害。

Heir to the Empire Epic Destiny.name: 帝国继承人 Heir to the Empire
Heir to the Empire Epic Destiny.description:
第一位皇帝拜尔-图拉斯的血液在你的身体里流淌。凭借它赋予你的活力，你将看到帝国的再次崛起。

Prerequisite:

你的人民在人类社会中生活的太久了，是时候收回你与生俱来的统治权了！

现在，这权力将伴随这保护和管理的责任，而不是滥用或是奴役。你认识到祖先们挥霍了这命运的礼物，你发誓自己永远不会同他们一样。

你同这命运抗争。为什么是你？为什么是现在？如此邪恶的帝国为什么应得重生？现今提夫林们世代传递的许可在你的触碰之下开始生效，皇冠刚好合适；权章的重量也很称手；王座看上去像家一样。你甚至可以想象你引领世界走向光明的未来，就像你在预知之梦中经历的那样。

你的新拜尔-图拉斯帝国将不会成为充满阴暗和绝望的地方。所有不安的人将得到他们的避难所。司法将充满宽容，你的统治将公正。提夫林将重新获得一个家。

王国并不是一夜建成的，即使很多人已经期待你的领导。每一天，都会有更多的人集结在你的旗帜之下。你的名声超越任何生活在帝国陨落之后的提夫林。如果帝国能够重得荣耀的话，那将是出自你的手下。

不朽 Immortality

你的遗产将改善巴尔·图拉斯帝国形象。再一次，世界将看到一个黄金世代。在这里，文明之光将推翻争斗和毫无秩序的黑暗。你的名字和事迹将永远流传，因为你所建立的国度将永垂不朽。

真命天子 By Destiny Crowned: 当你完成你的命定任务，你将获得巨大的名声。哪怕是跟你的同伴相比，你的事迹也将成为传奇。人类国王和女王们在你建立的皇庭下曲膝，其它种族的统治者将为你的品德弯腰。哪怕是过去巴尔·图拉斯的遗迹也将认可你的伟大。当你独自现身，它们将从地下升起，一改颓态，重获新生。你自己也将重获新生——过去的罪孽和缺陷将远去，取而代之的将是高贵的正直。其他人追寻着你的榜样，很快将会被视为荣誉而非阴险。

或者，你将在那些藐视你的人的骨头上建立你的王国。很多人试图阻止你的统治，而他们将死在你和你狂热的追随者手里。这并不是你所追求的道路，但你知道结果将会证明这是有意义的。人们将是你为恐怖的暴君，但你的故事将在上层社会中代代流传，哪怕你死去千万年。

21级：统治而生 Born to Rule

Benefit: 你的智力和魅力属性都增加2点，并且你在交涉，洞察和威吓检定上获得+2加值。

24级：帝王之怒 Imperial Wrath

Benefit: 当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Xa7LQDjcYt2H9h4o]{地狱之怒 Infernal Wrath}时，目标同时会被击倒，且晕眩直到你下一回合结束。

26级：生与死的统治者 Ruler of Life and Death

30级：帝国意志 Irresistible Will of the Empire

Benefit: 在每次遭遇中，第一个用近战攻击命中你的生物会被支配，直到它下一回合结束。

Eighth Seal Epic Destiny.name: 第八封印 Eighth Seal
Eighth Seal Epic Destiny.description:
你是抵御遥远国度入侵的封印，保护世界免受其最严重的威胁。

Prerequisite:

You are one with the Keepers of the Cerulean Sign—perhaps through your exposure to their writings or other works, perhaps by serving their ancient cause through your deeds. In your ceaseless fight against the aberrant menace, you have focused on closing the breaches to the Far Realm where ancient safeguards have begun to fail. But your need to keep the world safe will exact a terrible price in the end.

不朽 Immortality

Using your soul's power and your psionic abilities, you sacrifice yourself to strengthen the boundaries between the mortal realm and the madness of the Far Realm.

活体封印 Living Seal: To complete your task, you must recover the ancient Cerulean Seals, believed to have been lost or destroyed since the keepers of old faded from this world. Your searching reveals that these are not devices, but rather the souls of the greatest champions who gave their lives to secure reality against the Far Realm's corrupting influence. By working with these guardians, you merge your spiritual energy with their own and restore the wards they built.

21级：深蓝封印守护者 Keeper of the Cerulean Seals

Benefit: 在你接受命运后，七道封印给予你下列收益。

* 你在所有防御上获得+1加值。 * 当你对异界生物的攻击命中时，该攻击造成2d12额外心灵和光耀伤害。 * 你免疫恐惧效果。 * 在有关生物起源的效果上，你被视作星界生物。

24级：精神闪耀之通道 The Mind's Shining Corridors

Benefit: 当一个敌人对抗你意志防御的攻击失手时，它受到2d12心灵和光耀伤害，且晕眩直到你下一回合结束。如果此敌人已经晕眩，则它震慑作为代替。

另外，当你受到一个可豁免终止的要使你晕眩，受控或震慑的效果，你能在你下一回合开始时对那效果进行豁免。若你在豁免检定上成功，则效果终止。

26级：召唤七把钥匙 Call Forth the Seven Keys

30级：自然恢复 Nature Restored

Benefit: 当你将一个异界生物的生命值降至0或更低时，选择下列一种效果。

* 你恢复生命值如同你花费了一个回复力。 * 离那个异界生物3格内的所有敌人受到10点心灵和光耀伤害，且晕眩直到你下一回合结束。

Harbinger of Doom Epic Destiny.name: 厄运使者 Harbinger of Doom
Harbinger of Doom Epic Destiny.description:
在你身后会有厄运降临。

Prerequisite:

你是风暴的征兆，你是毁灭的预告，是灾厄的散播者—无论你去哪里，命运会被解开，然后重新编织。你已经打破了命运的桎梏，对你来说，没有什么是注定的。你前行道路上的每一步，你做的每一个决定，都会使得未来随之产生。由你的选择所导致的涟漪会使得国王死去，会唤醒上古的恐怖，会毁灭王国，会挫败神祗的设计。

你的选择所带来的可怕后果，会降临在那些你与之交战的人，国度，或是某种事业的身上。当你靠近时，不幸，意外，自然灾害聚集在你的敌人周围——最开始是小事情，例如一场冰雹毁了庄稼，一位信使因为丢了马而耽误了几个小时，或者是仆从忘记锁门。你无法控制这一切，甚至自己也会猜测这到底是怎么回事。事实上，即便是你不希望伤害的事物，也会有坏事降临，虽然不像你的敌人遭受的那么沉重。你不敢在你喜欢的地方逗留，以免无意中破坏你所珍视的东西。

不朽 Immortality

没有人能确认你的存在究竟代表着哪一种厄运。你可能作为一名正义之士与邪恶领主抗争。你的失败也许导致了你发誓要守护的国度的毁灭，而你的成功可能会导致一个顽固暴政的崛起，就像你对抗的邪恶领主一样危险。只有在你作为凡人的一声结束时，你的真实目的才会清晰。

毁灭实现 Doom Fulfilled: 你不可抗拒地去实现某种终极毁灭—通常是一个伟大的生物，一个强盛的国度或者是一件传奇神器的彻底毁灭。在你成功后，命运在你周围复原，而新的命运之网开始形成。在这种编制的过程中，你不再存在。你什么也没有剩下，但你会在世人们的神话故事中作为变化和毁灭的代名词被铭记。在未来的某时某刻，你会带着可怕的知识醒来，你必须再次成为厄运使者。

21级：厄运作盾 Shield of Ill Fortune

Benefit: 每当你在攻击骰掷出1时，你可以重新掷骰。如果你掷出第二个1，你就不能再重骰。此外，当任何敌人在对你的攻击骰上掷出1时，该敌人震慑直到你下一回合结束，并且你能以一个即时反应将该敌人滑动3格。

24级：掌控厄运 Master of Ill Fortune

Benefit: 每遭遇一次，当离你10格内的一个生物生命值降至0或更低时，你可以进行一次豁免检定或花费一个回复力。

26级：厄运斗篷 Cloak of Doom

30级：厄运回报 Doom's Reward

Benefit: 当你进行攻击并对每个目标都失手时，你获得等同于一半你等级的临时生命值。

Avatar of Storm Epic Destiny.name: 风暴化身 Avatar of Storm
Avatar of Storm Epic Destiny.description:
你驾驭着自然界的狂怒之力，狂风，雷鸣和闪电伴随你身。你所到之处，有暴风雨相伴。

Prerequisite:

You are two beings at the same time: a great mortal hero and the god of storms. You have always known you were different from the people around you, but now you understand what you are and why your heart sings when lightning flashes and thunder rolls in the distance. You are destined to walk the world in mortal form for a single brief lifetime, an inspiration to those who worship your true self and a terrible foe to those who oppose you. And after your incarnation ends and you reunite with your immortal being, people will look back on your deeds for centuries to come and see in them the hand of the divine.

As an avatar of storm, you are most likely an incarnation of Kord. However, minor storm deities or dormant powers sometimes incarnate as avatars, so you might be the mortal vessel of some other deity, or even a cosmic principle of storms and destruction.

Thunder and lightning are your weapons, and you wield them with all the fury and wrath of the most violent storm. Wherever you go, storms follow in your wake. You command them and use their power to bring your vengeance upon your enemies.

不朽 Immortality

Longevity is rarely important to an avatar of storm. You recognize that life and civilization are fleeting things in this world, and that enough wind and rain can wash away the existence of anything. You might wander into the wilderness to live in isolation or to revel in your communion with the primal forces of the universe. You might even challenge the Elemental Chaos, battling primordials for dominion over storms.

神性再聚 Divine Reunion: When you accomplish your final quest, your mortal existence comes to an end and you return to your divine form. Your body vanishes in a blinding thunderstroke, leaping upward into the dark storm clouds that gather overhead. Your ascension is marked by a thunderstorm of spectacular power. While your mortal life is at an end, your memories, your passions, and your struggles are all now part of your divine being.

21级：风暴之手 Stormhand

Benefit: 当你使用一个闪电或雷鸣威能，你能选择将它的闪电伤害或雷鸣伤害变为闪电和雷鸣伤害（若你这么做，则威能获得第二种伤害类型的关键字，如果还没有的话）。

21级：风暴之力 Strength of the Storm

Benefit: 你的体质和力量属性都增加2点

24级：轰鸣复苏 Thundering Revival

Benefit: 每天第一次你开始你的回合时濒死或死亡，你复活。你恢复等同于你重伤值的生命值，并且离你5格内的所有敌人受到2d10 + 体质调整值的雷鸣伤害并被推离2格。

26级：凝聚风暴 Gather the Storm

30级：风行者 Windstrider

Benefit: 你获得等同于你的速度 +2 的飞行速度，并且你能盘旋。
Avatar of Storm Epic Destiny.requirements: 21级，[[风暴献祭 <神力> Storm Sacrifice <Divinity>]]专长

Storm Sovereign Epic Destiny.name: 风暴君主 Storm Sovereign
Storm Sovereign Epic Destiny.description:
你是复仇的风暴——元素混沌的原始破坏潜力的体现。

Prerequisite:

你是风暴的后裔，是雷鸣与闪电的主人，是元素混沌的王子。其他人也和你一样——他们与孕育了这个世界的元素力量有着不寻常的联系，他们的内心也蕴藏着一定的元素力量。有些人还没有意识到他们的命运，而其他人可能永远无法实现他们的潜力，但你不同，因为你的眼睛里闪烁着闪电，你的头发像在微风中飘动，你的声音如同雷鸣。荒神的继承人，有人会称你和那些像你一样的人，可能会在山的高度或海洋的深处找到这种联系，但你的联系在蛮荒的风暴和那些轰隆作响的风雨之中，在刺眼的闪电和震耳欲聋的雷暴中，你感到真正的自由，你的意志从未如此清晰。

当你认识到你在更广阔的世界中的位置时，你与凡人生物的联系就会延长。你的家园不在文明的城市中，也不在黑暗的荒野中，而是在元素混沌这个充满可能性的海洋中。你寻求在沸腾的大地的漂流微粒中跳舞，用你的雨点击打火海，并摧毁任何不向你跪拜的人。只有你的意志才能抑制这些狂野的冲动，只有你的义务感和责任感才能约束你。不过，总有一天，你会逃脱出来，拥抱你长期压抑的天性。

不朽 Immortality

荒神的精神对你的自我束缚发出怒吼。它将获得自由，当它真的逃脱时，你最好离世界远一点。

荒神之力 Primordial Power: 长期以来，你一直忍受着你体内愤怒的存在所带来的痛苦。你一直在抵抗破坏和愤怒的非自然冲动，测试你自我控制的极限。在与你最后一个敌人的最后一战中，你几乎失手将荒神的实体释放到世界上，只有通过最高的纪律行为，你才保持了对自己的控制。

当尘埃落定时，你知道你不能再禁锢怪物，它很快就会冲破你的肉体而苏醒，给你周围的一切带来彻底的毁灭。你知道唯一能让你释放荒神之力而不担心后果的地方，你离开了凡间，去寻找元素混沌。在远离任何生物的地方，你放松了自己，将你的身体和灵魂交给了荒神，让它释放出风暴的愤怒。你以为这将意味着你的湮灭，从某种程度上说，这种释放确实结束了你的生命，但你的意识通过与元素实体的融合而继续存在，为无意识的风暴赋予思想，为暴力的化身赋予生命。因此，你成为一个新的荒神——一个元素的主人，创造和毁灭的代理人——因此你从世界上消逝，成为元素混沌中的一个伟大力量。

21级：生于风暴 Stormborn

Benefit: 你的体质属性增加2点，并且你的起源改为元素界。另外，你获得等同于15 + 一半你等级的闪电和雷鸣抗力。

24级：电闪雷鸣 Thunder and Lightning

Benefit: 每天一次，当你死亡时，你的身体会化为元素风暴。你恢复至一半生命值，并获得虚体和相位移动。你获得一个灵气5，当敌人在灵气内开始他们的回合时，他们会自动受到15点闪电和雷电伤害，并且你可以将该敌人滑动3格。你可以使用遭遇和随意威能，但你不能使用每日威能、激活魔法物品和施展仪式。如果你在元素风暴形态下死亡，你死亡。

在遭遇结束时，经过短休息后，你会从基本元素中重组自己。你的当前生命值不变，但你不再有处于元素风暴形态下的其他好处和缺陷。

26级：混沌之子 Scion of Chaos

30级：风暴之主 Cyclone's Master

Benefit: 你获得等同于你速度 + 2的飞行速度，且可以盘旋。你不需要在结束移动时着陆。另外，你获得一个灵气5；任何进入或在你的灵气内开始其回合的生物失去任何闪电或雷鸣抗力。当你以攻击造成伤害时，你能选择让那攻击造成闪电或雷鸣伤害来取代通常的伤害类型。

Rune Maker Epic Destiny.name: 符文锻造者 Rune Maker
Rune Maker Epic Destiny.description:
你不再只是效仿神力的符文。现在你可以锻造它们。

Prerequisite:

For you, the divine runes were never merely inert symbols that channeled divine magic. Instead, the runes have always been more like living creatures to you. You don't simply mark a rune on stone or paper or trace it in the air. You breathe life into it, carefully forming its curves and lines while drawing divine magic into it.

Your deep understanding of the runes and the power they represent marks you as one of the greatest runepriests ever. As you enter the final stage of your career, your understanding of your art grows still deeper. At first in small, tantalizing hints and later in insights that come upon you like bolts from the heavens, you understand the fundamental structures of the runes. You are no longer content to learn of the runes created by the gods. Your ambition and mastery push you to create new runes, to find the markings that catalog, and perhaps even create, entirely new aspects of the world.

Should you prove worthy of this task, the very fiber of the cosmos might bend and shift at your command. The power you seek is far greater than any you previously imagined you could control, but with diligence, bravery, and faith, you know that you can achieve anything. Soon you will take your place beside the gods.

不朽 Immortality

At the apex of your craft, you set aside mortal concerns and work alongside the gods to craft the runes of creation.

符文锻造 Rune Forge: You understand the deepest secrets of the runes, and you take your place among the gods as one who can forge reality. You create your own astral domain and from there gather some of the finest crafters from across the cosmos. Until the end of time, you build new divine runes.

21级：符文之力 Rune of Might

Benefit: 你的力量属性增加2点，当你处于符文状态时，你可以用一个次要动作改变符文状态。

24级：符文之主 Lord of All Runes

Benefit: 每轮一次，当你在你的回合内改变符文状态时，你或邻近你的一个盟友能进行一次豁免检定。

26级：符文持续 Persistent Runes

30级：符文不朽 Rune of Immortality

Benefit: 当你在一次遭遇中的第三次死亡豁免失败时，你不会死亡。相反，你会消失，出现在你的神祗的领域里。你身上所有的状态和有害效果都终止，你被视为没有在死亡豁免上失败，并且你可以花费一个回复力。在你下一回合开始时，你会重新出现在你离开的空间的10格内。

Elf High Mage Epic Destiny.name: 高等精灵法师 Elf High Mage
Elf High Mage Epic Destiny.description:
You have embarked on the study of the most powerful magic known to mortals: arselu tel-quessir, the Great Art of the People. Your arcane works might endure for millennia.

Prerequisite:

For twenty thousand years the elves of Faerûn have created wonders of magic greater and more enduring than any work in stone or wood. Dimensional gates, invisible roadways linking distant points, hidden vaults, mighty mythal wards to protect kingdoms, cities buttressed by unfailing spells—all these things and more were crafted by high magic, the very pinnacle of the elven arcane arts. With high magic the elves of old sundered Evermeet from the world, created the extradimensional realm of Sildëyuir, and broke the power of Faerûn's draconic rulers by binding them to the Rage. Others have harnessed magic of similar power at different times in Faerûn's history—the Netherese, the Imaskari, the Shoon—but few of their works ever matched the longevity, the artistry, or the world-changing scope of the spells wrought by elven high magic.

The secrets of this powerful and dangerous lore are in the keeping of the selutaar, or the Elf High Mages. In the days of the great elven kingdoms of the Crown Wars there were hundreds of Elf High Mages, but today only a handful remains in the world. (Most of the Elf High Mages are sun elves, moon elves, and star elves, so they might more properly be called Eladrin High Mages, but such distinctions are lost on those who aren't elves.) Usually the path to high magic is a long one indeed; an elf or eladrin is rarely considered ready for instruction in this ancient art before he or she reaches 300 years of age, and many begin their instruction decades later. However, a few exceptional individuals—for example, the sun elf Araevin Teshurr, who reshaped the mythal of Myth Drannor in the years following the reconquest of that realm—have defied this custom in the past.

Although any Elf High Mage is a potent arcane spellcaster by definition, an Elf High Mage's true power does not lie in mastery of battle magic. Elven high magic consists of a set of rare and powerful rituals, mostly dealing with the creation of mythals, which are permanent magical wardings woven over a wide area in which the mage can anchor many different protective or useful effects. The most powerful such rituals require multiple Elf High Mages to combine their efforts for months of arduous spellcasting?

不朽 Immortality

By the time your life's works are finished and your destiny is accomplished, little remains of your mortal shell. You have become a flame of living magic,shining through a fragile veil of flesh. All who look upon you can sense the unseen radiance that floods your form. The call of Arvandor grows stronger with each passing day, as does the promise of blissful rest in the Elvenhome. With nothing more than a simple act of will, you allow your body to fall away into nothingness and take up your place as one of the wisest and most honored of Arvandor's shining hosts.

Some Elf High Mages choose to deny themselves the rest of Arvandor and instead use their last act to bind themselves to a great work of high magic. Joining yourself to a mythal, you greatly strengthen an ancient work, infusing it with an arcane lifeforce so that it can heal, grow, and change over time. From time to time your people summon your consciousness to the fore to seek your advice and to honor the memory of your living wisdom and heroism.

21级：高等魔法 High Magic

Benefit: 你在施展仪式时比其他施法者有更好的技巧和效率。你在作为仪式一部分进行的神秘检定上获得+5加值。当你施展仪式时，你仅需花费正常价格的一半。

21级：魔法合一 One with Magic

Benefit: 你对你周围的奥术力量有一种直觉上的联系。你的感知属性增加2点。你能在你的回合以一个自由动作使用神秘技能的侦测魔法功能。在一次长休息后，掷骰3个d20并保存结果。在你下一次长休息前的任意时刻，你能使用其中的一个结果来代替你的奥术攻击骰或神秘检定。这么做会消耗保存的结果。

24级：魔力续行 Sustained by Magic

Benefit: 每天一次，当你重伤或生命值降至0时，你能消耗一个奥术攻击威能来治疗你自己。如果你消耗一个遭遇攻击威能，则你能花费一个回复力，结束你身上正在影响你的一个状态，并传送最多10格。如果你消耗一个每日攻击威能，则你能花费1或2个回复力，结束你身上所有正在影响你的状态，并传送最多20格。你消耗的威能不会有任何其他效果。

26级：群星闪耀 Starshine upon the People

30级：生命赋能 Empowered by Life

Benefit: 当你没有回复力剩余时，你可以选择使用你的生与死之间界限的张力来驱动你的魔法。你能释放一个已消耗的遭遇攻击威能，或者在一次法术的所有攻击骰上获得+4加值。当你这么做了的回合结束时，你失去等同于四分之一最大生命值的生命值。你能释放一个已消耗的每日攻击威能或将一次命中改为重击。在你这么做了的回合结束时，你失去等同于一半最大生命值的生命值。你在一个回合中能这样做不止一次。

Darklord Epic Destiny.name: 黑暗领主 Darklord
Darklord Epic Destiny.description:
堕影冥界将你包裹在它令人不寒而栗的怀抱中，欢迎你成为任何你选择的领域的领主和主人。

Prerequisite:

Some say that the Shadowfell reflects darkly the mortal world and is an imperfect echo of that realm suspended in reality's heart. Where others fear the unexpected twists, the deep shadows, and the scuttling creatures that emerge from hiding only in the darkest of nights, you embrace it all, feeling at home in the plane's pervasive chill and gloomy ambience. Perhaps your comfort grows from familiarity; you might have been born in the Shadowfell, perhaps as a shadar-kai, or another race who settled here, and, as a result, you come to see other worlds as being too bright and too garish to trust completely. Or, you might find the Shadowfell mirroring your own dark and brooding nature, especially if you are obsessed with death and dark magic. Regardless of the reasons for your unhealthy obsession with shadow, the kinship you experience blossoms into something more as the Shadowfell reciprocates your affection and blesses you with its power.

The Shadowfell isn't free with its gifts and only gradually infuses you based on your achievements and successes. As you prove your worth, you find yourself changing, embracing the cool darkness and rejecting the bright radiance of the sun. You become withdrawn and cold, even to your closest comrades, while your connections to the Shadowfell strengthen. Dark impulses might breed darker acts, but there is nothing to fear: The Shadowfell chose you to become its steward, and should you accept, your immortality is ensured.

Although the Darklord is available to characters of any class, strikers and controllers are best suited to its features and power.

不朽 Immortality

You claim your place as master of the Shadowfell, a dark and mysterious figure of uncertain loyalties commanding a region in the Shadowfell as absolute ruler, monarch of night, and prince of darkness.

暗影代价 Shadow's Price: Your interests in the Shadowfell have only grown over your long career and in return, you learn to tap into its grim power to augment your other capabilities. Dabbling in dark forces exacts a dread price from you, for you have paled and grown thin—the cost of embracing the darkness.

During the last conflict with your enemy, you pulled out all the stops, using every tool at your disposal to win the day, but in doing so, you cemented the Shadowfell's hold over your soul. When the battle ends, as your achievements begin to sink in, mist wells up from the ground around you in silvery tendrils, each wrapping chill fingers around your legs, crawling up your torso until it shrouds you completely. As quickly as the mists appeared, though, so do they vanish and when they do, they take you with them.

The Shadowfell's price is to stake a claim on your soul and to demand you spend eternity as a Darklord, a ruler of the gloomy plane. The plane manifests a realm suited to your accomplishments and failures, producing a darkly twisted realm that for you is both frightening and comforting, and that reflects all that you have done as a mortal and laying the foundation for what you will do as an immortal. Thus you spend the remainder of your days as an architect of good or evil as you decide.

21级：立于两世之间 Stand in Two Worlds

Benefit: 每天一次，你能施展「位面传送门」或「影行术」仪式而不需要花费材料，即使你没有仪式施法者 Ritual Caster专长。若你选择施展「位面传送门」仪式，则你必须旅行至堕影冥界，若你已经在堕影冥界的话，则你回到自然界。

24级：堕影冥界归来 Return from the Shadowfell

Benefit: 每天一次，当你死亡时，你的灵魂能自由穿过堕影冥界地带的帷幕，并带着鸦后的祝福重获新生。在你的下一回合开始时，你显现出一个新的身体（若你的尸体尚存，则将其摧毁），带着你尸体的所有物品，并站着出现在你死亡的地方。你会立刻回复至最大生命值，并且像通常那样继续战斗。

堕影冥界会在你的新身体上附着一小段时间。你对所有目标获得隐蔽，并拥有相位移动。在遭遇结束时，你失去堕影冥界附着在你身上的最后一丝影子，你失去隐蔽和相位移动。

26级：黑暗领主堕影步 Darklord Shadow Stride

30级：死亡之主 Thrall in Death

Benefit: 你对堕影冥界有着无与伦比的掌控力，当你杀死一个敌人时，你能使那个敌人死而复生。当你将一个目标的生命值降至0或更低时，在你的下一回合开始时，那个敌人自动站在它死亡的那一格，并拥有1点生命值。目标被你支配直到遭遇结束，届时它会被摧毁。

Dark Wanderer Epic Destiny.name: 黑暗漫游者 Dark Wanderer
Dark Wanderer Epic Destiny.description:
你在命运的阴森道路上行走。直到命运在这条路上与你相遇，你将永远漂泊。

Prerequisite:

你在很久以前便背井离乡，告别了更简单的生活带来的舒适感。追寻着一种难以言明的渴望，你和其他漫游者一同上路，你的道路充满了艰难险阻，并引导你前往宿命中的事件。到后来，也许你和你得同伴被传颂为英雄。然而，命运在暗中依然引导你继续前进，走向未知的终点。

在那个终点到来之前，你作为一个阴暗的存在流浪在这个世界上，出现在人们最不期望或最需要你的地方。

不朽？ Immortality?

上天让你有机会做最后的挣扎。当你到达那个末日时，谁知道它会把你带到哪里？

漫游宿命 Roaming Wyrd: 你的漫游时光并没有因为你抓住了你注定的未来而结束。从小到大，你一直是被命运利用的工具，一个不知情的幸运和毁灭的代理人。你追随你的召唤，做你需要做的事，现在你已经完成了黑暗命运在你面前设定的任务。了解你故事的人把你看作是命运的化身。

你在生活中的成就的织锦跟着你，被你的最后行为所染上颜色。如果最终你给世界带来了好处，那么你的传奇故事就是财富如何眷顾勇敢之人。然而，你的故事可能会因为严峻的命运那不可避免的干涉而呈现出黑暗的色彩。

你在宇宙中游荡，被那些寻求或躲避命运的人当作守护者或调解人。你可能是一个与运气或宿命有关的力量的代理人，如艾梵德拉或鸦后。但更有可能的是，你已经切断了那些无法避免的命运，并摆脱了所谓机会的圈套。

现在，你自由自在地漫游，在你的生命中一度游荡到你希望的地方。在这样做的过程中，你为那些希望摆脱命运的束缚，走出自己的道路的人树立了榜样。

21级：非吾命运 Not My Destiny

Benefit: 任何命中你的等级等于或低于你的生物在攻击骰上受到-4减值，直到遭遇结束。

24级：黑暗长路 Dark Road

Benefit: 只要你连续，不被打断地行走24个小时，你就能去到任何你想去的地方。无论这个地方的距离有多远，也无论和你相隔多少个位面。你在开始之后的24个小时抵达目的地，找到捷径，传送门，或者其他你不知道的方式。在旅途中，你不需要休息，食物或者水，除了恢复威能和回复力。在旅途中，你是安全的，不会遇到险境，被攻击以及其他类型的危险。

在选择目的地时，你必须明确。如果你的目的地在一幢建筑物内，例如一座城堡中的特定房间，那么长途跋涉带你来到建筑物的主入口，而不是建筑内。

你能选择让等同于5 + 你感知调整值数量的角色伴你同行。你们都会分享这个职业特性的好处。

26级：从不茫然 Never at a Loss

30级：漫长归路 Long Walk Back

Benefit: 如果你死亡并且没有在12小时内复活，你的身体和财产就会消失。在那之后的12小时后——也就是你死亡24小时后——你从死地归返，穿着和你死亡时同样的装备。在你被杀后，从你和DM决定的地点苏醒然后刚刚走了回来。你的状态如同接受了「死者复活」仪式，但不会有死亡减值。

你能选择抵达你死亡时的地点，任何一位盟友的位置，或者任何你认为是家的地方。你的存在有一个终极目标，并不是随机的死亡。

Keeper of the Everflow Epic Destiny.name: 恒流监管者 Keeper of the Everflow
Keeper of the Everflow Epic Destiny.description:
你借助灵轮的力量，从根本上改变你的身体和精神性质，以适应你面临的任何挑战。

Prerequisite:

灵魂源源不断地穿过堕影冥界——这是一场关于生命、死亡和重生的伟大进程的一部分，被一些苦行僧称为 “恒流”。那些相信恒流的人也相信，它曾经是为了让灵魂回到世界，获得新的生命。根据传说，畏惧之神奈落通过囤积亡者的灵魂篡夺了恒流。他的继任者，鸦后，仅仅挽回了堕落神祗所造成的伤害的一部分，她缩短了恒流，并在她认为合适的时候对凡人的灵魂进行审判。

少数瞥见这一真相的人选择了纠正恒流的方向。要做到这一点，恒流监管者们必须找到隐藏在堕影冥界深处的一个强大的架构——伟大的灵轮，由第一批守护者所启动。如果他们的工作完成，当灵魂的队伍从通往莱得纳（Letherna）宫的道路上重新回到这个世界时，恒流将从乌鸦女王的领域中涓涓流走。恒流监管者的存在是对死亡之神的侮辱，她会不惜一切代价，直到这个新成立的组织的信徒们都被她的寒风所掌握。

实践天命 Living the Destiny

随着你的开悟，你的行为吸引了那些宁可面临永恒的毁灭也不愿意忍受恒流变化的众生的注意。

这些对手中最重要的是鸦后的仆人。她的影灵和哀誓魔军团不停地追捕你，但他们的愤怒只是你和死亡之神之间最终对抗的前兆。当那场最终的冲突到来时，你将带领鸦后回到恒流中，如果有必要的话，就用武力，这样她就可以重生，获得她自己和所有其他生物所拒绝的启蒙。

21级：顿悟重生 Enlightened Rebirth

You have touched the enlightenment promised by the Spirit Wheel, letting you improve your innate abilities as the life force of all creatures flows through you.

Benefit: 你选择的一个属性值增加2点

另外，你可以在短休息或长休息结束时改变你的起源。你获得基于你选择的起源的相关增益，即使那起源是你原本的起源

异界：你具有等同于5 + 一半你的等级的心灵抗力。任何以对抗意志的攻击对你命中或失手的敌人会受到等同于你智力，感知或魅力调整值的心灵伤害

元素界：你具有10点强酸抗力，10点寒冰抗力，10点火焰抗力和10点闪电抗力。你的攻击无视任何强酸，寒冰，火焰或闪电抗力

妖精界：你在反射和意志上获得+1加值，且你免疫魅惑效果

星界：当你重伤时，你获得再生5。你的造成无类型伤害的随意攻击现在可以改为造成光耀伤害

自然界：你获得5点全伤害抗力，且在豁免骰上获得+2加值

暗影界：你获得10点暗蚀抗力。任何以对抗意志的攻击对你命中或失手的敌人会受到等同于你智力，感知或魅力调整值的暗蚀伤害

24级：生命溢出 Life Overflow

The enemies that stand between you and your quest are legion, but you are guided by the Spirit Wheel. Your connection with the everflow grows stronger each time you fall and rise again.

Benefit: 每天一次，当你开始你的回合时生命值为0或更低，你恢复等同于你重伤值的生命值，且结束由你选择的所有影响你的结果。你可以同时改变你的起源，从「顿悟重生」获得相应的增益。此遭遇中每有一个恒流监管者盟友，你就同时获得5点临时生命值

26级：灵轮学识 Lore of the Wheel

Countless spirits are connected to each other through the Spirit Wheel. With a moment's concentration, you leave your flesh and let your soul roam the everflow, drenching yourself in the knowledge of all who came before you.

30级：流转灵轮 Turn the Wheel

At long last, you unlock the secrets of the Spirit Wheel, binding your opponents to the power of the everflow.

Benefit: 当你以每日攻击威能命中一个敌人，或对一个敌人造成重击时，该敌人只能进行基本攻击，直到你下一回合结束

当你将一个敌人生命值降到0时，你可以选择让该敌人作为一个自然界生物转生到该世界，且没有前生的记忆。你没法控制该敌人会在哪里以及如何转生

Wild Hunter Epic Destiny.name: 荒野猎人 Wild Hunter
Wild Hunter Epic Destiny.description:
Like the firbolgs, you are a master of the Wild Hunt, dispensing justice for those who cannot do so themselves. You call on the creatures of the hunt to help you seek your prey, so that it cannot hide from that justice.

Prerequisite:

Deep in the Feywild, far from the stately halls of the elad rin, a tradition has been upheld for eons. In shadowy forests thick with moss and undergrowth, the baying of hunting hounds sounds, followed by the long strides of their masters. As storm clouds cover the sky, the forest is no longer a realm of bedtime stories or folk tales. It becomes the province of the Wild Hunt.

The tradition of the Wild Hunt originated among the firbolgs, fey giants devoted to the moon and the Three Fates, personified by Sehanine (the Maiden), Melora (the Mother), and the Raven Queen (the Crone). The firbolgs call for a Wild Hunt when they seek to punish an oath breaker, for oaths are powerful things in the Feywild. Some mortals, their trust betrayed by the Unseelie fey, have learned to summon these eldritch hunters to bring down those who wronged them. A select few learn the ritual for summoning the hunters, but instead of asking for justice, request to learn the secrets of the Wild Hunt. Such requests are rarely accepted, but a worthy few learn the ways of the Wild Hunt, bringing retribution to all traitors and oath breakers.

实践天命 Living the Destiny

As a Wild Hunter, you live for the chase. Your quests revolve around tracking down and dispatching oath breakers, either on behalf of those wronged by their failure, or simply to reestablish balance to the cosmos. As you bring down foe after foe, your prowess increases to the point that you turn your attention to the most infamous fey oath breaker—the evil goddess Lolth.

At first, you might have to settle for taking down her favored abyssal drow or her exarch. But the day nears when the clarions will call for the greatest of all Wild Hunts, and the Demon Queen of Spiders will feel that primal fear shared by all prey of the hunt.

21级：猎人之魂 Soul of the Hunter

As you channel the raw power of the Wild Hunt, your very being is changed to match the fey origin of those who created the hunt. Your body becomes stronger and your reflexes quicker, even as your senses expand to reveal everything around you in clear detail. No track is too faint, no lie too convincing.

Benefit: 你力量或敏捷增加2点

你的起源变为妖精界，意味着在考虑有关生物起源的效果时，你被视为妖精界生物

另外，你在洞察和侦查检定上获得+2加值

24级：猎人打击 Strike of the Hunter

Your prowess translates into unerring strikes, which inflict deep wounds on your foes. The sight and smell of your enemy's ebbing life force intoxicates you, driving you on.

Benefit: 选择一个你的遭遇攻击威能。每遭遇一次，当你以该威能命中一个敌人时，那攻击同时造成10点持续伤害（豁免终止）。另外，你对受到持续伤害的敌人具有战斗优势

26级：狩猎猎犬 Hounds of the Hunt

With a loud whistle, you can call forth a pair of hounds from the Wild Hunt to help you bring down difficult prey. The eyes of these powerful, blackfurred hounds flash with lightning, and their growls rumble with thunder as they surge toward your enemies. They obey your commands without hesitation, ferreting out prey and leaving it open to your strike.

30级：荒野狩猎化身 Avatar of the Wild Hunt

The Three Fates worshiped by the firbolgs watch you with a keen interest. When an enemy dares strike you down, the Three Fates intervene, giving you a chance to prove that you are not destined to fall yet. The power of the Wild Hunt rushes into your form, turning you into an avatar of its will.

Benefit: 每天一次，当你开始你的回合时生命值为0或更低，你变为荒野狩猎化身形态，直到遭遇结束。当你变为此形态时，你恢复等同于你重伤值的生命值，且你恢复此遭遇中你已使用过的每个遭遇攻击威能

当处于此形态下，你的近战触及增加1，且若你体型为中型或更小，则你变为大型。另外，当你使用随意攻击威能时，你掷出18-20即可造成重击

Topaz Crusader Epic Destiny.name: 黄玉十字军 Topaz Crusader
Topaz Crusader Epic Destiny.description:
治疗疯狂的唯一方法是切除它的腐败并摧毁它。

Prerequisite:

Constant pressure causes the Far Realm's corrupting influence to leak through even the smallest breaches into the natural world, spawning horrors that tear at the fabric of existence. These breaches represent some of the greatest dangers to the mortal realm, and generations of heroes have dedicated themselves to maintaining the integrity of the Far Realm's boundaries. Over a lifetime's adventuring, however, you have grown weary of this ultimately doomed effort.

For each fissure that is closed, two more open elsewhere. Worse, how many of the fault lines riddling creation remain undetected? The Far Realm relentlessly seeks to corrupt the mortal realm, but whereas most heroes seek only to defend against the Outside's malign influence, you have a better idea. You will turn the tide on the Far Realm by assaulting its borders, its creatures—its very nature. And if you cannot reshape the Far Realm with the benign influence of the natural world, you will destroy it utterly to eliminate the threat it represents.

不朽 Immortality

As your mortal life winds to its end, you push ever closer to your goal of eliminating the Far Realm's threat.

深入缺口 Into the Breach: Aberrant blood stains your weapons and armor. The horrors you have seen assail your memory, but you remain strong. Now is the time to carry the torch of purity against the hordes of corruption, finally driving back the tide that threatens all existence. Girding yourself in the protective energy contained in the psionic gemstone at your brow, you step out from this world, sounding one last battle cry as you carve a path of death and destruction into the heart of madness. You will end the Far Realm's threat even at the cost of your own life. In the centuries that follow, as the incursions of the unwholesome fade into myth, your spirit will find its reward.

21级：束于伟大 Bound to Greatness

Benefit: 你的体质或魅力属性增加2点。

21级：黄玉专注 Topaz Focus

Benefit: 你以冥想的方式保护自己不受异界的影响。你在AC上获得+1加值。你不会晕眩或被支配。你对异界生物的攻击在意志防御上获得+2加值，并且你在任何时候都知道离你5格内所有异界生物的位置。你不会给这些生物提供战斗优势，如果你攻击它们时它们有掩护或隐蔽，你对它们的攻击骰不会受到-2减值。

当你愿意时，此专注会在你的眉心处显现为一颗黄玉宝石。

24级：黄玉冥想 Topaz Meditation

Benefit: 你的专注会赋予你更多力量。你获得2个额外的灵能点，并在所有防御上获得+2加值，你不会定身或束缚，并且你可以无视变形效果。

26级：黄玉冠冕 Topaz Corona

30级：黄玉闪光 Topaz Flare

Benefit: 当你没有灵能点剩余时，你未强化的随意攻击威能在命中时为你提供增益。如果你的攻击骰是偶数，则你恢复2个灵能点。如果你的攻击骰是奇数，则你命中的目标受到5点额外心灵伤害。
Topaz Crusader Epic Destiny.requirements: 21级，任意灵能职业，「灵能强化」职业特性

Lord of Chaos Epic Destiny.name: 混沌之主 Lord of Chaos
Lord of Chaos Epic Destiny.description:
You incarnate a creative force that can shape the Elemental Chaos into continent-sized wonders and sculpt kingdoms. The multiverse itself is your canvas.

Prerequisite:

Long ago, an ancient race of mighty sorcerers abandoned the material world for the Elemental Chaos, drawn by the plane's infinite mutability. These were the Reigar, a humanlike people who revered personal freedom, expression, and artistry above all other values. In time they mastered the secrets of immortality and became a race of godlings in mortal form—self-centered, capricious, driven only by the desire to experience new sensations and outdo each other in creative works. Foreseeing that their race would eventually dwindle and stagnate, the Reigar created one last masterwork of cooperative magic: a sentient, self-guiding force that would seek out the most brilliant and worthy souls among mortals and gift them with the powers of the Reigar, thus renewing the race across the ages.

In the course of your mortal adventures, you have developed into that one person in a million who embodies the exquisitely rare mix of brilliance, beauty, willfulness, and creativity that characterizes the immortal ranks of the Reigar. The ancient lore of the Reigar has revealed itself to you and given you the ability to shape the world to suit your whims.

实践天命 Living the Destiny

Few of your kind remain anywhere in the multiverse. You and your kindred souls are not mortals, nor gods, nor elemental beings; you are something else. As a Lord of Chaos, you might commit yourself to shaping a vast swath of the elemental plane into a domain of your own. You or your descendants could rule over an extraplanar kingdom forged by your will and imagination. Or you might choose to roam the multiverse, immersing yourself in every interest and experience that catches your eye. Whatever path you take, you eventually leave your adventuring career behind, drawn by the challenge of shaping and ordering your own private universe.

21级：觉醒 Awakening

An intangible mantle of power begins to gather around you, and you awaken to the realization that you are more than the mortal you once were.

Benefit: 你的魅力属性增加2，且你的起源变为星界

另外，你获得一个沙克蒂（shakti），一个象征着你的小型雕像或信物外形的古老莱格尔（Reigar）工具。以一个次要动作，你可以把它转变为+5魔法武器，魔法法器，魔法护甲或防御护符（26级时为+6）。如果沙克蒂离开你身上或因某些原因被摧毁，则它变成粉末。你能以一个次要动作再次生成它，且它以你希望的形态出现在你身上。

24级：疾速轮回 Rapid Reincarnation

You can recover from mortal injury by making your body disincarnate, briefly relinquishing your physical form, and then re-creating it shortly afterward anywhere near where you fell.

Benefit: 每天一次，当你将要做一次死亡豁免检定时，你可以改为选择成为灵体。你的身体消失在金色光尘之中，在1分钟至1小时之后，然后你可以在任何1英里内的地方重生。重生后你的生命值等同于你的重伤值

26级：造物奇想 Whim of Creation
