With sufficient time and concentration, any sentient creature can effect minor changes to its surroundings in the Elemental Chaos. You can achieve much wider results with a moment’s thought, regardless of where you happen to be.

30级：混沌大师 Master of Chaos

Unseen currents of power surge throughout the Elemental Chaos, and are preserved—frozen—in the matter of the mortal world too. You sense these currents and exploit them in combat by teleporting yourself or your foe along them.

Benefit: 当你重伤一个敌人或对一个敌人造成重击时，你能以一个自由动作传送你自己或该敌人最多10格

Adamantine Soldier Epic Destiny.name: 坚定战士 Adamantine Soldier
Adamantine Soldier Epic Destiny.description:
你像世界的根基一样坚固。没有什么能打垮你，永远。

Prerequisite:

Throughout your career, you have been an unstoppable force in heavy armor. In your coat of metal, you have stood against the weapons and powers of creatures that could lay waste to cities. In the end, your armor might have been a little worse for wear, and maybe you were, too. But still you stood unbowed.

You know that armor is more than just a piece of equipment. It's a second skin, and it's the face you show the world. You've made it a hallmark of your legend. When your helmed silhouette appears on the horizon, your admirers take hope and your enemies quail. Those same folk might fail to recognize your face, but they easily identify your superhuman shell.

不朽？ Immortality?

The adamantine warrior must prove the hardest of fighters. Your saga might make you an eternal symbol, your armor's distinctive shape and markings burned into the world's iconography. Already, people hold you up as the exemplar of the soldier who is unbreakable in body and spirit.

装甲典仪 Armored Icon: When you complete your final quest, you stand as an immaculate example of the knight in shining armor. All armored warriors throughout time recall your story. Your armored form is the ultimate gauge by which all other armored juggernauts measure themselves.

To become this icon of indestructibility, you must stand fast in your last battle. You cannot fall, give in to pain, or break in any way. Prove that your armor is like your skin, and your skin is like your armor. It can't slow you down; instead, it holds you up; Unbreakable, you carry each other into fable. Perhaps your armor even takes you to the side of a deity, such as Kord, who forever holds you up as an exarch of glorious and fearless battle. You then become the patron saint of all such warriors.

Your name becomes synonymous with toughness and resilience. It develops into a word with which fighters compliment one another for bold exploits in heavy armor. When you hear echoes of your name spoken in the world, you pound your gauntlet-clad fist to your breastplate. You know that those who aspire to be like you hear the ringing sound with spiritual ears and take heart.

21级：至高铠甲 Armor Supermacy

Benefit: 当你穿着重甲时，你在AC上获得+2加值。你同时无视重甲通常会带来的检定减值和速度减值。

24级：坚硬表皮 Unbreakable Skin

Benefit: 当你穿着重甲时，你获得等同于你体质调整值的全伤害抗力。

26级：无阻前行 Inexorable Advance

30级：难以杀死 Hard to Kill

Benefit: 每天一次，你能将你刚刚掷出的任何豁免骰视作你掷出了20。

Diamond Soul Epic Destiny.name: 金刚之魂 Diamond Soul
Diamond Soul Epic Destiny.description:
流经你的灵能之力不仅仅是武器。它是你灵魂的精华。

Prerequisite:

At a young age, you knew that the monastic traditions of the fighting monks were your calling. As a youth, you watched the initiates practice and spotted errors in their technique. When you first presented yourself to the masters, their amusement at your observations turned to astonishment. Time and again, you were proven right. The masters expected ever more from you as they took you under their tutelage, putting the most daunting tasks and grueling training regimens before you. Again and again, you overcame these challenges.

Others have displayed this same talent, but few have achieved the same level of mastery. You stand on the brink of the final steps of your studies. True, you were the best student in your class, but you know enough of the fighting arts to understand how little you truly know.

Your greatest tests lie ahead of you. Will you finally achieve the ultimate mastery you seek, or will you find that your skills are less than perfect?

不朽 Immortality

Life, death, fame, and power mean little to you. All monks seek to attain perfect mastery of their fighting art, and you are one of the few to achieve it. Your task done, you have little use for the material world.

完美大师 Perfect Master: The lore you study transcends such trifling mortal concerns as the material body or the spark of life. When you have attained perfect mastery, you join the tiny group of monks who have founded new psionic philosophies. Monasteries sprout across the planes to study your teachings and pass them from generation to generation.

21级：金刚之躯 Diamond Body

Benefit: 你的敏捷属性增加2点。此外，你不再衰老。

21级：完美武僧 Monastic Perfection

Benefit: 选择两个等于或低于你等级的武僧遭遇攻击威能。这两个威能成为你的储备威能。每当你短休息，你可以将你的一个武僧遭遇攻击威能换成同等级或更低的储备威能。每次你升级，你可以改变你的储备威能。

24级：完美移动 Moving Perfection

Benefit: 你在速度上获得+2加值，并且当你快步时，你可以快步额外1格。

26级：完美技巧 Flawless Maneuver

30级：完美金刚 Diamond Perfection

Benefit: 每轮一次，当你以武僧攻击失手时，你可以重骰那个攻击骰。

Prison of the Winds Epic Destiny.name: 狂风监牢 Prison of the Winds
Prison of the Winds Epic Destiny.description:
你是宇宙中少数被召唤来囚禁荒神厄尔-凯特（Heur-Ket）的残余精华的存在之一。你的命运，和这个荒神的命运，现在被绑在一起，直到永远，或直到你消亡。

Prerequisite:

你早已知道自己注定要完成一项伟大的使命，但与你那些追寻自己命运的同伴不同，你知道，你的命运会选择你。当你进入赫斯塔瓦的风暴之眼Eye of the Storm时，一丝荒神的残余精华进入了你的身体，就像在此之前的千百年间进入了其他强大的存在一样。你成为了狂风监牢，也许你的命运是最终摧毁荒神厄尔-凯特，也许你的命运正如某些人担心的那样，你最终会释放厄尔-凯特，让它对众星之海重新发起攻击。这之中有巨大的风险。你并不是第一个担此重任之人，但之前的那些人都被厄尔-凯特那不断翻涌的精华所蕴含的毁灭性混沌彻底摧毁。那么多人都失败了，你能幸免吗？

不朽，毁灭或命运的代理人 Immortal Destruction or Agent of Destiny

仅仅承担厄尔-凯特的一部分精华就使你成为了命运的代理人，成为了神祇和荒神之间的永恒冲突的其中一部分。两者的代理人都试图将你推向他们所期望的方向。赫斯塔瓦的神祇及其仆从，甚至是天使、吉斯洋基人、恶魔等众星之海的其他力量，都试图将你的行动引向荒神的毁灭。

整个过程中，你都处于一种短暂的融合状态。只要你持有这份精华，你就能从中获得力量，但它会逐渐侵蚀你的身体、生命力和灵魂，直到你最终完成你的命运。

厄尔-凯特的毁灭 Destruction of Heur-Ket: 如果你选择正确的道路，行正确之事，践行正确的预言，你可以摧毁这个荒神的剩余精华。风暴之眼会逐渐减弱，最终完全消散，艾恩会召唤你加入她的知识界cognoscenti作为其中尊贵的一员。

厄尔-凯特复活 Resurrection of Heur-Ket: 选择不当，或者被偏向荒神的一方所左右，你最终可能会释放厄尔-凯特的精华，从而导致这个危险的荒神复活。

终极毁灭 Ultimate Destruction: 与之前的许多人一样，囚禁哪怕是荒神一部分精华的重担已经产生了影响。当你的身体最终被其力量侵蚀时，你至少可以安慰自己没有让它复活，作为少数试图驯服这这几乎不可能巡抚的厄尔-凯特的风暴之力的人之一，你将被永远铭记。

21级：厄尔-凯特之精华 Essence of Heur-Ket

Benefit: 你的体质和敏捷属性增加2点，并在速度上获得+2加值。

24级：风暴潮涌 Storm Surge

Benefit: 每天第一次，当你的生命值降至0或更低时，你可以花费一个回复力（不需要动作），或者若你没有回复力剩余，获得等同于你体质值的生命值。之后，你能推离所有离你5格内的生物等同于你体质调整值的格数并将它们击倒。

26级：厄尔-凯特之怒火 Fury of Heur-Ket

30级：风暴形态 Storm Form

Benefit: 当你重伤时，你具有虚体。当你不再重伤时，你不再具有虚体。

Marshal of Letherna Epic Destiny.name: 莱得纳元帅 Marshal of Letherna
Marshal of Letherna Epic Destiny.description:
You are a principal commander in the armies of death, preserving the citadel's sanctity and supporting the Raven Queen's rule. Her servants and power are yours to command, and just as your foes fear death, they will learn to fear you.

Prerequisite:

Letherna lies deep in the Shadowfell, far beyond the reach of most mortals. This bastion of the Raven Queen is seen only by the spirits of the dead and by the privileged retainers and bodyguards of the god of death. Those loyal to the Raven Queen stand ready to defend her citadel's frost-covered walls from any threat.

Ages ago, when the Raven Queen struck down the dread god Nerull, the other deities crafted a pact that changed the nature of the gods' relationship with death. To prevent the recently ascended queen from hoarding the spirits of the dead as her own personal army, the pact stipulated that the Raven Queen would be the god of death but not god of the dead, serving as a custodian of the natural cycle of life and death. In return, the gods would allow the Raven Queen to enlist their own followers to aid her worshipers in the defense of her realm. This arrangement suited the Raven Queen, herself an ascended mortal, who preferred to deal with mortals more than with the uncaring powers of the Astral Sea.

That call of duty has sounded again. The armies of Letherna have need of commanders, and only the greatest heroes can be entrusted with the sanctity of the afterlife. With grim determination, the Marshals of Letherna pick up the Raven Queen's banner and stand fast in the defense of her bastion.

实践天命 Living the Destiny

The Marshals of Letherna are given command over the upper echelons of the Raven Queen's entourage, facing down the threats to her power and to the cosmic balance she upholds. You will stand on the battlements of that great fortress, raining your deity’s blessings down on the demons, godlings, and elemental forces that crash against Letherna's gates. When the time comes to finally put down the threats against the god of death, you will lead the strike force.

Of all the dangers to Letherna, none rank higher than Orcus, Demon Prince of Undeath. His ultimate goal is to sit on the Raven Queen's throne, subverting the natural order so that every creature that dies becomes undead. As you defend your dark mistress, a confrontation with Orcus seems all but inevitable.

21级：宣誓职责 Sworn to Duty

Your mind and body are infused with the power of Letherna, steeling you with an unbreakable resolve

Benefit: 你选择的一个属性值增加2点

另外，你免疫魅惑和恐惧效果，且你在死亡豁免检定上获得等同于2 + 离你10格内的莱得纳元帅盟友数量的加值

24级：莱得纳军团 Legions of Letherna

As battle rages, you can call the armies of Letherna to your side. Shadow creatures congregate near you to hamper the movements of your enemies and allow you to control the battlefield.

Benefit: 当你清醒时，敌人将离你2格内的格子视为困难地形。你能以一个次要动作结束或恢复此效果

26级：悲痛号角 Clarion of Sorrow

The sorrow that is the heart of the Raven Queen's legacy is yours to command, letting you forge a link to the power of death.

30级：生死守卫者 Defenderof Life and Death

One of the Raven Queen's mysterious servants watches over you. This pale raven with deep blue eyes has the deity's permission to guide souls back to their bodies and overload them with divine vitality.

Benefit: 每天一次，当你生命值降到0或更低时，一只苍白的渡鸦会引导你的灵魂回到你的身体。你恢复等同于你重伤值的生命值，能以一个自由动作起身，且能以一个自由动作使用一个随意攻击威能

Godhunter Epic Destiny.name: 猎神者 Godhunter
Godhunter Epic Destiny.description:
如果它流血，那么你能杀了它。如果它还没流血，那么你可以让它流血，然后杀了它。

Prerequisite:

面对现实吧——你是一个杀手。这并不一定使你成为一个坏人。有些生物需要被杀死，这最终对大家都好，而且你特别擅长终结他人。

你不仅是一个王牌杀手，而且你还总是能干掉硬点子而出名。无论敌人多么强大，你总能找到办法，用刀或用弓将其送入死地。命运选择了你，让你成为有能力杀死比你更强悍的人的人。

你的盟友依赖你的致命艺术。警惕的对手会采取机动措施以避免给你带来优势。普通人和位面居民将你的名字与快速死亡划上等号。

不朽？ Immortality?

你的名字已经成为传奇，你的名字和你无情的战斗风格，将永远存在。你的对手很少能在与你的宿命之战中幸存下来，但你可能会在自己的宿命之战后继续活着。

敏锐动机 Keen Motivation: 你迎接了你最大的挑战，看看谁死了，谁没死。证据就在坟墓里。在那些有类似凡人出身的人中，你是宇宙中最伟大的杀手。也许有一两个神祗的技巧可以与之相比。也许吧。

坚持下去，搅动宇宙并不是一个坏主意。强大的凡人、神明、恶魔领主和荒神都可能变得自满或傲慢。最坏的人在他们自己的领域里满足地休息，要么停止做他们应该做的事，要么开始做他们不应该做的事。有你在身边，没有人能够轻松地休息。

凡人的恐怖有一种激发决定性变化的方式，而你有一种尖锐的方式来唤起这样的恐惧。并不是说你需要特别威胁谁。只是可以让人知道，你有一个特定的行程。作为一个自由人，你没有让任何实体在你的致命威胁下感到安全。

即使是一点点的催促，也一定会成为进步的助力。你可能正是这个世界所需要的不按套路出牌，以保持权力的正确平衡和事务的顺利进行。

21级：超然追猎者 Peerless Predator

Benefit: 每遭遇一次，你能重骰一个对比你等级更高的生物的攻击骰。

24级：神明之痛 Deific Agony

Benefit: 当你对一个比你等级更高的生物造成重击，那个生物在豁免检定上受到-5减值，且不能恢复生命值，也不能充能任何威能，直到你下一回合结束。

26级：致命之眼 Deicidal Eye

30级：渎神恢复 Blasphemous Recovery

Benefit: 每天一次，当你被一个等级高于你的生物攻击命中，你能选择将那次攻击视为失手，并且你恢复回气和一个在此遭遇中使用过的遭遇威能的使用。

Winter Sovereign Epic Destiny.name: 凛冬君主 Winter Sovereign
Winter Sovereign Epic Destiny.description:
冰雪是你的仆人，因为你是凛冬的统治者。

Prerequisite:

妖精荒野中最伟大的力量是至高妖精，他们是强大而明智的光明回响的守护者，也是居住在这些土地上的野性和自由精神的君主。每个至高妖精都管理着妖精荒野的一个方面，对山脉、森林、仙境，甚至是季节本身。你一生的工作使你走上了加入这个严肃团体的道路，通过升华死亡，成为世界光明回响的不朽守护者。你未来的角色可能是任何东西，但你的命运是成为冰雪的主人，成为妖精荒野的冬季统治者。

当你意识到你有一天会过上这样的生活时，你就把自己的努力倾注在了解妖精荒野和它的居民上，同时也努力掌握你将必须挥舞的元素。你可能在现任冬皇或冬后手下学习，或者你可能暗中谋划篡位，从你的对手手中夺取权力，这都是为了在命运的那一刻，你将取代君主，在黑暗的季节里为自己争取权益。无论你如何学习这种力量，你对冬季冰冷力量的掌握只会越来越强。

不朽 Immortality

虽然会有冬去春来，但你知道春天要向夏天投降，而夏天也必须在秋天面前低头。最后，冬天总会回来。

季节的流逝 Passage of the Seasons: 当你面对你的竞争者时，最后的考验来临了。在击败敌人的过程中，你赢得了成为下一任冬季统治者的权利，你的宫廷将在妖精荒野中等待你。胜利之后，你很快就放弃了凡间，在秋去冬来、北风凛冽之时，投入了妖精荒野。本能地，你知道你的冰雪宫殿在哪里等着你。你穿过了妖精荒野，当秋天的仆人向你拥有的新权柄而鞠躬时，当你找到大城堡时，你接受了冬天的冠冕，开始了你作为冬天统治者的统治。

作为一位至高妖精，你指挥那些忠于冬天的人，管理他们并保护他们不受敌人的伤害。你的力量随着季节的流逝而消长，当夏季转为秋季时，你会变得更加强大，当冬季到来时，你会发挥出全部潜力，随着白昼的延长，冰雪的消退，雪花的融化，你的力量会逐渐减弱。这种循环赋予了你不朽的生命，每年当冬天的触角落在大地上时，就会消除时间的影响。因此，你想统治多久就统治多久，直到你准备好将王冠传给你的继承人，并永远离开凡世。

21级：无尽余寒 Lingering Cold

Benefit: 当你用寒冰攻击命中目标时，它失去寒冰抗力（如果有），直到你下一回合结束。此外，你用带有寒冰关键词的攻击威能命中的敌人，在为结束这些威能所产生的任何效果而进行的豁免检定上会受到-2减值。每次一个敌人对这些效果的豁免检定上失败，该敌人就会获得10点寒冰易伤，直到你下一回合结束。

24级：凛冬之噬 Winter's Bite

Benefit: 你选择一个每日威能，如果该威能还没有寒冰关键字，则获得它。如果那个威能造成一种特定类型的伤害（火焰，闪电，暗蚀等等）那么此威能可以同时造成寒冰和那些伤害类型（寒冰和火焰，寒冰和闪电，寒冰和暗蚀，等等）。在一次短休息后，你能选择一个不同的每日威能获得此增益。此外，当你用带有寒冰关键字的威能命中至少一个目标时，直到你下一回合结束，你能以一个次要动作传送5格。

26级：霜雾铠甲 Rime Armor

30级：冰封 Frozen in Ice

Benefit: 每天一次，当一个生物对抗由你用带有寒冰关键字的威能造成的效果豁免检定失败时，以一个自由动作，你能让目标束缚（豁免终止）。如果那个目标在对抗此束缚状态的豁免检定中失败，则改为目标被石化（豁免终止）。

Mind Lord of the Order Epic Destiny.name: 灵团主宰 Mind Lord of the Order
Mind Lord of the Order Epic Destiny.description:
一个不平衡的精神就像最鲁莽的亵渎者一样具有破坏性和危害性。

Prerequisite:

Through self-training or extensive study, you have learned to control psionic energy and wield it in a responsible and careful fashion. As you mastered your art, you realized that many are reckless with their talents. Like arcane magic, psionic power harbors the potential to unleash incalculable destruction. To avert catastrophe, you realized that any who dabble in these mysterious techniques must be watched, guided, and taught to control their talents.

Your revelation and growing power attracted the Order, an ancient society of psionic adepts who stand apart from the land's struggles. The Order is concerned only with maintaining balance among those who wield psionic power. As a member of the Order, you have dedicated your life to ensuring that those who wield psionic magic use their power responsibly and with restraint.

不朽 Immortality

As your exploits grow, you gain honor among other members of the Order. In time, they come to recognize you as foremost among them. Your power, wisdom, and temperance represent everything that a member of the Order should aspire to. As you face increasingly dangerous challenges, you recognize a greater destiny than containing the reckless use of psionic power.

灵能军团 Psionic Legions: Having accomplished all you set out to do, you are free to turn your attention toward shepherding the world into a brighter future. You believe that the key to correcting Athas's course lies through psionic power. Among the populace, you foster respect and discipline for psionic magic, ushering in a new age of psionic mastery that can break the sorcerer-kings' rule and free the world from their destructive influence.

21级：灵团主宰护甲 Mind Lord's Armor

Benefit: 你获得15点心灵抗力。

21级：秩序启迪 Ordered Enlightenment

Benefit: 你的智力和感知属性都增加2点。

24级：灵团主宰投影 Mind Lord's Projection

Benefit: 每当你的生命值降至0或更低时，你可以将你的意念投影到离你10格内一个自愿的盟友身上。你的身体仍然会受到影响，但当你投影在宿主的身体上时，你会忽略这些影响。相反，你会受到你的宿主身体的任何影响，尽管你不会受到它所承受的伤害。你的身体仍然在死亡，所以它继续受到伤害，并像往常一样进行死亡豁免。如果你的身体死亡，你也会死亡。如果你的宿主身体死亡，你可以将你的意念投影到你当前宿主10格内的另一个自愿的盟友身上。当你的身体不再濒死或死亡时，你就会回到你的身体。

当你投影在盟友的身体里时，你占据了他的空间，但在其他方面继续像你自己一样行动，使用同样的先攻，并能使用你的职业特性、威能、技能、专长、灵能点等等。你使用你自己的攻击加值、技能加值、伤害加值等等，但你仍然必须满足你的威能或专长的任何要求（但不是先决条件）。如果你有一个造成[W]伤害的威能，你的宿主身体所持用的武器决定了这个值。你继续获得你的魔法物品增强加值和特性的好处，但你不能使用这些物品的威能。

26级：同步精神 Synchronous Minds

30级：灵能贮藏 Psionic Reservoir

Benefit: 在遭遇中你第一次开始回合但没有灵能点时，你恢复6个灵能点。
Mind Lord of the Order Epic Destiny.requirements: 21级，任意使用灵能点的灵能职业

Dispossesed ​Champion.name: 流浪者领袖 Dispossesed ​Champion
Dispossesed ​Champion.description:
你带领支离破碎的人民进入繁荣的新时代。

Prerequisite:

The Last War's scars are felt deeply. Cities and nations still reel from the ravages of the terrible conflict. Khorvaire and its inhabitants bear visible signs of the suffering wrought by the war. Countless peoples are still adrift, searching for a home and a purpose. The Prophecy chose you to lead these people, to guide them to a new homeland and into a future free from strife and torment. You were chosen to be their champion, to defend them from a callous world that has forgotten or dismissed them.

You might have become aware of fate's plan for you early in your career, or you could have come to your mission late. Your destiny could be the culmination of unrelated events and experiences that led you to bind yourself to a chosen people. Now you have become a champion of a dispossessed people, and you intend to bring hope to them through your leadership.

不朽 Immortality

Long after you die, your name will live on as a symbol of heroism and hope in the hearts of those you champion. When you select this epic destiny, choose a group of forsaken or broken people, such as Cyrans, shifters, members of House Phiarlan, warforged, tieflings, or any other dispossessed group. You need not yourself be a member of this group. As the campaign progresses through the epic tier, seek opportunities to help your people and to strengthen their presence in the world.

预言英雄 Hero of Prophecy: Your chosen people have long believed that a hero would come and lead them from oblivion. Fragments from the Draconic Prophecy and from the visions of mystics predicted your coming. When you accepted the champion's mantle, your mission and purpose became clear, and you have since sought every opportunity to help your people. Your efforts might culminate in a final battle against your people's principal enemies. In your enemies' defeat, you can attain the salvation that you have long sought. Your people might raise you up as a king or a queen, or perhaps you will instead simply ascend into their cultural consciousness as a savior. Regardless, your trials will be retold in stories and songs for millennia until in memory you become something more than mortal. To your people, you will remain an eternal symbol of hope and a promise of a better future.

21级：领导胜利 Lead to Victory

Benefit: 每次你快步时，在你视线范围内的所有盟友都能以一个自由动作快步和你相同的格数。盟友必须在快步结束时更靠近你。

24级：领导重任 Burden of Leadership

Benefit: 每当敌人的攻击重伤一位邻近你的盟友时，你能花费一个回复力让那位盟友恢复生命值，如同他花费了一个回复力。

26级：传奇防御 Legendary Defense

30级：职责所驱 Driven by Duty

Benefit: 在一次长休后你的生命值首次降至0或更低时，你能以一个即时中断花费一个回复力。所有能看到你的盟友恢复2d6生命值。超出盟友最大生命值的数值会成为临时生命值。

Dragon King Epic Destiny.name: 龙王 Dragon King
Dragon King Epic Destiny.description:
你亵渎之路的体现，即使是最强大的亵渎者在你新的、致命的形式面前也显得苍白。

Prerequisite:

你总是想要什么就拿什么，尤其是在魔法领域。力量是为强者准备的——为那些愿意获得并持有它而不择手段的人。只有弱者才会关心自己的晋升是否有分寸。传中的亵渎者，包括巫王，都知道必须在任何时候任何地点都要获取力量，不计代价。

这种黑暗的故事让你感到好奇，他们的言语暗示了阿塔斯最强大的亵渎者的终极转变。通过搜寻或者是发明，你找到了为实现这种转变所必要的仪式。也许你通过自己的独立和才智就找到了解法。又或者你站在前人的肩膀上，在他们的失败之上更进一步。无论如何，你再一次证明了你比之前的亵渎者都要更强。

不朽 Immortality

随着你的力量增长，你开始失去人的形态并呈现出巨龙的样子。在你力量最强时，你会转变为巨龙，获得他们龙类躯体所带有的神话力量。你的灵魂仍被束缚在鳞片之下，在你厌倦了存在之前保护你。

龙类升华 Draconic Ascension: 随着你的命运接近，你获得了为完成转变所需要的最后的冷血洞见。作为一条巨龙，你也许会创造一个与你的野心相称的领域。你也可以推翻那些小气的巫王，或者自己塑造成那些无知的人的神明。

21级：龙类亵渎 Draconian Defilement

Benefit: 当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.flzPqskd17NE4260]{奥术亵渎 Arcane Defiling}时，你的重骰在攻击上获得+2威能加值或在伤害骰上获得+6威能加值。

21级：龙类皮肤 Skin of the Dragon

Benefit: 你获得昏暗视觉，并在威吓检定上获得+2加值。另外，你获得5点生命值，并将你的体质调整值加到你的回复力值上。

24级：龙类转化 Draconic Transformation

Benefit: 你获得飞行速度8并能说龙语。同时，在智力，力量和体质中选择两个。选择的属性都增加2点。

26级：龙类狂暴 Draconic Rampage

30级：龙类恐怖 Draconic Terror

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.cT8HqeB2Ma9DN13p]{尖刻吐息 Scathing Breath}威能。

此外，你可以在每个遭遇中使用一次@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.XAkEm15HCex6gaIt]{龙类狂暴 Draconic Rampage}，而不需要消耗其每日使用。当你这样做时，威能的效果会持续到你的下一回合结束，而不是直到遭遇结束。

Champion of Prophecy Epic Destiny.name: 龙喻英雄 Champion of Prophecy
Champion of Prophecy Epic Destiny.description:
没什么能阻止你。你为此而生。这就是你的本质。

Prerequisite:

Ever since you were young, you've had an instinctive sense that you were special. As you grew older and saw more of the world, you learned of the Draconic Prophecy, and you began to recognize that you have some part to play in it. You realized that the reason you felt special was because of your connection to the Prophecy.

You've discovered tangible, concrete indications of your role in the Prophecy. Your understanding of the Prophecy might be subtle (a whisper in your head that imparts prophetic guidance at key junctures in your life), or it might be overt (a reference to you in ancient texts that concern the Prophecy). Perhaps dragons pay you a visit to tell you of your role in the Prophecy.

Regardless of the way in which you learned of your destiny, you have embraced it. Your training has prepared you for the challenges you face, and woe betide anyone who stands in your way. You are an agent of fate, a representative of prophecy, and one can no sooner hold you back than stop time from passing.

不朽 Immortality

Your ascendancy to immortality is as much a collective experience as an individual one.

龙喻代行者 Agent of the Prophecy: Bound to the Draconic Prophecy, you are a pivotal part in a narrative that stretches forward and backward. Those who study the Prophecy will know your name, and you will inspire the actions of future champions of prophecy. You will move forward the events of the Draconic Prophecy, and when the Prophecy reaches its conclusion, you will have been a tangible part of it.

21级：祝福之喻 Prophetic Blessing

Benefit: 你的力量，体质或敏捷属性增加2点，你的智力，魅力或感知属性增加2点。

21级：无休之喻 Unstoppable Prophecy

Benefit: 当你在死亡豁免上失败时，你在攻击骰上获得+2加值直到遭遇结束。

24级：重击时刻 Critical Juncture

Benefit: 每当你重击时，你能花费一个回复力。

26级：必然之喻 Prophetic Certainty

30级：延续之喻 Prophetic Renewal

Benefit: 每次你抵达一个里程碑，你能恢复一个已消耗的每日攻击威能而不是获得一个行动点。

Draconic Incarnation Epic Destiny.name: 龙之化身 Draconic Incarnation
Draconic Incarnation Epic Destiny.description:
你的体内承载着一位强大的、远古巨龙的灵魂，以凡人的形式重生。

Prerequisite:

在很久以前，远在时间的迷雾之中，远古巨龙掌握了奥术魔法力量，并运用这种力量塑造他们周围的世界。在那些最初的、黑暗的时间里，世界是一个原始的地方，这些龙对他们所看到的一切都拥有统治权。如今被认为是古老的种族，例如矮人和精灵，相比较于这些巨龙施法者的巅峰时刻，也只不过孩童。现实的结构被这些巨龙重塑，巨龙们用他们的奥术力量编织了他们周身的世界。

那些无穷力量的时光并没有永续，很快，这些强大的巨龙术士们衰落了。因为自私的守护着自己的奥术学识，很少有龙将他们学到的东西传授给其他龙。随着时间的推移，这些巨龙沦落为不为人知的传说。他们的法术魔法知识同样从世间消失。现在，数千年后的今天，大法师和贤者们偶尔会发现与这些巨龙有关的知识碎片，或许还能掌握一到两个巨龙的本领。然而，即便是最强大的巫师，和远古施法巨龙相比，也不过是台上的小丑罢了。

现在，命运的齿轮再次转动，那些死去已久的巨龙灵魂发现自己又回到了这个世界，这次是以较小的凡人生物的身体出现。虽然其他人可能会感受到来自灵魂深处的奥术魔法的召唤，但你却听到了你体内远古龙魂的低语。它哄骗你，引导你，并教授你。你不是一个安静的灵魂，而是一个等待释放的奥术知识的熊熊烈火。你的龙魂觉醒了，并回忆起统治目光所及的一切时的感觉。

不朽 Immortality

你自己的灵魂是一条远古巨龙，它寻求恢复以前的力量，并想要将你作为一个容器。

巨龙显现 Draconic Manifestation: 你已经听从了你内心深处远古巨龙的低语。宇宙的秘密在你面前展开，现在你的身心都已经准备好迎接即将到来的转变。剩下的就是完成你的命定任务，这是你作为一个凡人的最终成就，预示着你体内的巨龙即将苏醒。一旦你的任务完成，巨龙之魂在你体内熊熊燃烧，你和巨龙之魂融为一体，超越你们两者之和。你可能外表看起来仍是凡类，但是如同影子般攀附在你身上的，是一条远古巨龙的强大灵魂。

21级：远古复苏 Ancient Resurgence

Benefit: 你的智力或魅力属性增加2点，并选择一个其他属性增加2点。

你同时能够流利的说，读，和写龙语。

24级：巨龙之魂 Spirit of the Dragon

Benefit: 每日一次，当你死亡时，你体内的远古巨龙之魂涌现，保护你的身体直到你复活。这个巨龙之魂受你控制，并且拥有和你一样的数据和能力，除了以下例外：巨龙之魂为大型体型，拥有你的最大生命值，并且同时具有虚体和相位移动。这个巨龙之魂共享你的威能和能力（它没有自己的威能池），它能使用你的魔法物品如同它正在持用他们，包括武器和法器。

在遭遇结束时，如果该巨龙之魂有任何生命值剩余，则该灵魂消散，且在短休息后你复活并带有1点生命值。若你的身体被摧毁，则巨龙之魂无法复活你。

26级：巨龙形态 Draconic Form

作为你对内在力量不断增长的理解的一部分，你已经学会了如何汲取你的巨龙灵魂的力量，并呈现出更适合其威严的形式。

30级：远古秘法师 Ancient Arcanist

Benefit: 从任意职业选择两个25级（或更低）的奥术每日威能 。你获得这些威能。

Dragonheart Epic Destiny.name: 龙之心 DragonHeart
Dragonheart Epic Destiny.description:
你是龙之心——锻于火，淬于血，砺于鳞。

Prerequisite:

龙类不仅仅是一种怪物。它无所畏惧，充满力量，几乎不受任何影响，体现了一个战士应该具备的一切。你努力模仿着这些生物，渴望成为与龙同样的人。

你的成就让你身居高位，而你的名声射下巨大的阴影。你的敌人惧怕你的凶残。盟友和敌人都声称你拥有一颗巨龙的心。你对攻击满不在乎，轻松地在敌军中开辟自己的道路。不管对手怎么对付你，你都能在威胁面前站稳跟脚。你的成就和胜利增添了你的传奇色彩，你的勇气和战斗力让各个位面上的人们敬畏。

不朽 Immortality

坚韧是龙之心的标志。你漫长的旅途使你变得坚强，并教会你摆脱武器和咒语的攻击。当你的最终任务临近完成时，你会采取越发大胆的行动。恐惧可能削弱一个较为弱小的英雄，但反而会更加激励你。

龙之后裔 Dragon's Scion: 在你这辈子最艰难的战斗中，你以前所未有的方式战斗。你的心跳加速，砰砰跳动的声响与你武器的每一击契合。当你发动最后一击并将死亡带给敌人时，一种全新的意识笼罩了你。你一直怀疑龙的血液在你的血管里燃烧，而最终任务的完成消除了你所有残存的疑惑。终于，你向先祖证明了你的价值。

你的心跳变得越来越急促有力直到你觉得再也无法忍受它。过了一会，你的容貌发生了变化，彰显你巨龙天性的鳞浮现出来。你的人形躯体消失，起而代之的是雄伟的巨龙形态。伴随着闪亮的鳞片和强劲的双翼，你展现出你所赢得的力量和威严。虽然你没有得到真正的不朽，但你以你一直渴望的形态过着新的生活，求得新的胜利，直到你的生命结束。

21级：龙之精神 Dragon Spirit

Benefit: 你的体质增加2点

每当敌人对你施加魅惑或恐惧效果时，你可以立即做一次豁免检定来结束此效果，即使它通常不可豁免终止。如果此效果是持续的，例如灵气，则成功的豁免检定意味着你不受该效果的影响，直到你下一回合结束，那时你可以重复此豁免检定。

24级：龙之血脉 Dragon Blood

Benefit: 当你在遭遇中第一次重伤时，你获得等同于你重伤值的临时生命值。

26级：龙之护盾 Dragon Shield

30级：龙之灵魂 Dragon Soul

Benefit: 你的回复力值增加10。

Fatesinger Epic Destiny.name: 命运歌者 Fatesinger
Fatesinger Epic Destiny.description:
英雄之歌在你的灵魂中产生了共鸣。在你能够加入那合唱之前，你要与世界分享其音乐的奇迹。

Prerequisite:

在最黑暗的，神明与荒神的神圣之战时期，当那些湮没的使者将要破坏神圣的杰作并瓦解创造本身时，众神的使者齐声歌唱以激励凡世的英雄们进行反击。他们的歌声能使普通人成为英雄，让他们坚定不移的抵御来自敌人的浪潮。这些远古的先驱们仍然活在后世的传说与故事之中，他们的歌声曾经避免了世界被终结。

你研究过英雄之歌，你知道所有伟大的英雄仍然能听到它的旋律，即使他们自身没有意识到，但在某些时候会和你一样，捕捉到某个微弱的音节。这首古老歌谣的遥远旋律隐藏在每一首振奋人心的曲调和铸成英雄史诗的召唤之中，若隐若现。它指引着每一位勇者超越自身平凡，迈入传奇的命运。

不朽 Immortality

你已经听到了那首古老歌曲中萦绕的旋律。在那一刻，当创造之语在宇宙的和谐中回荡时，你此生的目标和最终命运变得清晰。现在，你的任务改变，你将要致力于梳理这首古老歌谣的片段，并将其复原，重新写成篇章，让英雄之歌回响于世间，以此来勉励新的英雄对抗创世之敌，守护世界的未来。

永恒和声 The Eternal Chorus: 当你终于完成你的命定任务时，光荣的歌谣变得明晰，让每一个原本难以观测的音符都以正确的顺序排列。第一次，你可以完整的演奏英雄之歌。歌曲的纯净性将会溶解你的形体，让你得以加入昔日歌者的队列中，你的音调与他们的合唱共鸣，英雄之歌将被传颂至永恒。

21级：实现命运 Destiny Fulfilled

Benefit: 你可以花费一个行动点让离你20格内的一个盟友以自由动作进行一次攻击，而不是你自己进行额外动作。若该盟友的攻击命中，则你恢复此行动点。

24级：明晰命运 Fate's Clarity

Benefit: 每当你使用你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.A6Cq1oigOmXUjr5H]{崇高之言 Majestic Word}威能时，目标可以在你下一回合开始前的所有攻击骰，豁免检定，技能检定和属性检定上掷骰两次并使用任一结果。

26级：乐曲断章 Fragment of the Song

30级：英雄赞歌 Heroic Inspiration

Benefit: 当离你5格内的一个盟友花费一个行动点进行攻击时，你和所有盟友能以一个自由动作花费一个回复力。

Lord of Fate Epic Destiny.name: 命运之主 Lord of Fate
Lord of Fate Epic Destiny.description:
对于每一个行为，都有一个同等和相反的回应。 命运的编织需要宇宙的平衡。

Prerequisite:

你已经掌握了所有的奥术学识。凭借着那些知识，你已经瞥见了一个世间真理：宇宙的平衡隐藏在所有事物之后，衡量着现存的能量，也许评判他们。生命，运动，错综复杂的存在本身也会参与到不断反馈的交战力量之中，但是这场战争被平衡精巧地协调了。

你对这种平衡的理解影响着你的行为。看到在所有事情上需要节制，你寻求抑制火热的激情和令人心碎的执着。如果你攻击邪恶势力，或与混乱作斗争，你这样做只是为了使对手回到与美德和秩序平衡的状态。你接受生命必须包括绝望和欢乐，包括美丽和恐怖。

你正在成为平衡的代理人——宇宙支点的活生生的范例。

不朽？ Immortality?

当最后一口凡人的呼吸从你的肺部逸出时，你来之不易的知识，即生与死是永恒的双胞胎，充满了你消散的感知。在那一瞬间，你的灵魂闪现在多元宇宙中，超出了诸神或自然秩序的掌握。你作为一个凡人所感觉到的力量，即万物背后潜在的宇宙平衡，接受你为它的一部分。你被转化为该宇宙平衡的一个有生命的化身。它渗透到存在中，你也一样。你的知识增加了一千倍。宇宙的未来平衡就在你手中。

21级：转向 Turnabout

Benefit: 当你在遭遇开始的时候掷先攻时，你指定你视线内的一个生物作为你「转向」特性的目标直到遭遇结束。在遭遇中有一次，当该目标的攻击对你视线内的盟友施加一个可以豁免终止的效果，你能以一个即时反应将同样的效果施加于目标，直到目标的下一回合结束。

24级：均衡之和 Balanced Sum

Benefit: 每天一次，当一个敌人的攻击将你的生命值降至0或更低时，你在结算伤害后恢复等同于你回复力值的生命值。另外，你获得等同于将你的生命值降至0或更低的伤害值的临时生命值。

26级：中庸之道 Golden Mean

30级：力量支点 Fulcrum of Power

Benefit: 当你被一个可充能的攻击威能伤害时，直到你对它做出一次攻击骰，攻击生物不能充能那个威能。

Magister Epic Destiny.name: 魔导师 Magister
Magister Epic Destiny.description:
魔法流经你，就像它流经世界一样。 曾经流过你的魔法永远属于你。

Prerequisite:

Your reputation as a powerful spellcaster has only grown in the telling, perhaps sometimes even outpacing your actual abilities. Indeed, some credulous few have gone so far as to call you the "mouth of magic", implying that you are the ultimate expert on all things arcane.

You don't go out of your way to dissuade such talk. After all, you are a powerful practitioner of the arcane arts. You are a protégé of powerful wizards, sorcerers, and warlocks (if not in the f lesh, at least in the study of their lives, their rituals, and the spells they preferred to cast). Furthermore, spells and rituals have been your daily fare for longer than you can recall. You are mortal, yes, but the f lux of magic that daily f lows through your form lifts you closer and closer to something finer with each arcane utterance.

Any wizard, warlock, or other spellcaster can study hard and eventually master a wide variety of magical stratagems. It is not impossible to grow in power and ability. But a few who do so sense an underlying unity to magic, a thread that connects apparently disparate magical functions. Those few, like you, claim the title of Magister and the enhanced magical prowess that goes with it.

Regardless of what others say or what you believe, empirical evidence has proved it: You have become one of the most powerful spellcasters in history. You manipulate magic as easily as you breathe.

不朽？ Immortality?

Your ultimate destiny is certain to be colorful, but is otherwise open-ended. It is likely to be whatever best suits the unique expression of your class. You might be a chaos sorcerer who decides to live deep within the Elemental Chaos, returning in some future age to help assuage the world's need. You might be a great bard whose magic eventually challenges the immortals, and perhaps wins you a place in the courts of the gods on your own terms. You might be a wizard whose studies have rewarded you with a natural fluency that none could have predicted early in your career, but whose popularity and notoriety live on for centuries afterward—aided by the fact that you remain accessible, if inactive, in a grand tower hidden in a Feywild mountain pass.

21级：魔力流淌 Magic's Flow

Benefit: 当你使用一个奥术遭遇或每日攻击威能，你在该威能对抗的防御上获得+4加值，直到你下一回合结束。

21级：魔导师诀窍 Magister's Knack

Benefit: 你选择的一个属性增加2点

24级：魔导师归来 Return of the Magister

Benefit: 每天一次，当你的生命值降至0或更低，或将要承受足以杀死你的伤害时，你能花费一个回复力，以一个自由动作传送15格，并对你身上所有可以豁免终止的效果做一次豁免检定。

26级：魔导之钥 Magister's Key

30级：魔导大师 Magic's Mater

Benefit: 每天两次，你能以一个标准动作施展任何你掌握的仪式。施展的仪式不能直接影响敌人。例如，你能施展死者复活 Raise Dead仪式复生一个盟友并让其重新加入战斗。然而，你不能施展「禁锢术」，这直接影响了敌人。

Twilight Tribune Epic Destiny.name: 暮光护民官 Twilight Tribune
Twilight Tribune Epic Destiny.description:
You take on a ghostly aspect to more expertly do battle with the wayward spirits that haunt the cosmos.

Prerequisite:

All mortals have a dark road ahead of them in the afterlife. When their spirits are released from the flesh they were born into, they venture into the Shadowfell to make their way to the cold slopes of Letherna—and to whatever final destination awaits beyond the halls of the Raven Queen. However, some souls linger in the mortal realm, unable or unwilling to take this fateful journey. Entities such as ghosts, specters, wraiths, and devourers are the most dangerous of these hesitant spirits, committing atrocities through malicious intent or mindless despair.

In response to this scourge, the greatest and wisest heroes of the world are called by fate and the Raven Queen to serve as the Twilight Tribunes. These selfless champions dedicate their lives to seeking out and destroying wayward incorporeal souls. By invoking their dread judgment, the Twilight Tribunes allow even the most tormented undead to leave their lives and pain behind. As they follow the path of their destiny, the Twilight Tribunes are drawn to ever more powerful creatures and challenges, working their way through the most fearsome creatures of shadow and undeath. Having dispensed with liches, dracoliches, and vampires, a tribune might be called on in the end to face off against beings of godlike power and the greatest lords of the undead.

实践天命 Living the Destiny

During your time as a Twilight Tribune, you might begin hearing whispers of an unspeakable evil lumbering its way back into existence. Could a slain god rise as an undead? Could Orcus, Demon Prince of Undeath, animate the corpse of dread Nerull as his servant, thus gaining enough power to challenge the gods directly?

At the end of your journey, you might pass into the afterlife as all mortals do, or you might volunteer to stay behind as a ghostly judge—your unmatched wisdom continuing to guide mortal souls into the beyond. You might serve the Raven Queen as an advisor, or you might lead a covenant of tribunes that eventually replace her as the gods of fate and death.

21级：暮光洞察|Twilight Insight

Your already legendary enlightenment reaches even greater heights as your destiny unfolds.

Benefit: 你的感知增加2点

另外，你获得黑暗视觉

24级：暮光斗篷 Twilight Cloak

When you recover your strength on the battlefield, the power of the Shadowfell lets you take on a spectral appearance to foil your enemies' attacks.

Benefit: 当你使用你的回气或全防御动作时，你可以成为虚体，直到你下一回合结束

26级：护民官权威 Tribune's Authority

As your duties and insight bring you closer to the veil of the afterlife, your voice and presence carry the weight of the Raven Queen's power. What you decree shall be your opponents' fate, and they are powerless to stop you.

30级：护民官裁决 Tribune's Judgment

Your presence carries the full weight of the cycle of life and death. No creature, mortal or otherwise, can violate the sanctity of your judgment without facing your wrath.

Benefit: 当一个非杂兵敌人以近战攻击命中你时，掷一个d20。若结果为10或更高，则该敌人受到等同于它以此攻击对你造成的伤害的一半伤害

另外，被你将生命值降到0的生物不能从死亡中复活，也不能作为不死生物再起

Pyreen Epic Destiny.name: 派林者 Pyreen
Pyreen Epic Destiny.description:
你渴望的只不过是巫王的毁灭和永恒的和平。

Prerequisite:

The ancient, long-lived pyreens embody all life on Athas. In their features are the traits of every race. Many of them share ancestry with the primal spirits. From your early years, you felt a kinship with these rare and elusive creatures. As time went on, and your primal power grew, you became one of them.

As a powerful primal protector, you guard a vast region of land. The Forest Ridge or the Estuary of the Forked Tongue might be under your personal protection. The spirits of the land listen to your counsel and regard you as one of them. They exalt you, because you have the ability to restore the world to verdant glory.

As a pyreen, you can never die from old age. This quality gives you a perspective others lack: The things worth fighting for in the world are those that last. Though you might assist people in fixing what you regard as trivial plights, you rarely put your life in jeopardy for their sakes. You know that a much greater destiny awaits you.

不朽 Immortality

Your destiny is fulfilled as the sorcerer-kings fall. The natural forces grow strong once again, and the tyranny of defiling and slavery crumbles. You have lived up to your purpose as a beacon of hope and a sworn enemy of Athas's dark rulers.

和平使者 Peace-Bringer: You contributed to the fall of the sorcerer-kings—a triumph that will allow the world to slowly renew itself. Now, your task is to serve as a caretaker for the world as it returns to its past glory. You plant the seeds and tend the shoots that will someday spread to cover Tyr and the lands beyond. While you watch over the burgeoning groves of Athas, you also keep an eye on the new civilizations that spring up from the wreckage of the city-states. You will help them move away from the dark magic and cruel practices of the past.

21级：万族之子 Child of All Races

Benefit: 你会说天界语，你可以说并理解所有语言。每当你进行交涉检定或洞察检定时，你掷骰两次并使用任一结果。此外，你不再衰老。

21级：心神坚定 Strong in Mind and Spirit

Benefit: 在智力，感知和魅力属性中选择2个。选择的属性增加2点。

24级：复苏精魂 Resurgent Spirit

Benefit: 每天一次，当你的生命值降至0或更低时，在你的下一回合开始时，你恢复等同于你重伤值的生命值，且成为虚体直到遭遇结束。

26级：恢复大地 Rejuvenate the Land

30级：派林者恢复 Pyreen's Restoration

Benefit: 当盟友在邻近你时开始其回合，他能对一个可豁免终止的效果进行一次豁免检定。如果该盟友在此豁免检定上失败，你能以一个自由动作将那个效果转移到你自己身上。你承受的效果不能转移给你的任何盟友。
Pyreen Epic Destiny.requirements: 21级，任意原力职业或原力主题

Glorious Spirit Epic Destiny.name: 荣耀之魂 Glorious Spirit
Glorious Spirit Epic Destiny.description:
光荣的事迹永存。你已经作为为不朽的战士精神而被纪念，以指导未来的世代。

Prerequisite:

Among the host of primal spirits that guard the world and maintain its natural order, the revered spirits of great mortal heroes stand as proud beacons guiding their living descendants to follow their paths. It is your destiny to stand with them, proving your worth by earning glory in battle. While you still live, you are not yet a Glorious Spirit, but your immortal kindred exult in your triumphs and strengthen you with some portion of their own power, awaiting the appointed day when you fight your last mortal battle and join them in the spirit world.

Battle against any worthy adversary fills your heart with joy and wins the acclaim of your unseen comrades. You harbor a special enmity for foes who would cheat death or inflict inglorious deaths on others. These foes above all you seek to send ahead of you into the dark.

不朽 Immortality

The great ancestral spirits you revere are those who take joy in mortal examples of valor and great endurance. Through your love of battle, you have won the approval of these spirits, and in return they offer you the chance to aid your descendants and those of like mind when your days are done.

永恒荣耀 Eternal Glory: You distinguish yourself during your final battle, fighting with unmatched valor. Whether you stand or fall, you finally behold the great company of Glorious Spirits, gathered to welcome you into their shining ranks. In a flight of wild joy, they lead you into the spirit world, where a great feast has been prepared in your honor. Leaving your mortal life behind, you become a true Glorious Spirit, an unseen presence on the battlefields of the world who fills living warriors with the courage and might needed to overcome their enemies.

21级：可敬对手 Worthy Foe

Benefit: 每遭遇一次，以一个次要动作，你可以将离你最近的敌人指定为可敬对手，直到遭遇结束。直到你下一个回合开始时，你对可敬对手的攻击会无视任何抗力和虚体。

此外，每轮一次，你在命中时能对可敬对手造成2d8额外伤害。如果你能在你的回合中对可敬对手进行多次攻击，则你在所有的攻击骰掷骰完毕后决定对哪次攻击触发额外伤害。

最后，如果你将可敬对手的生命值降至0，则你能以一个自由动作花费一个回复力。

24级：寻觅敌人 Seeker of Foes

Benefit: 每遭遇一次，以一个移动动作，你可以传送至你能看到的任何生物相邻的一格。

26级：精魂骏马 Spirit Steed

30级：毁灭使者 Bearer of Doom

Benefit: 如果可敬对手是你攻击的唯一目标，并且该攻击失手，则你保留那攻击威能的使用。任何通常在你使用该威能失手时的效果仍然适用。

Mythic Spirit Epic Destiny.name: 神话精魂 Mythic Spirit
Mythic Spirit Epic Destiny.description:
你的凡人事迹使你被列入上古精魂的传说中。当你塑造世界时，你会在永恒中找到自己的位置。

Prerequisite:

The greatest primal spirits are immortalized in the stories recounted by your people. Told and retold around campfires, these tales warn the young against foolish mistakes and inspire greatness from living heroes. Each telling changes a tale; each speaker alters minor details or fabricates new adventures. These adaptations do not make the tales any less true, however. The primal spirits and their place in the world are fluid, changing with mortal expectation and need.

Although you have learned to count the great primal spirits as allies, you never expected to be included in the stories of the ancestors and elder spirits. Even more disconcerting is that the storytellers incorporate you in the most famous tales, placing you alongside Great Bear and the World Serpent. In these evolving recitations, you play a small part at first, but your role grows with each telling. As you travel the world and beyond, battling foes and righting wrongs, you find truth in these tales and a dim awareness that somehow, you have always been and always will be.

不朽 Immortality

Each victory and defeat cements your place in history. In the end, you fade from the present to live on in legend.

传说之物 Stuff of Legend: Your adventures permeate the world, carried on the wind. Where the motes of your myth fall, primal tribes weave them into their tales, binding you to the past, setting your deeds alongside those of the other great spirits. You might deny the details of these tales at first, but in time, the stories become familiar and you begin to remember the events as they are recounted, not necessarily as they happened. Your place in legend is secured when you complete your Destiny Quest and join the cast of hundreds who guide the primal people through myth into the uncertain future. You fade away, your body dissolving into the wind and the earth as your spirit flows out into the world.

21级：预知命运 Foretold Destiny

Benefit: 你选择的一个属性增加2点。当你未重伤时，你在豁免检定上获得+2加值。

24级：早已写就 It Is Written

Benefit: 当你进行豁免检定时，邻近你的每个盟友可以做一次豁免检定。

26级：扭转命运 Fate Averted

30级：神话重生 Mythic Rebirth

Benefit: 当你濒死时，你不需要进行死亡豁免，且你能不花费动作使用你的回气。

God-Emperor Epic Destiny.name: 神皇 God-Emperor
God-Emperor Epic Destiny.description:
你把你强有力的手放在有史以来最伟大的人类文化的舵柄上，引导这艘船不断向地平线前进，直到你的意志根深蒂固得它可以自己航行，永远。

Prerequisite:

当你在整个宇宙中做出越来越大的功绩，将世界上松散的人类团结成一个新的帝国，甚至比尼拉斯还大，越来越多的人称你为主——甚至是救主。随着那些期待你统治的人越来越多，开始有小道消息说你不只是人类。你不仅仅是与凡人不同，而且你的命运是要进一步神化，超越物质世界的琐事。这种神化不仅标志着你自己的伟大，也标志着你所统治的文明的伟大。

起初，你仍然存在于你的王国的首都，用手把手指引你的官员和将军，但随着时间的推移，你制定的法律以及下达的命令有了自己的生命。你治下的领袖们开始从这套知识体系中了解你的意志，而不是听你亲口说出来，同时你的注意力逐渐转移向有关神和半神的牵扯到多个位面的事务上。最终，你从这个世界上淡出，加入他们的行列，成为在仪式和圣日中被召唤的伟大守护者，你的文明最伟大的成就都献给了他们。

实践天命 Living the Destiny

你不打算在闪耀的荣光中升入众星之海，因为你知道如此突然地放弃你的帝国会使它毁于一旦。你仍需要对那些尊敬你的人负责，缓慢的过渡则是恰当的方式，这同时也给你时间来适应诸神授予你的新职责。

神域之殿 The Temple of Your Dominion: 随着你帝国的发展，你的臣民建造了一座至高神殿作为你的住所，那些寻求你的建议或祝福的人来到这里聆听你的话语。你听取他们的请求，颁布法律，并告诫他们要为自己对抗逆境。但随着时间的流逝，你的人民越不再那么需要你的存在，而你心思却转向了更重要的事情。几个世纪过去，你开始隐退，没有人能够说清楚你去了哪里。最终，你的祭司们意识到，你在你的帝国中无处不在；你成为了帝国的指导精神，而不是实际的统治者。在那个时候，你的神化就完成了。

21级：天赋统治者 Gifted Ruler

You are recognized by those who follow you as the ultimate embodiment of the empire. You become the physical and spiritual epitome of humanity.

Benefit: 你选择的两个属性都增加2点。

24级：不灭之魂 Unquenchable Spirit

You are the soul of the empire. Mere physical death cannot put an end to what you have created—or what you have become.

Benefit: 每天一次，当你开始你的回合时生命值为0或更低，你恢复等同于你重伤值的生命值。

26级：主权意志 The Sovereign Will

You speak with the authority of a god. All harken to your every word, and to the words of those you hold closest.

30级：你的保护之翼 Your Protective Wing

Your awareness and guiding hand extend to all who follow you. No enemy will despoil any who fall in your service; you return them to your side where they can be healed, or at least buried with honor.

Benefit: 当你能看到的任何盟友的生命值降至到0或更低时，你能以一个自由动作将该盟友传送到与你邻近的一格。

Godmind Epic Destiny.name: 神念 Godmind
Godmind Epic Destiny.description:
这一切联系起来了。我理解了。我理解了......一切！

Prerequisite:

Your mind flows like a river during a storm surge, threatening to overflow with a torrent of thought. As your consciousness grows more charged with psionic power, your attention expands each day. Soon, you believe, little will lie beyond your comprehension. No mystery will veil the divide between your desire and reality. You have become the walking embodiment of mind over matter. In truth, your mind controls matter and the perceptions of others. You suspect that you have discovered a new path to divinity, one powered by your will alone. But this is not a divinity that requires the adoration of others; the intensity of your focus is enough to sustain your mounting abilities.

It used to be that an insight would come to you unbidden once in a great while and shine like a star in your mind; a connection you had failed to make before suddenly became clear. Those moments of clarity were wonderful, even more so for their rarity. But now an hour does not go by that you don't make such a startling association. All the components of existence are connected in far more fundamental ways than you had realized.

You now believe that much of what makes up reality is merely the consensus, albeit an unconscious one, of all the thinking beings within it. With your psionic abilities, you can influence how the minds around you see and understand their surroundings, and in so doing, you reshape the world according to your will.

不朽 Immortality

You perfect your understanding of the great skein of existence and picture it as a self-reinforcing and self-generating construct of conception and thought. It seems as if all the lesser minds in the universe make up one universal mind, whose perceptions expand once per age. You decide to contribute consciously to that expansion.

宇宙之念 Universe Mind: With a smile on your face, you expend all your psionic power in one dramatic flare. Your physical form drops away, a vessel that has served its purpose. You imprint your mind on the universe, becoming an eternal thought, a higher ideal, a meme that will forever reverberate through existence. When your name is spoken, you notice, and if the need is great enough, you provide a crucial insight. Finally, you know all, see all, and think all.

21级：暴露精神 Lay Bare the Mind

Benefit: 每遭遇一次，你能以一个次要动作，让你能看到的一个敌人获得5点心灵易伤直到遭遇结束

24级：惊人洞察 Startling Insight

Benefit: 在你使用你的回气后，当你进行任何攻击骰、豁免检定、技能检定和属性检定时，你可以掷骰两次，并使用任一结果。这个增益持续到你下一回合结束。

26级：恢复精神 Rejuvenate Mind

30级：精神力量之泉 Wellspring of Mental Power

Benefit: 你获得4个额外的灵能点。

Chosen Epic Destiny.name: 神选者 Chosen
Chosen Epic Destiny.description:
你的神让你成为祂的力量行于凡世的容器。

Prerequisite:

Your deity chooses you to serve as his or her proxy in mortal affairs. You protect your deity's worshipers, battle your deity's enemies, and champion your deity's causes. To suit you for this task, your deity breathes into your soul a spark of divine energy that grants you powers comparable to those of a demigod.

As with the Demigod epic destiny detailed in the Player's Handbook, a divine spark increases all your powers. Unlike the Demigod, you are sworn to the service of a particular deity. While operating as an epic hero, you can function as a worldly exarch, receiving advice and commissions from your deity. Alternatively, you could be left on your own, advancing your deity's cause as you see fit.

Not all deities have the power or the inclination to elevate a Chosen of their own. Some deities can elevate several Chosen at the same time, although this circumstance is quite rare. Deities most often seek out mortals who are especially faithful for this task, but a few gods seem to take pleasure in selecting undeserving or fickle mortals for their earthly agents.

不朽 Immortality

Chosen often live for centuries. However, as you grow more powerful, the divine fire placed in your soul inevitably transfigures your mortal body. When no vestige of your mortal nature remains, it is time for you to join your deity in the astral dominions and champion his or her causes there. In your place, another deserving mortal can be raised up.

21级：神圣火花 Divine Spark

Benefit: 你选择两个不同的属性值各增加2点

24级：神圣复原 Divine Recovery

Benefit: 每天你第一次生命值降至0或更低时，你恢复等同于最大生命值的一半的生命值。

26级：神选者威能 Chosen Powers

Benefit: 每个神选者都有一个由其神祇授予的特定的26级辅助威能。与善良，守序善良或无阵营的神祇相关联的威能在下文列出。

 

30级：神圣奇迹 Divine Miracle

Benefit: 你在遭遇中第一次消耗掉你最后剩余的遭遇攻击威能时，你恢复一个你选择的遭遇攻击威能的使用。

Sublime Flame Epic Destiny.name: 升华烈焰 Sublime Flame
Sublime Flame Epic Destiny.description:
没有什么能比完全复兴塞尔（Cyre）更让你满足。

Prerequisite:

From the Silver Flame's inception, its purpose in the world has been clear. It was forged from a commitment to stand fast against the growing darkness, to seek out and destroy evil's champions, and to carry the banner of purity and light. Although many rally to the Silver Flame, only a select few ever feel its purifying flames burn away the darkness clouding their souls and receive true clarity of vision. One does not choose to become a vessel for the Silver Flame, but rather, the Flame chooses him or her to be a vessel.

As a sublime flame, you have unflinching devotion and piety, and you are dedicated to serving the principles on which the Church of the Silver Flame was founded. You might serve the Church faithfully, or perhaps instead you commune directly with the Silver Flame. Regardless, your devotion unlocks a deeper understanding of your purpose in the world.

不朽 Immortality

As a sublime flame, you can channel the power of those who have come before you. Eventually, this power might lead you to merge with the Silver Flame and become an immortal extension of its divine will.

银焰融身 Joining the Flame: You have spent your life combating corruption and evil in the name of the Silver Flame. You have experienced an awakening of purpose, and as you face your final enemy, the last vestiges of doubt burn away. With your ultimate victory, you feel a tug upon your soul that draws you toward Thrane for one final pilgrimage. You cross the countryside, returning to Flamekeep to enter the Cathedral of the Silver Flame. There, you step into the fire and undergo a transformation. The argent fire sears away your flesh, allowing your mind and soul to join with the Silver Flame. You take your place as part of the eternal fires, lending your power, your knowledge, and your faith to its holy purpose. As part of the Flame, you channel strength into those who come after you, working to attain the promise of paradise in the world.

21级：银焰神选 Chosen of the Flame

Benefit: 在长休息结束时，选择一个火焰或光耀每日攻击威能。你在下一次长休前可以额外使用一次那个威能。

24级：银焰容器 Argent Vessel

Benefit: 在长休息后你第一次生命值降至0或更低时，邻近你的每个敌人受到10点火焰和10点光耀伤害，邻近你的每个盟友恢复20点生命值。在你下一回合开始时，你恢复等同于你回复力值的生命值。

26级：银焰之拥 Silver Flame's Embrace

30级：银焰之怒 Wrath of Silver Flame

Benefit: 每当你使用光耀攻击威能时，此攻击造成2d6额外火焰伤害。当你使用火焰攻击威能时，此攻击造成2d6额外光耀伤害。
Sublime Flame Epic Destiny.requirements: 21级，任意神术职业，必须信仰银焰

Avatar of Life Epic Destiny.name: 生命化身 Avatar of Life
Avatar of Life Epic Destiny.description:
尽管有战争、混乱和仇恨，但生命仍在延续，你将确保它永不动摇。

Prerequisite:

You are the incarnation of a god, mortal and immortal beings united in the same flesh. You exist for the purpose of battling your true godly self 's foes in the mortal world, of providing inspiration and hope to all who worship your divine being, and just possibly to learn a few things about what it means to walk in the world you helped to shape at the dawn of time. At the same time, you are also the mortal persona you have been throughout your current life, and you are destined to become part of the god you have served so well.

Avatars represent many different aspects of the gods, but you specifically embody the vital principle, the animating spirit of your deity. All life is sacred to you, and you are its divine protector. Your time as an adventurer has taught you how precarious life can be, whether it is the life of a butterfly struggling to escape its cocoon or a civilization living on the edge of lands inhabited by orcs and goblins. You hate taking life, but you recognize that it is the nature of the world that you must sometimes kill or be killed.

不朽 Immortality

As an avatar of life, you might be blessed with incredible longevity. Your calling could draw you to retire to a monastery or a temple to live in obscurity, protecting a small community from harm. You might be fated to heal some great sickness in the world, battling a magical plague or putting an end to some corruption or mockery of life that threatens the natural order. Or you might be compelled to venture across the planes, bringing an example of hope and healing wherever you go.

神性再聚 Divine Reunion: After you have completed your Destiny Quest and lived out the years appointed to you, you are called back to your true self. Lying down in a fair green meadow or forest clearing, you allow your body to crumble into dust, nourishing flowering vines and creepers. Your soul returns to your divine self, recalling the awesome power and understanding that comes with godhood. But some part of your mortal being still survives, since your memories, your cares, and your journeys are now your deity's too.

21级：无拘耐力 Unfettered Durability

Benefit: 当你在豁免骰上掷出20时，每个在你视线内的盟友能对一个可豁免终止的效果做一次豁免检定。

21级：生命感知 Life's Wisdom

Benefit: 你的体质和感知属性都增加2点

24级：生机复苏 Vital Revival

Benefit: 每天第一次你开始你的回合时濒死或死亡，你复活。你恢复等同于你重伤值的生命值，并且离你10格内的所有盟友能花费一个回复力。

26级：生命之泉 Font of Life

30级：生命坚存 Persistence of Life

Benefit: 你和离你5格内的盟友能以一个次要动作使用回气。如果一个角色已经能以次要动作使用回气，则他能以一个自由动作回气。当你或离你5格内的盟友使用回气，他可以恢复通常恢复的两倍生命值。
Avatar of Life Epic Destiny.requirements: 21级，[[生命脉冲 <神力> Pulse of Life <Divinity>]]专长

Saint Epic Destiny.name: 圣徒 Saint
Saint Epic Destiny.description:
你是一位神祗的完美仆从，是你的神所珍视的一切品质的光辉榜样。

Prerequisite:

In recognition of your faith, holiness, courage, and piety, you are elevated to sainthood. From the day you embark on this path, you can claim the title of Saint. Through dreams, omens, or angelic visitations, your deity makes your sainthood known to followers around the world. Those who share your faith hold you in the highest regard, while the enemies of your god naturally view you as the most terrible of foes. You might be a great crusader, a mighty prophet, or a revered sage. You set a sterling example of your deity's values and guidance.

不朽 Immortality

In the mortal world, you have only the years allotted by nature and fate. You could live to great old age, or you might die young as a hero or a martyr. When at last death draws near, you meet your end with joy—for now you go to the presence of the deity you have served so long and well. Your mortal body remains uncorrupted, and seems to be merely asleep; even the most gruesome wounds slowly vanish, leaving your body an imperishable symbol of divine grace.

Your immortality lies beyond this world, where you will stand among the highest of the elevated souls granted life after life in the divine dominions. In the dominion of your deity, you have a new, immortal body. You join his or her celestial court as a wise and valued counselor. Throughout the world you are regarded as an example of devotion and honor. When people face challenges and hardships similar to those you faced in your mortal life, they are heartened by your example.

21级：圣徒优雅 Saintly Grace

Benefit: 你在强韧，反射和意志防御上获得+2加值，并获得等同15 + 你感知调整值的的暗蚀抗力。你不会被支配，任何会支配你的效果会让你晕眩作为代替。

24级：圣徒之触 Sanctified Touch

Benefit: 当你让一个邻近你的生物花费一个回复力时，接受者能同时做一次豁免检定。当你让一个邻近你的生物做一次豁免检定时，目标能同时花费一个回复力。当你使用医疗技能时，任何被你给予豁免检定或以成功的医疗检定稳定伤势的生物能花费一个回复力。

26级：神圣复苏 Sanctified Revival

30级：金色光环 Golden Halo

Benefit: 圣光在你的面容上流淌。你的光环在5格范围内提供明亮光照，你在交涉和威吓检定上获得+2加值。你能以一个自由动作显现或抑制你的光环。另外，当你使用一个神术医疗威能时，接受生物恢复25点额外生命值。

Master of Moments Epic Destiny.name: 时间主宰 Master of Moments
Master of Moments Epic Destiny.description:
所有的时间，所有的地方，所有的时刻都是你可以探索的。

Prerequisite:

Time is not a river but an ocean, extending in all directions to infinity. You are a sailor traveling wherever time's currents carry you, venturing into the uncharted future as you leave the inscrutable past behind. An awakened mind is your compass; your instincts are your only map. You are the Master of Moments, calling forth the psionic power that propels you into the future or lets you set course for forgotten times.

不朽 Immortality

You have never rested easy in the present. Now, it is your fate to free yourself from time's currents as you seek out new futures and altered pasts.

改变过去 Alter the Past: You look back at your accomplishments, successes, and failures to analyze the ways in which you might have made your decisions differently. Have you long yearned to undo a choice that cost the lives of others dear to you? Do you look back on one moment when choosing the wrong path led to disaster? The more you reflect on your past, the more it colors your accomplishments, until you are determined to correct your errors in order to achieve an even greater end. You leave behind the present to venture into the past. But what changes will you make there? Will there be repercussions from your meddling? What new troubles might arise through your well-intentioned efforts?

透视未来 See the Future: Having met your objectives in the present, you wonder what consequences they might bring. Rather than watch them unfold, you step ahead in time, traveling through the years to witness the seeds of your success take root and grow into a better future. But what if your efforts bring about not a better world but a darker one? Will you interfere and change history's course? Or will you direct new heroes to take up your mantle and continue the struggle on your behalf?

21级：完美旅者 Consummate Traveler

Benefit: 你可以掌握并施展旅行类仪式。你在作为旅行类仪式的一部分的技能检定上获得+5加值。每天一次，你能施展一个你知道的旅行类仪式而不需要花费材料。

21级：时间扩张 Maximized Time

Benefit: 你可以花费一个行动点来获得一个标准动作，一个移动动作和一个次要动作，而非仅仅一个额外动作。

24级：充裕时间 Bountiful Seconds

Benefit: 你可以在你的每个回合进行一个额外的次要动作。在你的回合，你能放弃两个次要动作来获得一个额外的移动动作。

另外，你能掌握并施展所有旅行类仪式，无论等级如何。

26级：冻结时间 Freeze Time

30级：无拘存在 Boundless Presence

Benefit: 你获得传送5作为一种移动方式。

另外，每天一次，当你重伤或生命值降至0或更低时，你能将自己从游戏中移除。你获得短休息的收益。在你的下一回合开始时，你重新出现在你之前的空间或最近的未被占据的空间。

Fang of the World Serpent Epic Destiny.name: 世界大蛇之牙 Fang of the World Serpent
Fang of the World Serpent Epic Destiny.description:
当沉睡的世界之蛇醒来时，它的怒火就会化身为你。

Prerequisite:

原力精魂的作用是保护和维护世界。即使是世界大蛇，它可以缠绕绞死神祗，它的獠牙可以刺穿荒神，它的存在是为了保护世界的自然秩序和平衡，而不仅仅是为了破坏。尽管世界大蛇缠绕大地，随意一动便可以撼动大地，但他包裹着世界是为了保护它免受伤害，而不是为了粉碎它。

不过，你是世界大蛇愤怒的活生生的化身。他的毒液在你的血管中流淌，你的筋脉带着他身躯的力量。你注定要面对一些可怕的敌人——也许是恶魔王子或荒神，甚至是寻求世界灭亡的破坏性神灵。世界之蛇将他的力量赋予你，目的只有一个：摧毁这种威胁，维护世界的平衡。

不朽 Immortality

你为这一个目的而生：将世界之蛇的愤怒带到世界的敌人那里。当这个目的完成后，等待你的是什么命运?

惊世大蛇 Striking Serpent: 世界之蛇的力量在你体内燃烧，当你的凡人生命结束时，这种力量不需要回到他那里。当对世界存在的最大威胁最终被击败，你的命运任务完成后，你的精神就会加入到你努力保护的世界中。你成为一个新的古老精魂——惊世大蛇——准备在世界出现另一个威胁时用你的力量成就一个新的英雄。

21级：大蛇之怒 Serpent's Fury

Benefit: 当你以一个原力近战攻击威能命中一个敌人时，在你下一回合结束前，你的下一次对那个敌人的近战攻击造成等同于你的力量调整值的额外伤害。

24级：屠杀当道 Rampant Slaughter

Benefit: 当你以原力近战攻击威能重伤一个敌人或造成重击时，你能以一个自由动作做两次近战基本攻击，这两次攻击中只有一次能以你重伤的或造成重击的敌人为目标。

26级：大蛇复仇 Serpent's Retaliation

30级：大蛇复原 Serpent's Resilience

Benefit: 任何对你造成重击的生物必须再做一次带有-5减值的攻击骰。若第二次攻击命中，则确实是重击。否则，那次攻击改为普通命中，并且你能以一个自由动作花费一个回复力。

World Tree Guardian Epic Destiny.name: 世界树守卫 World Tree Guardian
World Tree Guardian Epic Destiny.description:
智慧而强大的世界树在你身上找到了同类的精魂。在你保护这个古老精魂不受伤害的誓言中，更广阔的世界都在你的保护之下。

Prerequisite:

You have seen the World Tree, the most ancient primal spirit of the forest. Legends say that the roots of the World Tree are the roots of the world itself and that any harm done to this ancient entity shakes the earth and cracks the sky. You chose to defend the World Tree, and in doing so, you were able to speak to it and gain its favor. You can now call on its power, granting you the strength and resilience of nature itself. The World Tree is intertwined with the world so that any harm to one hurts the other—an outcome you are sworn to prevent.

不朽 Immortality

The World Tree has existed since the beginning of time. If you have your way, it will live longer still.

世界树象征 The Tree's Counterpart: You become the World Tree's counterpart among the races of the world—a primal symbol of life and a worldly representative among the great spirits of nature. Accepted into the company of the most powerful and ancient primal spirits, you abandon your mortal form to become a being of pure primal essence.

You are no longer as active as you once were in shaping the fate of the world; the actions that led to your immortality have kept the world safe for some time. Instead, you sleep soundly in verdant groves or walk the wider world invisible to the eyes of mortals. However, when the greatest dangers threaten the world, you heed the summons to convene with other great spirits to rally against those perils.

21级：世界树之皮 Bark of the World Tree

Benefit: 每当敌人命中你时，你能用一个即时反应获得等同于5 + 你体质调整值的全伤害抗力。此抗力持续到你下一回合开始。

24级：世界树恩赐 Boon of the World Tree

Benefit: 每天一次，你能代替一位盟友死亡。在盟友死亡时，你能选择自己死亡作为代替，那个盟友恢复等同于其重伤值的生命值。在你的下一回合开始时，你复活并带有等同于你回复力值的生命值。直到遭遇结束，当你在重伤时你具有再生10。

26级：世界树枝桠 Boughs of the World Tree

30级：世界树之成长 World Tree's Growth

Benefit: 你具有等同于你剩余回复力次数的再生。

Soul of the World Epic Destiny.name: 世界之魂 Soul of the World
Soul of the World Epic Destiny.description:
你已经活了一千次，但并非每次都是天族。你的灵魂在许多身体里游荡，你已经学会如何解开你往世的生命和生活的知识。

Prerequisite:

The soul of a deva is reborn each time it dies, leaving the deva with relatively fresh memories from past lifetimes. However, some spirits are reincarnated over and over again throughout the centuries, each as different races and with different professions. When one of these reincarnating spirits is reborn as a deva, it creates an unusual situation where the deva can recall past lives beyond those recalled by most devas.

You are one of these few who can cast their thoughts far back in time, calling upon memories of lives as humans, elves, dwarves, and other races. You might have memories of life as a dragonborn warrior defending the walls of an Arkhosian fortress, and maybe you recall the First Days when you and your fellow elves first walked the forests of the world. You remember being among the dwarf crafters as you laid the foundation for the first buildings in Hammerfast, and the taste of bitter betrayal as you stood with your fellow tieflings in the ashes of Bael Turath.

You have an uncanny sense of time unlike that possessed by your fellow devas. Also, unlike other devas, you cannot say for certain that you will be reborn again with the knowledge of your past lives, and you must seize this rare chance to make use of the memories you possess. With knowledge of the world from the dawn of time, you have a chance to see the greater picture and gain the kind of scope you need to make history-altering changes that frequently remain only within the domain of gods.

不朽 Immortality

The knowledge of life as many different people, ranging all the way back to the earliest days of the most ancient races, informs your perspective and reminds you that memories, knowledge, and skills still live on deep in the minds of others.

永存世界行者 Immortal World Walker: As you draw closer to the completion of your Destiny Quest, more and more memories begin to flood your mind from lives both recent and ancient. As the memories threaten to overwhelm your own personality, you learn to harness their knowledge and perform miracles that you would not have normally thought you could achieve.

When you have embraced your destiny, you fully merge with the memories of your past lives; no longer do they surface from time to time, but you call upon them at will, as though you had experienced all they had to offer in this lifetime. You transcend who you are, becoming, instead, an amalgamation of everyone you have ever been. This transformation permeates every fiber of your being, including your physical form, and you cease to be troubled by mortal concerns such as aging or a natural death. You have walked the world from its most ancient days, and continue to do so, full of memories dating back to the first days of creation.

21级：往世灵魂 Past Spirit

Benefit: 选择除你自己之外的一个种族。在考虑满足专长的前提时你视为那个种族的一员。如果那个种族有任何种族遭遇威能，你从中选择一个并获得。

在24级，你选择第二个种族并获得相同的好处。

21级：往世之力 Strengthened by the Past

Benefit: 你的智力和感知属性增加2点。

24级：往世学识 Knowledge of Ancient Lives

Benefit: 选择任意职业。当你获得一个新的职业威能或重训职业威能时，你能选择此职业的或你自己职业的。

26级：往世显现 Past Life Manifestation

30级：往世合一 One with All Past Lives

Benefit: 在短休息中，你能将你的任意一个遭遇攻击威能交换任意其他职业同等级的遭遇攻击威能。此交换持续直到你下一次短休息。你一次只能通过此方式交换一个威能。

Keybearer Epic Destiny.name: 守钥人 Keybearer
Keybearer Epic Destiny.description:
你掌握着现实的钥匙，有了这些钥匙，你可以去任何你想要的地方。

Prerequisite:

宇宙由你来探索。你是一位旅行大师，可以在眨眼间穿越位面，穿过时间和空间，跨过遥远的距离。没有任何锁可以阻止你，也没有任何障碍可以阻挡你，因为你拥有现实的钥匙，有了它，你可以随心所欲，去任何你想去的地方。

所谓的钥匙，是你对现实结构的独特洞察力的比喻。你敏锐的洞察力使你能够识别宇宙结构中的漏洞，只要稍微集中注意力，你就能穿过它们，绕过障碍物，出现在数英里之外，或出现在一个另一个位面。你的第一次穿越可能是在你的早期，当你第一次使用连接传送门 Linked Portal或其他旅行仪式时。也可能是在你尝试使用法术、祈祷或其他你所掌握的力量时产生的。这些启示为你逐渐掌握的能力奠定了基础，同时也给你灌输了一种强大的旅行和探索的冲动，访问新的国度，探索遥远的位面，遇见不同的民族和社会。

不朽 Immortality

宇宙向你敞开大门，邀请你探索现实中最遥远的角落。这不是怎么旅行或何时旅行的问题，而是你想去哪里？

时间与空间的掌控者 Master of Time and Space: 你的一生都在探索，到现实中最遥远的地方旅行，然后再回来。你曾见过神奇的景色，看着风暴的残余在妖精荒野中肆虐，探索黄铜城闪亮的街道，并在印记城无数的传送门中徘徊。每次你踏上新的旅程，你都开始意识到，旅行仪式中使用的机制和奥术公式的运动方式有缺陷，这个系统过于复杂，并做了许多无用功。这些仪式仅仅是触及了旅行的可能性，提供了到达目的地的最粗略和最直接的手段。通过改进和利用在现实中蠕动的路径，你可以加速这一过程，使其更加优雅，这样你就可以去你喜欢的任何地方。

在你战胜最后的对手时，这种理解被证明是有用的。随着敌人被压制，你的任务完成，你可以自由地将你的全部时间和注意力投入到探索位面上。不久之后，你道别，并将要试验你的知识。随着你技术的精进，你发现你不再需要复杂的仪式魔法来促进你的探索；你可以随意地去你想去的地方，只要你想。最终，你发现了时间的脉络，这使你能够进入未来和过去。

能够穿越时间的洪流意味着你可以永生，前往所有的时间和地点。你可能会向后追溯历史，见证贝尔-图拉斯的兴衰，或者更进一步，目睹众神和荒神之间创世之战的恐怖。或者，你可以向前走，踏入不确定的未来，看到你作为凡人行动的影响，新的英雄崛起，新的战争，新的创造，以及更多，直到你离开的世界成为一个模糊的记忆。如果你追溯到过去，你会希望改变它还是保护它不被其他守钥人发现？如果你踏入了未来，你会不会回到现在去改变它？作为时间和空间的掌控者，只有你能决定。

21级：传送门大师 Potral Mastery

Benefit: 你每天一次，你能使用连接传送门 Linked Portal或位面传送门 Planar Portal仪式而不需要花费材料，即使你没有仪式施法者 Ritual Caster专长。

另外，每天一次，当你死亡时，你立刻恢复等同于你最大生命值的一半并消失；你立刻出现你知道符记序列的任意位面的任意永久传送法阵中。

24级：旅者把戏 Traveler's Tricks

Benefit: 任何时候当你在攻击骰上掷出18或更高，你能在攻击后以一个自由动作传送5格。

26级：歪曲现实 Reality Distortion

30级：无拘行进 Unfettered Passage

Benefit: 你获得相位移动。你无视困难地形，能够穿过障碍物和其他生物，但你必须在一个未被占据的空间结束移动。

Redeemed Drow Epic Destiny.name: 赎罪卓尔 Redeemed Drow
Redeemed Drow Epic Destiny.description:
你曾经挣扎着要挣脱笼罩在你心中的黑暗，但现在你有机会向世界证明你与其他所有人不同。

Prerequisite:

No matter the deeds done, no matter the life lived, none of your mortal actions change the fact that you are drow—a dark elf and a living symbol of mortal corruption and vice—and throughout the rest of your days, you must bear the burden of the understanding that nothing you do can ever lift the stain that darkens your heart. The only escape from the curse is to truly transcend the mortal coil and become something more—to leave behind the shell of flesh and bone so your true light can shine and reveal to all the purity of your purpose. To this end, you commit yourself to become more than drow and deny the Spider Queen her hold over you for all time.

Becoming a redeemed drow represents a drow's ultimate repudiation of the Spider Queen. With this complete and total denial, you escape the webs of her influence and attain a higher state of existence. You name Lolth as your enemy and commit your life to fighting her machinations and ploys, in the hopes of showing the world and the gods that you have succeeded in breaking your ties where others have failed.

Your successes earn you the attention of Corellon (and possibly others), who aids you in your crusade against your former kin by imbuing you with a greater sense of purpose to impel you to daring acts and astonishing deeds. As your mission nears completion, Lolth throws the full weight of her legions against you, and through the storm of demons, spiders, driders, and drow, you must stand fast before the blooming doubts and misgivings that threaten to cloud your vision. In the end, Corellon blesses you with the greatest gift you could ask for: a second chance at life without the filthy caress of the horrific Spider Queen.

第二次机会 A Second Chance

The road to redemption varies with the drow, but many achieve the rewards sought by following the path outlined below. This said, there are many paths to redemption and finding this coveted prize might take you in unexpected directions.

真实救赎 True redemption: Upon completing your final quest, you were plucked from the mortal world and escorted by Corellon's chosen servants to make your final journey to his dominion in the Astral Sea. There, standing before the great and mighty god, your mortal deeds are weighed and judged, your accomplishments celebrated, and your failings considered. In the end, the god lifts the curse from you. For a moment, you see yourself as you were originally formed, before the betrayal—before the fall—and all falls dark. In a blink of an eye, you awaken once more, your soul contained in a new infant body. As you take in your surroundings, your memories of the past fade as you take in the long, rich life that lies before you.

21级：神圣职责 Sacred Duty

Benefit: 当你的攻击将一个有恶魔或蜘蛛关键字的生物的生命值降至0或更低时，你能以一个自由动作花费一个回复力。

24级：解除她触 Lift Her Touch

Benefit: 你能消耗你的「罗丝之民」种族威能来充能一个已经消耗的遭遇威能。

26级：天国之光 Light of Heaven

30级：救赎重负 Burden of Redemption

Benefit: 每天第一次你的生命值降至0或更低时，你恢复等同于你回复力值的生命值并获得10点全伤害抗力，直到遭遇结束。

Avatar of Death Epic Destiny.name: 死亡化身 Avatar of Death
Avatar of Death Epic Destiny.description:
你知道生命是短暂的，而死亡是永恒的。建议你的敌人在面对你时谨记这一点。

Prerequisite:

You are the mortal incarnation of a deity who holds sway over death. You are not simply Jozan the cleric; you are the Raven Queen, who for a time incarnates in the form of Jozan. Your body is a mere shell, a temporary vessel for the unthinkable might of a deity's soul. You were born to be the Raven Queen's mortal form, and as you grow in understanding and power, the light (or darkness) within you shines out for all to see. You might not have realized your true nature before, but now you know exactly what you are.

As an avatar of death, you incarnate the death aspect of your deity. Most likely this is the Raven Queen, but on rare occasions avatars of dead, dormant, or interloper gods arise—you might be an avatar of the dead god Nerull, or some other death deity contesting the Raven Queen's sway.

Good and evil are just words to you, for death makes all causes meaningless. You stare into the vacant sockets of long-dead kings, gaze across the soul-filled plains of the Shadowfell, and stand upon blood-soaked fields of battle. Through it all, you feel no sorrow, no remorse—only a grim sense of bemusement at mortal foolishness in the face of the inevitable. Adventuring is an amusing way to entertain yourself before life comes to an end.

不朽 Immortality

You care little about the fate of your mortal shell, for you know that in time you will rejoin with your true self. After all, even gods must die in time. One or two previous incarnations have turned against the Raven Queen in ages past, using their powers to prolong their mortal existences. Whether you meet your fate with joy, resignation, or defiance is up to you.

神性再聚 Divine Reunion: When you complete your final quest, the purpose of your current incarnation is accomplished. The winds of oblivion sweep your body into nothingness, freeing your soul to return to its divine origin. You rejoin the deity whose incarnation you were, and you resume your existence in the eternal.

21级：死亡降临 Death Comes to All

Benefit: 你的威能最多无视20点暗蚀抗力

21级：预见死亡 Foresight of Mortality

Benefit: 你的智力和感知属性都增加2点

24级：致命复苏 Deadly Revival

Benefit: 每天第一次你开始你的回合时濒死或死亡，你复活。你恢复等同于你重伤值的生命值，并且离你10格内的所有敌人获得15点暗蚀易伤直到你下一回合结束。

26级：必然之死 Inevitable Death

30级：灭亡预兆 Harbinger of Demise

Benefit: 在其回合结束时邻近你且生命值等于或低于25的敌人死亡。
Avatar of Death Epic Destiny.requirements: 21级，[[死亡丧钟 <神力> Death Knell <Divinity>]]专长

Destined Scion Epic Destiny.name: 宿命后裔 Destined Scion
Destined Scion Epic Destiny.description:
Prerequisite:

The world has seen many empires, but all of them have fallen to treachery from within and enemies from without. You realize that if the world is ever to be safeguarded against evil, the old empires must arise again. It is your destiny to defeat the cosmic forces—be they deities, demon lords, or archdevils—that conspire to crush civilization.

As a destined scion, you take the fight to the enemies of the mortal world. In battle, you are stern and resolute. Your foes' attacks cannot stop you, and when the time comes to deliver a killing blow, your attack strikes true.

21级：传奇豪气 Epic Heroism

Every epic hero stands as an exemplar of natural talents. Whether you boast the strength of a legion or the intellect of an entire academy of sages, your abilities are unparalleled among your people.

Benefit: 你选择两个不同的属性值各增加2点

24级：传奇战员 Epic Combatant

Your many successes in battle have given you insights beyond those of normal combatants.

Benefit: 你在攻击骰上获得+1加值，且在豁免骰上获得+2加值

26级：传奇恢复 Epic Recovery

Like the ancient kingdoms that fell but will rise once again, so too do you rise, undaunted, when you fall in battle.

30级：绝对胜利 Undeniable Victory

You stand on the verge of rebuilding what was lost. Your power is unmatched, and any who stand against you face certain death.

Sage of the Swan Tower Epic Destiny.name: 天鹅塔贤者 Sage of the Swan Tower
Sage of the Swan Tower Epic Destiny.description:
Constant devotion and unswerving dedication to the Raven Queen won you a place in her service. Now you command death and wield its power against any who would subvert it for their own dark purposes.

Prerequisite:

Your ceaseless drive to learn and your devotion to Ioun has enabled you to attain a status few others can claim. As a Sage of the Swan Tower, you have gained access to the glorious Halls of Enlightenment and can call upon its infinite knowledge. You, however, are not like the other sages. You find the traditional method of learning through reading to be insufficient and spend much of your time in the field, acquiring new knowledge and testing theories.

Each new nugget of information—each new revelation—brings you closer to the goal that you have held in your heart for so long. You feel the call of Ioun as you achieve greater feats of discovery and demystify new layers of knowledge. Eventually your dream becomes reality, and you are invited to become one of the timeless sages of the Swan Tower.

Life among your fellow sages in Kerith-Ald is all you hoped it would be, yet you see more potential for yourself every time you visit the Pillars of Ioun. It has been a long time since Ioun has honored one of her sages in such a way. Perhaps with some perseverance you can come to deserve your own alabaster monument.

21级：领域专家 Expert in Your Field

You have proven your capability to research and learn. Your knowledge in your chosen field is therefore superior to others.

Benefit: 你的智力或感知增加2点。另外，在下列技能中选择一个你已受训的：神秘、地城、历史、自然或宗教。当你使用所选技能做一次检定时，你可以掷骰两次并使用任一结果

24级：神术奥秘 Divine Arcana

The edge between the divine and the arcane becomes more blurred for you.

Benefit: 当你使用一个奥术攻击威能时，在你下一回合结束前，你在下一次神术攻击威能上获得战斗优势。当你使用一个神术攻击威能时，在你下一回合结束前，你在下一次奥术攻击威能上获得战斗优势

26级：学问应用 Knowledge Applied

The knowledge you access through the Swan Tower is not for you alone. You have developed the ability to quickly impart information to an ally in time of need.

30级：艾恩之柱奥秘 Secret of the Pillars

The Pillars of Ioun were gifted with more than just their monuments. Ioun blessed them with the ability to receive flashes of the immediate future in times of mortal danger.

Benefit: 每遭遇一次，当你受到伤害时，你能以一个自由动作做一次智力或感知检定。将你受到的伤害减少此检定结果的数值

Emergent Primordial Epic Destiny.name: 突现荒神 Emergent Primordial
Emergent Primordial Epic Destiny.description:
You carry the essence of an imprisoned primordial, a being so vast, so terrible, that the gods imprisoned it in the Elemental Chaos.

Prerequisite:

There is no full accounting of the primordials sealed away in the Elemental Chaos and elsewhere in the planes. Their roster is endless, their exploits too terrible to dwell upon. They are too powerful to die, too dangerous to live. The gods sealed them in the deepest depths to ensure that they would trouble the planes no more. During their imprisonment, the primordials have never ceased their efforts to escape and to resume the struggle against the gods they hate.

In exploring elemental magic, you have been touched by a primordial's essence. Perhaps only a dream has settled in your mind, or maybe a shard of a fallen primordial became lodged inside you. When you attain the epic tier, the shard awakens and begins merging its identity with yours until one day you become like a primordial.

实践天命 Living the Destiny

Although the primordial within you seeks to annihilate your identity, it has no choice but to bend to your will. At the same time, your growing power awakens the primordial in your thoughts, gradually drawing it out from its long slumber until its presence pervades your consciousness. By the time you complete your final quest, you might be ready to surrender your body and soul to the primordial—or descend into the Elemental Chaos to confront and destroy it for good.

21级：荒神重生 Primordial Rebirth

An elemental essence awakens inside you and lends you its power. The essence transforms you, turning you into a suitable vessel for its emerging presence.

Benefit: 你选择的一个属性值增加2点

你的起源变为元素界，如果它还不是的话，且你可以说，读，写荒神语 另外，选择下列之一：强酸，寒冰，火焰，闪电或雷鸣。你获得选择的伤害类型的15点抗力，且你在包括该伤害类型的伤害骰上获得+3加值

24级：荒神重生 Primordial Rebirth

Death cannot claim you as long as the primordial shares your body. If you fall in battle, the primordial awakens to your enemies' detriment.

Benefit: 每天一次，当你开始你的回合时生命值为0或更低，你恢复等同于你重伤值的生命值。当你这么做时，每个离你5格内的盟友可以花费一次回复力。另外，每个离你10格内的具有传奇天命的盟友获得20点临时生命值，且能以一个自由动作快步1格

26级：荒神形态 Primordial Form

The primordial essence strains against your body's limitations, demanding release and battering your psyche. When you give in to the primordial's demands, you become a monstrous creature, an elemental nightmare towering over the battlefield.

30级：荒神优势 Primordial Ascendance

You and the primordial merge. Now that your elemental nature is unfettered, it might seek to resume its war against the gods or turn its malign attention against other enemies. Your greatest successes renew and embolden your allies.

Benefit: 当你造成重击或将一个非杂兵敌人生命值降到0时，每个离你5格内的盟友获得10点临时生命值，且都在攻击骰上获得+2威能加值，直到你下一回合结束
Emergent Primordial Epic Destiny.requirements: 21级；元素界起源，[[生于元素 Born of the Elements]]专长，或任何元素威能

Perfect Assassin Epic Destiny.name: 完美刺客 Perfect Assassin
Perfect Assassin Epic Destiny.description:
你擅长屠戮，以至于它已成为你生命的一部分。你是死亡的阴影。

Prerequisite:

Slaying quickly and efficiently is an art, like composing music or painting a masterpiece. Your instruments are weapons, and your medium is enemy flesh. The hands are the true tools of any master. And your hands are sublime in their lethal skill.

You have worked this bloody trade for so long that they say death has suffused your body, spirit, and soul. Rumor has it that you see death hovering over your foes, showing you which one is next. Your enemies sense your connection with quietus, and it unnerves them. Your reputation as a killer has taken on supernatural proportions. Little do those know who hear your legend, but the tales about you are almost entirely true.

不朽？ Immortality?

In focusing on your deadliness, you have all but become extinction incarnate. Can death die in turn?

死亡永生 Death Can’t Die: By the time you have dealt death to your final adversary, you have perfected death-dealing beyond all mortal bounds. Any who have skill in your chosen art see you as an inspiration— a dark ideal. Some venerate you, and others hope to prove themselves superior to you by carving out their own sinister legends. No doubt you've attracted the attention of entities connected to the greatest forces of life's end.

You might choose to lead such creatures, guiding them along mortality's fickle paths. Instead, you could work as an operative of the Raven Queen, maybe even as a commander above cadres of the sorrowsworn. Perhaps to serve in shadow isn't good enough for you, and as other mortal beings have attempted before, you will challenge the beings of the cosmos that contend for authority over death. Could you be the one that determines who has that final authority?

Like the undying warrior, you might pass on your skills to those who seek you out, guiding them along the path you followed. If you tire of destruction, even the righteous kind, you can instead remove yourself from the cares of the world. You could live on quietly in a secluded part of existence, possibly in the company of your longtime allies.

The choice is yours. You are beyond the Raven Queen's grasp, unless one day you choose to surrender yourself to the final destination of most mortal souls. Perhaps you unravel death's remaining secrets for all mortals, dealing the fear of life's end a deathblow.

21级：死亡之眼 Death's Eye

Benefit: 当你将一个敌人的生命值降至0时，选择另一个你能看见的敌人。直到你下一回合结束，你对第二个敌人获得战斗优势，且它在对你的攻击骰上受到-2减值。

24级：刺客优势 Assassin's Advantage

Benefit: 当你对目标有战斗优势且攻击失手时，你对该目标造成你敏捷调整值 + 1×你「偷袭」通常会造成骰子数量的伤害。

26级：死亡之魂 Spirit of Death

30级：刺穿弱点 Pierce the Weakness

Benefit: 每遭遇一次，你可以选择让你的攻击对抗目标最低的防御，而不是该攻击通常对抗的防御。这次攻击即使你没有战斗优势，你也能造成「偷袭」伤害。这样做不会受到「偷袭」的次数限制。

Perfect Slayer Epic Destiny.name: 完美杀手 Perfect Slayer
Perfect Slayer Epic Destiny.description:
一个不朽的人注定要死去，而你会为那个人带来这一命运。

Prerequisite:

You were sent by the Raven Queen to slay a great threat to the cosmos, one that could unravel the very foundation of the planes. Though the Raven Queen is the mistress of death, she is usually content to allow each creature to find its death as its fate decrees. When death and misery spread on too wide a scale against the natural order, to the point when all life is threatened, a Perfect Slayer arises at her command.

As a Perfect Slayer, this might be your first incarnation as a mortal or one of many uncounted iterations. Your prior memories are misty at best, and you have only the barest understanding of the threat you have been dispatched to defeat. Perhaps you knew of the threat from the earliest days you practiced the assassin's art, but you might not have uncovered your quarry's true identity until you attained the heights of your power. You learn of your destiny only when your mistress deems it necessary. Legend holds that some day, the Raven Queen herself shall die on the blade of a Perfect Slayer. Perhaps that is the reason for her secrecy.

Your life has been an endless chase, but now the pursuit nears its end. Will you slay your quarry, or will you die in the attempt?

不朽 Immortality

What is immortality to one fated to end the life of an immortal being? You exist solely to ensure that a great threat to the cosmos dies. Once your task is done, then you can rest.

命定毁灭 Inevitable Doom: Death will someday come for you, just as it came to your victims. For you, however, death is by no means an end. You might slumber for eons, but if a great threat again manifests against the foundations of reality, the Raven Queen might once more release you into the world.

21级：战斗之王 Lord of Battle

Benefit: 你对身上至少有一层你的寿衣的敌人都有战斗优势。

21级：完美形态 Perfect Form

Benefit: 你的敏捷属性增加2点。

24级：淌血不屈 Blooded but Unbowed

Benefit: 当你的生命值降至0或更低时，如果任何敌人身上至少有一层你的寿衣，你保持清醒直到你下一回合结束，如果你在你的下一回合结束前将你@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.evmd1YQPrqU3RGW5]{刺客寿衣 Assassin's Shroud}的目标的生命值降至0，则你恢复生命值如同你花费了一个回复力。

26级：杀手判断 Killer's Judgment

30级：完美杀手 Perfect Killer

Benefit: 在你激活寿衣时，你的寿衣不会消失，除非你想让它们消失。

Perfect Guardian Epic Destiny.name: 完美守望者 Perfect Guardian
Perfect Guardian Epic Destiny.description:
被你作为伟大守望者的命运所祝福，你的自然形态发生了变化，以适应古老的精魂力量。

Prerequisite:

Force fills the winds that tear your clothes. Strength wells up from the stones beneath your feet. Having drawn this power into your being, you bend it to serve your will. Nature's might buttresses your attacks. Primeval resilience safeguards you and your companions. Your reshaped flesh demonstrates your true mastery over primal power. Long practice with your evocations allows you to fully apprehend nature's magic.
