You blend the gifts of your various guardian forms, until you start to acquire a resemblance to the Primal Beast of which those forms are all aspects.

The ease with which you harness primal power comes partly from your experience with nature's bounty, but also because the spirits entrust you with even greater energy. They willingly lend you their wisdom and might each time you draw from their abundant well. These spirits chose you to be their champion, and as such, they create new pathways for you to seize their strength and bind it to your body in incredible ways. This boon ensures that no despoiler of the world can stand against your wrath.

不朽 Immortality

The primal spirits entrust their guardian with fabulous power in exchange for eternal vigilance against nature's many foes.

永恒护卫者 Eternal Defender: The flood of power intensifies with each victory on the road toward fulfilling your Destiny Quest. As you near your quest's end, nature's hold on you manifests even when you are not wielding your power. Your natural appearance becomes more bestial and predatory, something like an echo of the Primal Beast even when you are not in a guardian form. When you seize your destiny, your instincts guide you to the fate you have earned. You travel the world until you come upon an ancient stone circle. The menhirs come to life, welcoming you as a brother or a sister and inviting you to stand vigil with them over the world. You take your place alongside these mighty wardens. You feel your skin hardening and your heartbeat slowing as you assume the final transformation. But your spirit roars, leaping into the sky to hunt down the enemies of the primal way with the aid of the rest of the elder spirits. Future generations won't just know your name—they will call on you as their ally and guardian.

21级：野性打击 Beast Strike

Benefit: 每轮一次，当你用近战攻击命中一个目标时，你将目标击倒。如果目标已经倒地，则此攻击改为造成2d8额外伤害，如果目标被你标记，则2d10额外伤害。

24级：哨兵之眼 Eyes of the Sentinel

Benefit: 你能看到离你5格内的隐形生物，并且你在发现隐藏生物的侦查检定上获得+5加值。

26级：完美守望者突进 Perfect Guardian's Pounce

30级：完美标记 Perfect Mark

Benefit: 作为你每个回合的第一个动作，你能以一个自由动作标记邻近你的所有敌人直到你下一回合开始。如果你用另一个标记取代了此敌人身上的此标记，则那个敌人在进行不包括你的攻击时，在攻击骰上受到-5减值，而不是-2减值，直到第二个标记结束。

Dead God Avatar Epic Destiny.name: 亡神化身 Dead God Avatar
Dead God Avatar Epic Destiny.description:
Constant devotion and unswerving dedication to the Raven Queen won you a place in her service. Now you command death and wield its power against any who would subvert it for their own dark purposes.

Prerequisite:

When you follow this destiny, you begin to transform into an avatar of your dead deity, but at a price. As you leech power from your deity, your soul slowly dwindles and rekindles glimmers of the deity's consciousness. You gain considerable power and mental resilience but sacrifice some of your life force to earn that power.

As this connection grows stronger, you also become more attuned to the lingering echoes of your deity's feelings and thoughts. You come as close to being one entity as is possible, and this brings the realization that you must surrender your individuality to ever bring your power to the next level and achieve the return of your deity—or, if you prefer, your transformation into a deity.

不朽？ Immortality?

Upon completion of your final quest, you disappear, leaving only dust, as you are entirely absorbed by your deity. You become part of it, aware of what happens in the world around you, but unable to participate while your deity is still dead.

Perhaps your sacrifice rejuvenates the dead deity, or it might increase the activity of the deity's cult, giving it a chance at resurrection in the future. If your deity is brought back, you return as its avatar. As its most loyal servant, you might yet play a role in the future of the faith.

21级：遵神谕令 By Divine Command

Benefit: 你获得10点心灵抗力，并免疫魅惑效果

21级：神圣洞察 Divine Insight

Benefit: 你的感知或魅力属性增加2点

24级：星界尸骸 Astral Corpse

Benefit: 你的灵魂已经习惯于探索众星之海的深处，当死亡召唤时，它会回到那里。通过最后的闪烁，你的灵魂可以收集你死去神祗消散的精华，并将其融合为生命的火花。虽然这个过程对你的伙伴来说只是片刻，但对你来说，感觉就像你漂泊了几天或几周。当你在一场遭遇中进行死亡豁免时，任何成功的豁免检定都会产生与你掷出20的相同效果。如果你没有回复力剩余，你会恢复等同于你回复力值的生命值。一旦此特性被使用，它就不能再被使用，直到你进行了一次长休息。

26级：召唤神圣存在 Summon Divine Presence

30级：献祭 Sacrifice

Benefit: 以一个次要动作，你能花费一个回复力。你恢复一个遭遇威能而不是恢复生命值。每天一次，你能以上述方式恢复一个每日威能，而不是遭遇威能。
Dead God Avatar Epic Destiny.requirements: 21级，必须信仰已死亡的神祗，神术威能来源

Planeshaper Epic Destiny.name: 位面塑造者 Planeshaper
Planeshaper Epic Destiny.description:
从无到有,你的思想和意志塑造了一个神域 。

Prerequisite:

神域即是众星之海的星星，每个神域都含有一个奇妙的世界，它们首先从一个概念的种子演化而来，最终绽放成一个独特的世界，反映出它所产生的愿景和想象力。虽然许多神域都在众星之海中，但其他神域却在等待着成形，然后加入那些已经在银色的虚空中漂流的神域。你发现了这些未成形神域的其中之一，由你来决定它将成为什么形式。

星界之种的演化是缓慢的，并在你的引导下逐渐扩张和转变。你不能催促它的形成，否则它就会四分五裂，然后溶入银色的迷雾中。你还必须学习磨练你的手艺，以便你能达到出正确雕刻国度所需的精准度。拥有创造和改变一个正在形成中的神域的性质的能力，会孕育出你熟悉众星之海其他才能，无论你走到哪里，你都会发挥这些能力。然而，你领会了这种创造的力量，起初是通过微小的操纵，但最终通过一种令人不安的掌握和轻松预示着你即将成就的伟大。

不朽 Immortality

尽管在你的手中可塑性很强，但这个世界对你的能力和天赋来说太过局限，所以你超越了你自己，拥抱了你的命运。

现实之主 Master of reality: 现实的主人。从你发现星界之种的那一刻起，你已经花费了大量的时间和精力来打造这个国度。尽管你和一些盟友最终能够探索你工作的成果，但直到你完成了命定任务，这个不断成长的神域才觉醒为一个完整神域——一个星界之国与天堂——你和任何你允许的人在其大地上行走。在你的收容所准备好之后，你收集你的东西，在各个位面上溜达，以实现它的最终形态，升起山脉，形成海洋，并欢迎那些你喜欢的生物分享它的辉煌，只要他们愿意留下来。

作为你自己神域的主人，并完全控制它的性质，你会发现自己与你的根源保持距离。王国之间的争吵，帝国的兴衰，以及普通人的闹剧，在你所拥有的权力和你所面临的维持你不断增长的神域的问题面前，都显得微不足道。此外，维持你的神域需要精力，并消耗你的大部分注意力，直到你在你的神域之外的活动越来越少，直到你发现自己不愿意离开你创造的天堂。在你最后的日子里，你将自己的灵魂与这个国度结合起来以永远保存它，以作为你想象力的证明，这同时也确保了你的不朽。

21级：终极掌握 Ultimate Adaptation

Benefit: 你的智力属性增加2点，在每次长休息后，你可以选择一个遭遇威能。你能在每场遭遇中使用那个遭遇威能2次。当你进行了另一次长休息后，你可以选择另一个遭遇威能。

24级：星界重击 Astral Critical

Benefit: 当你对一个敌人造成重击时，你能选择同时将那个敌人从游戏中移除，送去你的星界之种。目标从其位置消失，并在你的下一回合开始时重新出现。

26级：位面庇护 Planar Refuge

30级：塑造现实 Shape Reality

Benefit: 你对宇宙的超然理解让你能够修改和扭曲你周围的环境。你获得一个灵气10，让你能够按照你认为的合适的方式重塑现实。在每个你的回合内有一次，你可以通过花费一个次要动作以下列任何方式改变环境。

* 改变温度。在你的灵气内开始回合的生物自动受到15点寒冰伤害或15点火焰伤害（由你选择）。你能花费另一个次要动作将温度改为正常的，移除此伤害效果。 * 将你灵气内的任意困难地形永久性改为通常地形。 * 将你灵气内的任意通常地形永久性改为困难地形。 * 在所有或者任意格子内创造可供呼吸的空气。 * 用固体表面填充9格未被占据的格子，例如石块或木头。如果你用固体表面填充的格子没有接触任何其他表面（也就是说，你在空中创造了一个离地5格的石板），则表面悬在那里。

Witch Queen Epic Destiny.name: 巫师女皇 Witch Queen
Witch Queen Epic Destiny.description:
You are a master of witches and have learned the secret to incorporating the tremendous power of magic into your very being. With such power, your name is destined to be remembered with awe.

Prerequisite:

Few heroes have borne the name Witch Queen (or Witch King), but those few have inspired awe, fear, and dread.

These beings become living legends, the stock character in the myths, fairy tales, and horror stories of every race, as awe-inspiring as they are terrifying. Those who have accepted this mantle have learned to incorporate their power into their being, no longer treating it as a source separate from their form.

Before becoming a Witch Queen, those who aspired to fill the role were conflicted between three aspects: one's power, one's familiar, and one's self. But when one becomes a king or queen of all witches, these aspects merge, allowing a Witch Queen or Witch King to bring forth spells as easily as if his or her familiar had whispered the arcane words directly into their ear. These individuals are near equals to their patrons in power, and armies clamor to their banners, while mortals and immortals alike seek their counsel to beg their favor or plead for their mercy.

实践天命 Living the Destiny

As your power grows, you ascend to a status like that of royalty among others who practice your craft. Though you are not a monarch in the true sense, the power you wield means that many bow to your wishes, or face your wrath. You stand as an equal to fey nobles, and eventually grow in power to challenge the Summer Queen. More than a formidable spellcaster, you are now a player in the great power struggles of the Feywild.

When you approach the peak of your power, others will challenge you, trying to end your rise before you become a rival to their masters. You might face assassins, powerful fey, or even armies that wish to put an end to your ascension, but those conflicts are the bedrock for the stories to come that extol your greatness. In time, you might fade into the myths and legends of the natural world, but your rise to power— and the deeds both cruel and kind that you become known for—will become the fairy tales of tomorrow.

21级：巫师至尊 Witch Apotheosis

As one of the mightiest witches, you have experienced an apotheosis and become one with your power. Now, even when your foes would strike you down, your familiar can whisk your spirit away so that you can regenerate.

Benefit: 当你的魔宠在场，每天你第一次将要死亡时，你不会死亡。改为，你的魔宠抓住你的灵魂，然后它从游戏中移除，带着你的灵魂来到一个秘密的超位面避难所。在24小时后，你为你的灵魂塑造一副新身体，且你重新出现在一个当你死亡时在场的盟友附近。若当你死亡时没有盟友在场，或那些盟友已不再活着，则你可以出现在你上一次进行长休息的地方

24级：巫师女皇姿态 Witch Queen's Presence

The power your patron has bestowed upon you radiates from every fiber of your being, manifesting around you like the majestic aspect of a god when you steel yourself against harm.

Benefit: 当你使用你的回气时，你获得15点全伤害抗力，且在豁免骰上获得+5加值。这些增益持续到你下一回合结束

26级：真实预言 True Prophecy

The future is always in flux, but a Witch Queen can behold the immediate course of events as easily as a common farmer gazes at distant clouds and predicts rain. To glean more concrete details about a nearfuture event, you can use the true prophecy power to view an event's possible outcomes and prepare for them. The context of the event might be ambiguous or surprising, but the knowledge you gain is enough to prepare yourself or an ally against the dangers that are to come.

30级：天赋掌握 Mastery of the Gift

At last your learning is complete. Your gift of power is no longer a force you call upon, but a trait inherent in your very being. Now, even your least used spells form upon your lips in an instant, marshaling to your command as soldiers before a fearsome monarch.

Benefit: 在短休息结束时，当你与你的魔宠交流时，你可以将一个你的法师遭遇攻击威能替换成另一个法师遭遇攻击威能。新威能必须有等级，且它的等级必须和旧威能的等级一样

Invincible Vanguard Epic Destiny.name: 无敌先锋 Invincible Vanguard
Invincible Vanguard Epic Destiny.description:
最先投入战斗，最后一个离开，你既是矛也是盾。

Prerequisite:

当战役爆发时，你将自己投入到激烈的战斗中。带头冲锋在前，与所有敌人对抗，不管他们有多强大，有多少人，有多可怕，有多致命。你的战吼声音嘹亮，激励你的盟友寻回勇气，去发觉诸神为他们准备好的命运。

你在战斗中是一团模糊不清的影子，攻击，跳开，然后再攻击。每当你的武器咬住敌人，死亡就会随之而来。尸体遍布在你身后的地面。你在战斗中显得鲁莽，以至于很长一段时间内，你的盟友都认为你总是冒不必要的风险，把你自己和他们置于危险之中。然而随着一次又一次出色的胜利，你证明了你无所顾忌的勇气只能带来胜利和荣耀。

不朽 Immortality

你不会走向你的命运，而是跑向它。每一次胜利都使你在获取荣耀和巩固你在传奇中的地位方面更近一步。每次你打败一个敌人，你就开始寻找下一个，在你身后只留下杀戮的痕迹。你追寻着你最终的敌人，在击溃它们后，你将认识到你在世界和历史上的地位。

永恒战士 Eternal Warrior: 漫长的道路通向一场高潮之战，你将在这场战斗中清算旧账并完成你与生俱来的使命。长久以来你一直追逐你的命运，在这条道路的尽头你没有感到失望，相反，你对你所经历的战斗指向这最终冲突激动不已。

在感觉只是片刻之后，战斗结束，敌人被打败了。在你品尝胜利之前，突然，你意识到你的任务仍未完成。还有要斗争的战役，还有要赢得的战争。你从这个世界榨干了它能提供的一切，现在你必须寻找新的场地和事件来测试你的勇气。

21级：激昂冲锋 Invigorating Charge

Benefit: 你的力量增加2点

当你冲锋并进行一次基本攻击时，该攻击获得“鼓舞”关键字。

另外，你可以在冲锋后使用动作。

24级：永恒争斗 Forever War

Benefit: 每天你第一次生命值降到0或更低时，你恢复等同于你重伤值的生命值。以一个自由动作，你起身并快步2格，然后进行一次冲锋攻击。如果这次攻击命中，则你获得等同于你重伤值的临时生命值。

26级：无尽突袭 Endless Assault

30级：势不可挡 Unstoppable Assault

Benefit: 当你用近战攻击对一个敌人造成重击，或者重伤一个敌人，或者将一个敌人的生命值降低到0时，你能以一个自由动作，对该敌人以外的一个生物进行一次冲锋攻击。

另外，你冲锋时不会引发借机攻击。

Invincible Mind Epic Destiny.name: 无敌之心 Invincible Mind
Invincible Mind Epic Destiny.description:
你不再只是一个战士。现在你是战争的化身。

Prerequisite:

Across the world and beyond, you have sought the mightiest foes. Giants, dragons, orc kings, demons, and devils have fallen before you. Your skill is unmatched by mortals, and now you turn your attention to the mightiest beings in the cosmos. As you enter the epic tier, you have but one goal: to carve your name in the annals of history as the mightiest warrior of all time.

Many have attempted to travel this road, but few have seen it through to the end. You have searched for their names in ancient tomes. Here and there you find stories of champions who opposed the mightiest beings in the cosmos but died while trying to slay them. By studying their mistakes, you have learned to avoid those errors. When the time comes for you to batter down the gates of Bane's fortress or to cross swords with Asmodeus himself, you will be ready.

Wherever you wander, tales of your deeds spread. Some of those who hear the stories seek you out in hopes of proving their talents by defeating you. Others swear fealty to you, seeing in your crusade the chance for an immortality of their own. You accept both challengers and allies. The former give you the practice you need to hone your skills, while the latter form the army you will one day lead to crush your chosen quarry.

Your life has been a long battle, but now it nears its end. Will you carry the day and achieve undying fame, or will your example serve as a warning to those who travel this path in the future?

不朽 Immortality

Your immortality lies not in extending your life beyond its normal limits, but in conquering a foe the world deems unbeatable. Some day, after you defeat a demon lord, an archdevil, or even a god, your victory will echo through history forever.

不败传说 Unconquered Master: Once you have established that you are the greatest warrior who ever lived, what else is there for you to pursue? Challengers arise, but none can match you. In time, you fade from the world and become a creature of pure psionic magic, content to be the measuring stick for all who come after you. Your fighting style lives on as a new psionic philosophy.

21级：战斗主宰 Battle Sovereignty

Benefit: 你在先攻检定上获得+10加值，在武器攻击骰上获得+2加值。

24级：振作打击 Reinvigorating Attack

Benefit: 当你灵能点为0且用一个未强化的战魂随意攻击命中一个敌人，你恢复2个灵能点。

26级：不屈战略 Indomitable Strategem

30级：无敌 Invincible

Benefit: 每当你的生命值降至0或更低，你能以一个即时中断花费一个回复力。

Ceaseless Guardian Epic Destiny.name: 无尽守护者 Ceaseless Guardian
Ceaseless Guardian Epic Destiny.description:
胜利可以在一瞬间变成悲剧。你不会让这一瞬间成为现实。

Prerequisite:

You failed to protect someone in your care. It might have been a friend, a family member, or a former member of your adventuring party, but you feel responsible for that loss. In return, you've rededicated yourself to the ideal of the defender—a protector of friends and a fierce obstacle to foes—but with a specific focus. All enemies will learn that the only way to defeat your allies is by going through you first, and your abilities lend you an alacrity many cannot match.

To succeed at being the first line of defense, you have trained to take advantage of every opening that your enemies leave you as quickly as possible. To those around you, you move twice as fast as any other defender to blunt your foes' attacks. You see it as a natural progression that anyone of enough skill could attain, though your desire to not see anyone else lost drives you beyond the point of mere humans.

As you grow in skill, your ability to react to enemies quickly continues to grow. An attempted ambush turns into a disaster for your foes as you move in before they are ready. When you reach the apex of your power, your oath to never allow an ally to fall before you can finally be fulfilled. You can channelyour strength into those whom you have sworn to protect, keeping them standing long after your enemies would otherwise have overwhelmed them.

不朽 Immortality

You stopped fearing your own death a long time ago. In doing so, you have denied death's power over you. Although you can die, it seems that you are raised again by a member of your adventuring party, someone seeking the ideal bodyguard, or a god. You might be recruited to fight alongside a Legendary General in one of the wars that span the planes. You might join with a World Tree Guardian who understands your devotion to your allies, or with an Undying Warrior whom you can trust to remain safe on his or her own. Very rarely, you find a small place of the world to which to retire for a time, but the call to protect others eventually leads you back into battle again.

21级：守护心智 Guardian Mindfulness

Benefit: 你选择的一个属性增加2点，并且你的速度增加1

24级：不屈防御 Irrepressible Defense

Benefit: 即使你晕眩或震慑，你也能进行即时动作和借机动作。

26级：时刻就绪 Always Ready

30级：没有下次 Never Again

Martial Archetype Epic Destiny.name: 武术巅峰 Martial Archetype
Martial Archetype Epic Destiny.description:
你诞生于你对战斗形式的完美掌握，你是毁灭的容器。你武术力量的体现。

Prerequisite:

From the moment you could raise a sword, you knew your destiny lay along its keen edge, your future in the hilt and pommel, and your legacy in the mastery of this single piece of steel. You spent your youth training. You honed your technique and studied the martial forms of combat. As you grew and set out from your humble beginning, your adventures exposed you to the exploits of countless combatants. In them, you became sure of a common connection, a link binding all who live and die by the sword.

Try as you might, this fundamental truth of martial power eluded you. For some reason, its perfect truth continued to slip beyond you reach, but remained just visible behind your mastery. You thought that through incomparable discipline, practice, and innovation, you'd find it once more and this time never let it go.

Driven by the vision of your potential, you redoubled your efforts, devoting your attention to the possibility of ultimate fighting prowess. You remain confident that one you will day perfect your maneuvers. When that day comes, you will stand among the greatest warriors who have ever lived.

不朽？ Immortality?

Each step on the road to mastering the fighting arts, you draw closer to the realization of your full potential. The dawning understanding brought on with each new revelation impels you further, to seek out and learn more until you attain the heights of true mastery.

传奇大师 Legendary Master: With a practiced strike, you dispatch the last foe, the final obstacle standing between you and the fulfillment of your final quest. With this triumph, something stirs inside your consciousness. It is as if your last exploit unlocked a door in your mind, throwing it open to reveal the secrets you have long sought. The revelation strikes you to the soul, ripping away the last doubts, the last of your reluctance to push further and lay bare the true depth of martial mastery.

With full comprehension of these fundamental truths fixed in your mind and displayed in your incomparable techniques, you set out to teach others. Mysteries you have struggled to master you can now impart to those new to the sword. Through these scions you will live forever. As your fighting techniques are passed down, your memory will grow beyond your legendary exploits. Your martial mysticism shall transcend the mortal coil to become a living part of the power all warriors use.

21级：至高之巅 Archetype's Edge

Benefit: 你从任意武术职业获得一个17级遭遇攻击威能。同时，当你造成重击时，你恢复一个在此遭遇中使用过的武术遭遇攻击威能的使用。

24级：可靠斗士 Reliable Warrior

Benefit: 你的所有武术遭遇攻击威能都获得可靠关键字，只要该威能只有一个目标，且在失手时没有效果。

26级：斗士升华 Warrior's Ascent

Benefit: 你从任意武术职业获得一个22级辅助威能。同时，当你用武术遭遇或每日攻击威能造成重击时，你能以一个自由动作花费一个回复力。

30级：完美斗士 Perfect Warrior

Benefit: 你从任意武术职业获得一个任意等级的遭遇攻击威能或辅助威能。同时，当你用武术遭遇或每日威能造成重击时，你能以一个自由动作对每个邻近你的敌人进行一次近战基本攻击。
Martial Archetype Epic Destiny.requirements: 21级，任意武术职业，典范兼职一个武术职业

Heir of Siberys Epic Destiny.name: 西伯瑞斯后嗣 Heir of Siberys
Heir of Siberys Epic Destiny.description:
我的命运就在龙纹里。并非侍奉我的家族，而是...更进一步的东西。

Prerequisite:

大多数有龙纹的人在青春期就会显现出他们的印记，那时龙纹家族的后嗣会接受一种叫做 "西伯瑞斯的考验 "的仪式。这个考验将年轻的后嗣们置于高压的环境中，希望他们的龙纹能够显现出来。然而，西伯瑞斯龙纹，打破了所有的常规。

西伯瑞斯龙纹的魔力十分强大，而且从本质上说是不可预测的。这种龙纹比其家族中的普通龙纹更大、也更精致，但普通龙纹发展成西伯瑞斯龙纹的情况很少——更多的时候，西伯瑞斯龙纹出现在家族中以前没有龙纹的年长成员的身上。甚至比普通龙纹更重要的是，西伯瑞斯龙纹被视为龙喻之触——一个角色与世界命运不可分割的联系。

龙纹家族对带有西伯瑞斯龙纹的成员保持谨慎的关注。如果西伯瑞斯龙纹能被用来为家族所有，那么家族的领导人就会满足于此，但如果西伯瑞斯后嗣没有被家族牢牢控制，就有可能被刺杀。

在游戏中，一个角色可以使用西伯瑞斯龙纹这一传奇天命，来反映这一特殊龙纹的存在。大多数拥有西伯瑞斯龙纹的角色之前都没有龙纹，但如果一个角色已经已经拥有龙纹专长，这也不会阻碍他选择这传奇天命。

这是一个任何西伯瑞斯后嗣都可以选择的通用天命，不过该天命在第26级时赋予的辅助威能取决于角色的特定西伯瑞斯龙纹。你也可以为每个西伯瑞斯龙纹，甚至为每个拥有这种龙纹的人定制独特的传奇天命。西伯瑞斯后嗣，就其本质而言，不容易被归类，他们之间或与其他龙纹角色之间几乎没有共同之处。

不朽 Immortality

你的命运写在龙喻中，它比你短暂的凡人生命更伟大。当龙喻在你的皮肤上显现，你对龙喻的意义和实现预言的各种方式有了越来越深入的理解。更重要的是，你开始明白，虽然你是宇宙戏剧中的一个角色，但你同时也是剧作家，你掌控着你自己的命运，不受某种既定未来的约束，无论龙喻说什么。

龙喻不朽 The Eternal Prophecy: 当你完成了龙喻中为你准备的东西，或者你在龙喻中写下了自己的命运——你可能会从世界上消失一段时间。但正如龙喻的印记会出现在大地的骨头上一样，你的西伯瑞斯龙纹也是世界的一部分。龙喻就是艾伯伦，艾伯伦就是龙喻，而你同样是两者的一部分。如果世界在未来需要你，你可能会选择再次以肉身显现，被你皮肤上的龙喻印记永远改变。

21级：西伯瑞斯之祝福 Blessing of Siberys

Benefit: 你选择两个不同的属性值各增加2点

21级：西伯瑞斯之意志 Will of Siberys

Benefit: 每次你对一个可豁免终止的效果的豁免失败时，你就在对该效果的豁免检定上获得可叠加的+2加值，直到该效果结束。

24级：西伯瑞斯之命脉 Lifeblood of Siberys

Benefit: 每日一次，当你的生命值降到0或更低，或者当你的一次死亡豁免检定失败时，你能够花费两个回复力。

26级：西伯瑞斯后嗣威能 Heir of Siberys Powers

你获得下列威能中的一个，取决于你拥有的特定西伯瑞斯龙纹。

30级：龙喻讲者 Speaker of Prophecy

Benefit: 当你的遭遇攻击威能对每个目标都失手时，此威能不被消耗。

Avatar of Hope Epic Destiny.name: 希望化身 Avatar of Hope
Avatar of Hope Epic Destiny.description:
暴政、奴役、压迫——这些都是你的敌人。你与那些自命不凡的人作斗争。

Prerequisite:

As an avatar of hope, you are an aspect of a god of hope who has chosen to incarnate himself or herself in a mortal body for a time. You now know that you are both your deity and your own mortal shell at the same time. When you speak, when you act, your god speaks and acts through you. No matter what your name, you are a beacon of hope in a dark world.

Sorrow cannot abide your presence; you bring optimism and virtue to places of despair and sadness. You are an enemy of all the gods of evil, for they are destroyers of hope. You hold particular vehemence toward devils and demons—devils for their malicious practices, and demons for their recklessly destructive intentions. It's true that you've seen some terrible sights during your travels—murder, cruelty, slavery, war—but these horrors only fortify your determination. By your power, the points of light that lie within a sea of darkness burn a little brighter for a time.

不朽 Immortality

You have fought battles against despair all your life, bringing light to the darkest corners of the world. Your experience has taught you that people need only a little inspiration to find hope, so you have set yourself the task of providing an example, a legend, that will inspire people for ages to come.

神性再聚 Divine Reunion: When you complete your Destiny Quest, your soul bursts forth in a golden flame that consumes your mortal form, and you are reunited with your immortal self.

21级：不屈勇气 Indomitable Courage

Benefit: 你免疫恐惧效果。另外，你和离你5格内的每个盟友都在豁免检定上获得+1加值。

21级：不屈意志 Undaunted Will

Benefit: 你的感知和魅力属性都增加2点

24级：希望复苏 Hopeful Revival

Benefit: 每天第一次你开始你的回合时濒死或死亡，你复活。你恢复等同于你重伤值的生命值，并且离你10格内的所有盟友获得20点临时生命值。

26级：提振精神 Elevate the Spirit

30级：心灵凯旋 Triumph of the Heart

Benefit: 每天一次，你能将一个盟友掷出的d20的结果改为20。对你来说这不需要任何动作，但你必须意识清醒才能这么做。
Avatar of Hope Epic Destiny.requirements: 21级，[[希望存留 <神力> Hope Remains <Divinity>]]专长

Shiradi Champion Epic Destiny.name: 夏拉蒂卫士 Shiradi Champion
Shiradi Champion Epic Destiny.description:
You live to serve Tiandra, the Queen of Summer, and the Court of Stars. In exchange for your service, the queen lets you draw power from her to protect the Feywild and its inhabitants from evil.

Prerequisite:

Myriad archfey band together several times a year at the congress known as the Court of Stars, where they engage in diplomacy, schemes, marriages, betrayals, and legendary revels. Although dozens of lesser factions make up the Court of Stars, they mostly acknowledge the leadership of Her Summer Majesty, Queen Tiandra. And the Queen of Summer, when the need arises, turns to her anointed warriors for the defense of her subjects and allies. These warriors are known as Shiradi Champions, the shields of the fey.

Whereas eladrin nobles might rise through the ranks of coures, bralanis, ghaeles, and other complex titles, Shiradi Champions are usually individuals who have earned the respect and trust of Queen Tiandra. Archfey of all courts assemble at Senaliesse to bear witness to a champion's anointing. Some eye these protectors with suspicion, arrogance, or envy, but their pettiness is ill placed. Each Shiradi Champion is devoted to the lovely Queen of Summer and determined to justify her trust.

Some eladrin Shiradi Champions are also shiere knights (see Player's Handbook 2). A very few champions are not born as one of the fey, and their ascendancy to the role of Shiradi Champion is an unprecedented event, a testament to the champion's unique valor and great worth. Whatever path a champion takes, he or she is assuredly an ally and protector of good-natured fey beings everywhere.

实践天命 Living the Destiny

You have become a legend among legends, and your anointment as a Shiradi Champion echoes throughout the world. Your name is used in bedtime stories and folk tales as a synonym for chivalry and courage. Fey seek you out, asking for your help. Mortals call your name out at fey crossings, seeking your might against enemies equally legendary. It is your burden to help them, thus spreading the influence of the Court of Stars.

Your greatest task is the defense of the Court of Stars from those who would see it torn asunder. You and your allies stand against cyclops warlords, mad fomorian kings, and dreadful hags, beating back their advances and recovering the lands lost during centuries of battle. In time, you might even receive a request for aid from the Queen of Summer to face down her own son, the Prince of Frost, mightiest of the Winter Fey. You strive to be ready for the task.

As a Shiradi Champion, you are the ultimate defender of all the good things represented by the Court of Stars. Your powers reflect the ephemeral and radiant nature of the Feywild's rulers.

21级：精界洗礼 Fey Anointment

By the hand of Queen Tiandra, you are anointed as an exalted member of the Court of Stars. The blessings of the queen give greater power to your personality and quicker reactions to your body. Your eyes become the colored orbs common among the eladrin, but with a shining, golden tinge seen only among the higher nobles of the Court of Stars, and darkness poses no impediment to your sight.

Benefit: 你选择的一个属性值增加2点

你免疫魅惑效果

你的起源变为妖精界，意味着在考虑有关生物起源的效果时，你被视为妖精界生物

你获得黑暗视觉，且你免疫目盲状态

24级：星辰护甲 Armor of Stars

The magic inherent to the Feywild suffuses your entire being, granting you a graceful majesty. As long as you are not injured, tiny motes of light swirl about you like constellations, shielding you from attacks. The protection these "stars" offer improves when other Shiradi Champions stand at your side.

Benefit: 当你未重伤时，你在AC和反射上获得+1加值。若你邻近一个或更多夏拉蒂卫士盟友，则此加值为+2

26级：谒见女王 Audience with the Queen

As a champion of the Court of Stars, you have the privilege of requesting immediate audiences with Queen Tiandra. Upon your arrival, Her Summer Majesty heals your wounds with a touch. With brief words that reveal much to her, you explain the dire situation you are facing. Queen Tiandra’s wise counsel offers you guidance through your trials. When you share this advice with other Shiradi Champions, they are also fortified by their queen’s soothing words.

30级：永恒卫士 Everlasting Champion

As you reach the pinnacle of your power, you are no longer a mere mortal, but rather an archetype made flesh. As a version of you falls, another takes its place. Its appearance might be slightly different, but its determination is unshakable.

Benefit: 每天一次，当你开始你的回合时生命值为0或更低，你的身体变形成和你自己有一点轻微差异的形态，尽管你的游戏数据和装备不会改变。当你变形时，你恢复等同于你重伤值的生命值，你能以一个自由动作起身，且任何影响你的负面效果立刻结束

另外，你的攻击造成等同于你魅力调整值的额外光耀伤害，直到遭遇结束

Exemplar of Evil Epic Destiny.name: 邪恶楷模 Exemplar of Evil
Exemplar of Evil Epic Destiny.description:
现在没有人可以阻止我了。我站在了不朽的边缘。世界将永远知道我的名字和事迹！

Prerequisite:

You have walked through the darkest shadows to achieve your destiny. You have sacrificed companions, betrayed allies, and performed acts so despicable they are legendary. You are beyond temptation. You have passed through the veil of corruption and unmasked true evil. You bask in the awful glory of true wickedness.

It no longer matters why you descended into darkness. The past is trivial. What matters now is that you secure your place in the cosmos or destroy it in the process. Your destiny is to become one of the world's greatest antiheroes, to carve your name in the annals of history through blood and death. The objective you seek is what you were born to do, the act you were made to perform. You have come this far; you will not allow anything to stop you.

不朽 Immortality

Your fate is not to create a good work, to stand at a god's side in the heavens, or to build a nation. Your fate is to become part of history, a nightmare in flesh and bone that torments generations to follow. You seek an end most terrible, a goal even the darkest gods would reel against. Your aim is singularly evil. Its fulfillment will leave the world forever after changed, undoubtedly for the worse. When you choose this epic destiny, you should have some notion of the evil outcome you hope to achieve. Communicate this idea with your Dungeon Master so he or she can devise the various goals you must meet to achieve this destiny.

21级：属性值增加 Ability Score Increase

You might be a soulless butcher, a cunning opportunist, a vile cultist who consorts with demons, or a perverse spellcaster who dabbles in the darkest arts. Whatever you are, your abilities increase as a result, proving to all the significance of your threat.

Benefit: 你选择的两个不同的属性值都增加2点。

24级：传奇邪恶 Epic Evil

Vile darkness drives your attacks. Each spell you cast, each swing from your weapon, leaves your enemies shrieking and maimed. The evil you work lingers in the tortured carcasses you create.

Benefit: 当你用攻击杀死一个生物时，它的空间会变成一个持续到你下一回合结束的区域。当在区域内或邻近区域时，任何你的敌人在攻击骰上都会受到-2减值，并提供战斗优势。

26级：罪恶集结 Vile Assembly

You cannot fail. Even if you wanted to enter the void, the dark powers lending you strength would not allow it. When you fall, your body dissolves into a noisome slick or a mass of crawling vermin. Moments later, you reappear and continue your dreadful work.

30级：不择手段 Victory at Any Price

Your allies serve a purpose. They exist to help you fulfill your destiny. They are commodities to be drained as your dark will dictates. When you use this power, you debilitate an ally to impose a devastating fate on an enemy.

Radiant One Epic Destiny.name: 星耀者 Radiant One
Radiant One Epic Destiny.description:
世界和它的回声不过是一个更宏大，甚至更可怕的不可理解的视野中的微尘。你毫不畏惧，甚至渴望冒着无尽疯狂的风险，只要你能了解存在的基本真相。

Prerequisite:

比你更弱小的灵魂已经在探究无情星辰的过程中疯掉了。没能够掌握自己的命运，他们被转化成了纯粹的棋子和邪教徒。他们的面容被巨大的兜帽遮住，他们瞪着眼睛，流着口水，落入了疯狂神明的魔掌之中。那不是你的命运。你在无尽虚空中那渺茫的希望上看到了不同的真相。与其成为棋子，你打算成为执棋者。你计划让你的意志力闪耀，永远燃烧。与其他作为窗口的星辰不同，也许，是通往遥远国度内扭曲实体的窗口，你散发的光芒是你自己的认知，并向外扩散。

那些没有知识的人认为，星耀者只不过是你所追寻的巨大神秘生物的仆从。的确，其它走上你这条道路的人已经被燃烬，释放出的灾难杀死了盟友，腐蚀了君主，甚至毁掉了王国（还有人悄悄说，那是世界的前身）。你知道这些警告性的故事，所以如果有任何你从中汲取力量的势力想要征服你的意志，你就会提前被警告。你的盟友不用畏惧你——如果你小心的话。

不朽 Immortality

终极的知识，那些失落的隐约的东西，简单的幻觉，还有那些误导性的暗示正是你所追求的。那些东西很快就会属于你。

第一束光 First Light: 当你完成你的命定任务时，现实的最后一块拼图开始落到实处。星辰们为你，为他们的同胞而歌唱。你开始熠熠生辉，你的皮肤仿佛包裹着一盏强大明灯的外壳。在把你的事务安排妥当后，你前往一个遥远的地方。最后，你在恒星光辉的爆炸中点燃。像半神一样，你升入夜空，最终自己成为一颗星——与诡异的智慧有关。或者，也许，是疯狂。无论怎样，你的名字在星座中占据应有的位置。

21级：星生 Starborn

Benefit: 你获得等同于10 + 你等级的火焰抗力和光耀抗力。当你对一个向你提供战斗优势的目标造成伤害时，你对目标造成等同于你智力调整值的额外火焰和光耀伤害。

24级：星爆 Starburst

Benefit: 每天第一次，当你的生命值降至0或更低时，你可以立刻花费一个回复力，并对离你3格内的所有敌人造成同等数值的火焰和光耀伤害。

26级：星巨 Star Flesh

30级：星隙 Star Rift

Benefit: 你对现实和空间规则的理解让你能够在时间中走“捷径”。每天一次，你可以告诉DM，又到你的回合了。把这个动作视为你选择了延后回合（即使你的上一个回合是正常没有延迟的）。

Star-Favored Champion Epic Destiny.name: 星之宠儿 Star-Favored Champion
Star-Favored Champion Epic Destiny.description:
你出生的时候，你的伟大在就已经写在了星星上。当你的故事结束后，你的形象将在夜空中继续存在。

Prerequisite:

You were destined for greatness from your earliest days. As a child, you took to weapons with a natural talent that astonished your tutors. In the early days of your career, your skill, athleticism, and courage surprised everyone. Later, your comrades came to expect nothing less of you than the utmost.

You became aware of a force at work in your life, an inexorable pull drawing you toward the most daunting challenges and the greatest adventures. Even insignificant decisions led you down the path of danger, and against each adversity, you triumphed. In time, you realized that a star in the sky was bound to your fortune.

When you suffer trouble or doubt, your star is dim and low in the sky. When you master your circumstances and defeat your foes, your star ascends and grows brighter. On the occasions when your actions and valor shake the thrones of kings or the pillars of the heavens, your star blazes with a glory marked by sages and astrologers throughout the world. Your star's passage through the constellations of great monsters matches your battles against dire foes, and its journeys into signs of wealth or fortune mark the boons you receive.

不朽 Immortality

The story of your greatness is written in the sky for everyone to see. In time, the gods themselves perceive the significance of your star's ascension. From that day on, mighty powers gather around you, and your star is drawn toward its most dangerous passages and most spectacular glories.

群星之忆 A Memory in the Stars: When you complete your final battle, your star comes to rest. Lesser stars array themselves around it, giving shape to a new constellation—a representation of you to inspire mortals for eternity. You are welcomed in the astral dominions of the gods who favored you, honored for your heroism and courage. Then you take a place within your constellation, your eternal presence shod in stardust and crowned with brilliance. Your story is passed on in myth as mortals give you a name—the Swordsman, the Archer, the Captain, or the Hunter—recounting stories of the hero who bestrides the skies in starry glory.

21级：宠爱韧性 Favored Tenacity

Benefit: 当你遭遇威能的第一个攻击骰失手时，直到你回合结束，你能以一个次要动作进行一次基本攻击。

21级：宠爱战士 Favored Warrior

Benefit: 你的体质属性增加2点。你在杂技和运动检定上获得+2加值。

24级：星之复苏 Resurgent Star

Benefit: 当你有至少一个回复力剩余时，你在死亡豁免上自动获得20作为结果。

26级：希望象征 Sign of Hope

30级：挑战标记 Sign of Challenge

Guardian of the Void Epic Destiny.name: 虚空守卫 Guardian of the Void
Guardian of the Void Epic Destiny.description:
你在生死之间的一条道路上谨慎地前行，你利用堕影冥界的力量捍卫死亡，也用来保护无数的生者。

Prerequisite:

堕影冥界是一处死亡的领域，是宇宙中唯一能把所有的生者联系在一起的地方。从卑微的乞丐，到强大的皇帝也不例外。甚至连神祗也会被死亡伤害。在神祗与荒神的黎明之战中，许多神明在战争中陨落。从那时起，神祗会死于恶魔，甚至是凡人之手。

有些生物需求逃离死亡，一位法师走上巫妖之道，来获取永生。一位炼金术士酿造一种秘密的灵药，将其生命延长了数个世纪。这些人只不过是延缓了死亡而已。还有一些人，选择了更为直接的方式来避开死亡的宿命。

零星的传说，有些可以追溯至黎明之战（Dawn War）以前，有人说死亡并非是宇宙秩序固有的一部分。通过施展一个叫作“虚空回响”的黑暗仪式，一心寻求想而不惜一切代价的生物可以战胜死亡——但这要牺牲数百万的生灵。

为了准备这个仪式而留下的痕迹确实存在。对于一个想要制造大范围的毁灭的生物而言，选择也没几个——也许是粉碎星界神域，或者毁灭世界上某一整个地区。这些恶人们需要的并非是压倒性的力量，更重要的，是隐秘。因为对“虚空回响”的追求必然会引起英雄、诸神、恶魔和荒神的愤怒。

当“虚空回响”仪式开始时，他聚集的魔法会产生一个相同的和一个相反的效应。宇宙任命了英雄来对抗仪式的施展者。这些强大的英雄会成为虚空守卫，致力于防止生死的既有秩序不被破坏。

实践天命 Living the Destiny

作为一名虚空守卫，你的命运和那些希望解开“虚空回响”的力量的人紧密相连。也许你们很早就有了交集，打了一场小仗，后来被证明，那是仪式的第一步。一位虚空守卫对这种命运所知甚少，只有在仪式达到最终步骤时，才会披上它的衣钵。你可能会发现，许多不相关的事件汇聚在一起，描绘出一种可怕的图景，而你必须破坏它。

一位虚空守卫为了阻止“虚空回响”的完成而战，摧毁所有有关仪式的知识，打倒那些寻求其力量的人。当一位虚空守卫出现时，那么这种对宇宙的威胁已经可怕而又迫在眉睫。你将面对试图完成“虚空回响”的强大生物的仆人们，为最终之战做好准备。

21级：渡鸦守卫耐力 Raven Guardian's Endurance

As the final guardian of the mystery of death, you can call on the power of life to sustain you on your quest. Your epic form is honed more sharply, even as you gain a measure of power against death.

Benefit: 你选择的一个属性值增加2点

另外，当你重伤时，你具有15点暗蚀抗力和再生5

24级：守卫复原 Guardian's Recovery

Your fight to preserve the place of death in the cosmos allows you to resist death's cold hand when it reaches for you.

Benefit: 你在死亡豁免检定上获得+2加值。离你20格内每有一个其他虚空守卫，此加值就增加1

26级：命运灵魂 Soul of Destiny

Those who fight alongside you share in your allimportant task, gaining a measure of power against your fated foes.

30级：死亡守卫 Guardian of Death

Death is no longer a threat to you. As its champion, you gain the resilience to fight on against even the most overwhelming odds.

Benefit: 每天一次，当你生命值降到0或更低时，你立即恢复到生命值全满，能以一个自由动作起身，所有由你选择的影响你的效果结束，且能以一个自由动作传送到邻近其他虚空守卫的位置

Lorekeeper Epic Destiny.name: 学识守护者 Lorekeeper
Lorekeeper Epic Destiny.description:
所有的知识都必须被保留下来。它必须被保管好，因为知识是我们是谁，我们曾经是什么，以及我们将成为什么的关键。

Prerequisite:

你是一个知识的源泉，一个无以伦比的学者，一个传说、神话，以及最重要的，真理的保管者。虽然你只满足于研究和思考，但人们从世界各地，甚至更远的地方来找你，寻求知识。他们想运用你敏锐的智力和智慧来解决任何问题：找到失落已久的文物，解决一个不可能的谜题，或者制定一个策略来战胜一群发狂的野蛮人。其他人找你只是为了交谈、学习和扩大他们自己的理解。

有了这样的知识，就有了沉重的责任，因为有些真相最好保密。如果你轻率地透露一个自古文明衰落以来就失去的强大武器的位置，你很可能会让世界亲眼目睹那个武器的力量。如果你隐瞒了瘟疫的治疗方法，受害者的死亡就归咎于你。最终，你必须决定是保管你的知识还是随意地传播它，以及你是否有智慧知道什么是应该透露的，什么是应该隐藏的。

不朽 Immortality

学识守护者是世界上最博学的人之一，他们依靠自己丰富的知识与那些拥抱无知和拒绝文明的人战斗。

宏伟图书馆 Grand Library: 你的时空力量的最终体现是建造一个大图书馆来保存你的收藏。当你完成你的命运任务时，你已经获得了更多的书籍、手稿和其他文本，超过了你能列出的名目。防止某些可疑著作落入坏人之手的唯一方法就是建造一个地方来保护它们。无论你是在凡间，还是在众星之海，或是藏在黄铜城、印记城或幽铸城，这座宏伟的图书馆能保证你的不朽。图书馆提醒所有看到它的人，你对保存知识的一心一意的承诺和你追求知识的伟大事迹。

21级：学识守护者之智慧 Lorekeeper's Wisdom

Benefit: 每当你进行知识检定或怪物知识检定时，你可以掷骰两次并使用任一结果。

此外，你的攻击命中时对那些起源于你受训技能范围内的生物造成2点额外伤害。例如，如果你在神秘上受训，那么你的攻击对元素界、妖精界和暗影界生物的命中会造成2点额外伤害。

24级：学识守护者之灵巧 Lorekeeper's Cunning

Benefit: 当你为任何仪式进行技能检定时，你可以掷骰两次并使用任一结果。

你可以将施展一个非创造类仪式所需的时间翻倍，以减少该仪式花费的一半。

此外，每当你对那些起源于你受训技能范围内的生物造成重击时，你在对该生物的攻击骰上获得+2加值，直到你下一回合结束。

26级：真名 True Name

30级：学识守护者之启示 Lorekeeper's Revelation

Benefit: 从你的每日辅助威能中选择两个。这两个威能现在是你的遭遇威能。如果你没有两个每日辅助威能，则你可以立即重训你的辅助，直到你有两个每日辅助威能，然后成为遭遇威能。
Lorekeeper Epic Destiny.requirements: 21级，智力21或感知21，在两种知识技能上受训

Raven Consort Epic Destiny.name: 鸦妃 Raven Consort
Raven Consort Epic Destiny.description:
你所有的誓言都已实现，你的命运被你的传奇事迹所封印。死神现在爱你胜过其他任何人。

Prerequisite:

在你的旅程中，作为影灵的楷模，你征服了数不清的危险。你作为塑造影灵传统的契约的忠实代表，游历了各个位面。在你的道路上，你向死神展示了祂应得的尊重，向你的神母展示了真正的奉献，从不畏惧你的职责。通过服从影灵的 "惯例"，你已经打倒了几乎无人能够想象的敌人，更不用说面对了。你仍然站在那里。整个宇宙的生命都知道并惧怕你，认为你是一个变幻命运的使者。即使那些不认识你的人也感觉到你被死亡本身所爱，现在你已经接近了所有影灵所希望的最好的奖赏。

不朽 Immortality

你对你的女神和她在你的人民面前设定的信条的忠诚是坚定不移的，你已经成为你的同类中最伟大的。你的名字将在未来的岁月里被无数渴望伟大的影灵所铭记。也许你甚至已经温暖了冬天凄凉的心，并超越了那些必须加入哀誓魔之列的人。

女王的右手 The Queen's right Hand: 你最后的毁灭已经结束，你已经完整而光荣地活了下来。死亡并没有离开你，相反，她把你拉到了她的黑翼下。虽然连神也难逃一死，但你的躯体和传说都是永恒的。

现在是时候到你心爱的女王面前，接受你最大的奖赏了。你可能会得到对莱得纳边境的统治权，以及对鸦后骑士的指挥权，贵族哀誓魔曾看守这片土地。如果这是注定的时机，莱得纳的圣灵，也许你会调集鸦后的部队，将她剩下的敌人全部干掉。

无论怎样，你都会自豪地站在你的人民的神祇身边，作为其他人能够实现的标志。你作为她的顾问、知己，甚至可能是情人。现在，只有你对你的女神有最大的影响力，你会怎么做？你会为你的人民说情吗？那些死者？那些伟大的人，那些在宇宙中游走的英雄和恶棍仍然......在你的阴影下？

对权力的渴求是否仍在你体内燃烧，最终凌驾于你的热情之上？你和鸦后一样清楚，她自己就杀死了一位年迈的死神，死神也是会死的。你的女神的宝座有一天会是你的吗？

21级：速成身躯 Quickened Corpus

Benefit: 你的体质属性增加2点，并且获得等同于你新的体质调整值的额外生命值。在你被死者复活 Raise Dead仪式复活后，你不会受到死亡减值。

24级：生命循环 Cycle of Life

Benefit: 当你进行死亡豁免时，你在所有防御和豁免检定上获得可累加的+2加值直到遭遇结束。每次你进行死亡豁免，该加值会和之前死亡豁免提供的已有的加值叠加。

另外，当你在死亡豁免中掷出20或更高，你不需要花费回复力但依然可以恢复等同于回复力值的生命值。

26级：生命永恒 Vitality Eternal

30级：死神同伴 Death's Companions

Benefit: 每次你杀死一个生物，那个生物的尸体上就会形成一个巫妖遗骸（MM1, 176页）。直到遭遇结束，这些巫妖遗骸被视作被你支配。在遭遇结束时，在遭遇中被唤起为你服务的巫妖遗骸会被立刻摧毁。

Raven Knight Epic Destiny.name: 鸦后骑士 Raven Knight
Raven Knight Epic Destiny.description:
Constant devotion and unswerving dedication to the Raven Queen won you a place in her service. Now you command death and wield its power against any who would subvert it for their own dark purposes.

Prerequisite:

The Raven Queen's influence across the Shadowfell depends on trusted agents: those sorrowsworn and shadar-kai who make up the esteemed order of the Raven Knights. Charged with protecting the Raven Queen's realm and safeguarding the Shadowfell from those who would pervert its dark power for dread purposes, they move with impunity across the plane, even going so far as to venture into distant worlds where they bring battle to the Raven Queen's myriad enemies. To join this order, you have worked to prove your worth and dedication to the deity and win a place among these guardians. Your fate might be to serve the deity as her chosen champion, but what better destiny could you choose after a life spent fighting in her name?

不朽 Immortality

You won the right to claim your place among the peerless Raven Knights. You don the black garb worn by all in this august order, cladding yourself in the soft velvet robes and wielding the deity's power in her name. In reward for your eternal service, the deity grants you a mighty fortress and lands in the Shadowfell to rule as you wish, warriors to fight beneath your banner, and servants to attend to your every wish. You might be a servant still, but you live as a king.

黑暗侍从 Dark Servitor: The deity's favor reveals itself in your flesh even before you earn the title. From the moment you begin your final quest, your body transforms, subtle at the start but profound when you overcome the last obstacle to your prize. Your connections to the natural world weaken as the Shadowfell asserts its influence over you, opening your eyes to new possibilities. Your facial features change, becoming monstrous but strangely alluring for all its bestial aspect. In time, you erase any connections to your former self when you become a sorrowsworn in truth.

By the time you complete your final quest, your old life is a dream compared to the power, prestige, and glory ahead. With your affairs in order, you embark to bring honor and glory to the deity, to join her other trusted servants as her chosen champion. You bear a new burden to protect the deity who entrusted you with such power. How you meet your mistress's enemies and whether you but do with the same loyalty and devotion you did earlier is up to you and your ambition. You might continue as you have or turn your considerable power to reach further than you ever thought possible.

21级：黯淡面容 Bleak Visage

Benefit: 邻近你的敌人在对你的攻击骰上受到-2减值。

21级：生于哀誓 Sorrowborn

Benefit: 你在体质和敏捷属性上获得+2加值，以及速度上获得+2加值。

如果你的起源不是暗影界，你的起源改为暗影界，因此在有关生物起源的效果上，你被视为暗影界生物。

你还会获得黑暗视觉，如果你没有的话。

24级：暗影冲刺 Shadow Rush

Benefit: 当你冲锋或奔跑时，你获得虚体和相位移动直到你下一回合结束。

26级：黑暗之镰 Dark Scythe

30级：哀誓之翼 On Sorrow's Wings

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你能在进行额外动作之前传送10格。

Feyliege Epic Destiny.name: 妖精君主 Feyliege
Feyliege Epic Destiny.description:
你指挥着强大的雅灵军团，挖掘妖精荒野的魔法潜力。

Prerequisite:

Your mastery over the mystical arts that twine through the Feywild has earned you the respect of eladrin and other noble fey creatures. You are seen as a great leader in the sometimes fanciful, wondrous echo of the world. Where castles of eladrin nobles raise their gleaming spires, your name has been bandied about as a potential lord of great power. Where shadowed hillocks cover twilight tunnels into the brooding Feydark, your name is also whispered, but as a curse.

As a lord of the Feywild, you are sometimes called upon to use your power to defend the interests of the faerie realm. However, your interests are wider still, and you often use your knowledge and ties to aid you in your own quests and errands. Sometimes, a future version of yourself steps back through the world lines to offer aid, and in so doing provide a glimpse of what one day might be in a fey echo of reality.

不朽？ Immortality?

Upon completion of your final quest, you retreat to the Feywild for good, but your coming is foretold. Indeed, the Court of Stars, that storied city that crowns the Feywild's heart, has sent envoys, invitations, and inquiries regarding your bloodline. There are intimations that you might be, in truth, of the lineage of Lord Oran or Queen Tiandra.

You have a choice before you. You could find a secluded spot and build a towering edifice among the trees, then live out a peaceful life in the mists and shadows behind the world. You could take the guise of a simple traveler, passing from settlement to settlement in the Feywild and in the natural world, appearing as an itinerant elderly nomad, but one capable of dispensing great wisdom. Or, you could accept your destiny and the summons from the Feywild's heart, and take a seat of wisdom and power in the Court of Stars, a seat that will someday be the one that overlooks all others.

21级：精野魅力 Feywild Charm

Benefit: 你的魅力属性增加2点

24级：永恒王座之上的永恒之王|Eternal King on an Eternal Throne

Benefit: 每天一次，当你死亡时，一个更老，更威严版本的你自己从时间的迷雾之中走出来代替你。你恢复最大生命值的一半并对所有攻击获得隐蔽直到遭遇结束。如果你以自己的未来形态死亡，则你真正死亡。

在遭遇结束时，如果你的身体还在，则未来的你自己将你复活，你的当前生命值不变，并且你不再拥有隐蔽。

如果你的身体不见了，你需要其他魔法来复活，但你能以自己的未来形态继续冒险，如果你想的话。

26级：雅灵之主护盾 Shields of the Eladrin Host

30级：支配心灵 Dominion over the Mind

Benefit: 当你使用一个奥术魅惑威能并对一个敌人造成重击时，那个敌人被支配直到你下一回合结束。
Feyliege Epic Destiny.requirements: 21级；任意奥术职业；必须是精界起源，半精灵，或是「精类契约」的邪术师

Beastlord Epic Destiny.name: 野兽之王 Beastlord
Beastlord Epic Destiny.description:
你和你的野兽伙伴就像分享生命的双生子，行动完全一致。任何分离都是空间和时间的幻觉，这种幻觉有一天会被抹去。

Prerequisite:

你们英勇的盟友与你们并肩作战，最终取得了胜利。在他们中间，你已经知道了友谊和很少有人能够想象的相互依存关系。有了这些宝藏，你甚至可能拯救了你所爱的世界。但是，即使是这种看似完美的友情，这种无暇的联盟的例子，与你和你的野兽伙伴的关系相比，也是相形见绌。

你，在你的史诗同行中是独一无二的，你了解真正的伴侣关系和信任。在你身边的野兽不仅仅是一个朋友和盟友。它构成了你自己灵魂的延伸。

不朽？ Immortality?

有些野兽之王保持与他们的兽伴分开，他们在宇宙中游荡，为更高的实体或理想服务。其他人则进入死亡的迷雾中，这很自然，他们相信有一天他们会在世界有需要时重生。少数人继续在身体和意识上达到一种统一的形式，如这里所描述的那样。

兽王神化 Beastlord Apotheosis: 当你的最后任务完成时，你已经证明了人形和兽形是不分开的。你和你的同伴就像一个分裂成两个身体的单一生命。那些讲述你的故事的人讲述了你们两个如何通过成为一体来说明这一真理。事实上，他们低声说，最后变得明显的东西总是如此。

你表现出一种精神，包含了你的野兽伙伴所象征的价值，你与你的本性所体现的野兽融合在一起。这样一来，你就变成了一个伟大的自然之灵的形状，纯洁而不朽。此后，你的形状随你所愿——人、兽、两者同时出现，或两者的混合体。永恒地，你在世界的荒野中作为守护者和激励者而存在。也许你会成为梅洛拉的圣灵，或者你会保持与任何神灵的区别，成为这个世界上独一无二的生物的典范。

那些以你为榜样的人在旅行和与他们自己的野兽伙伴并肩作战时都会记住你。他们，以及其他崇尚自然和生物的人，都把你当作一个原型和指南。

21级：完全理解 Ultimate Understanding

Benefit: 每轮一次，你能以一个次要动作命令你的野兽动物伙伴执行一个标准动作，移动动作或一个次要动作。

24级：融合命运 Fused Fate

Benefit: 当一个效果以你为目标时，你能选择将目标改为你的野兽动物伙伴和你，或者代替你，只要野兽动物伙伴离你20格内并且你能看见它。

26级：迅捷伙伴 Quickened Companion

30级：分享生命 Shared Life

Benefit: 只要你或你的野兽动物伙伴有至少1点生命值，另一个就不会被杀死，无论是负生命值或失败的死亡豁免。如常记录负生命值和失败的死亡豁免，如果你们的生命值都被降至0或更低，则负生命值和失败的死亡豁免立刻生效。

Fury of the Wild Epic Destiny.name: 野性之怒 Fury of the Wild
Fury of the Wild Epic Destiny.description:
只要还有残忍的生物掠夺自然界，你的愤怒就永远无法平息。

Prerequisite:

You are an incarnation of nature's wrath, rampaging against all who would destroy the bounty of nature. Your enemies are many: the demons that seek destruction of life and land, the aberrant monsters that stain the beauty of the world, and the impetuous creatures that destroy forests and rivers for the sake of creating grotesque cities from stone torn from the earth. You feel the pain of the natural world around you when it's burned by unnatural fire or polluted with the presence of those who dishonor the wild, and you hear the spirits cry out in agony as they die. Wild, unbridled fury rages in you and is unleashed without warning against the foes of the natural world.

不朽 Immortality

Your eternal fate depends on the state of the world when you die.

狂怒造就平静 Fury Made Placid: If your death stops the destruction of nature, you can sleep in peace. By defeating a great enemy of the natural world, or creating a great expanse of untouched wilderness, you can overcome the rage that drives you. You become one of the great spirits, but one that is peaceful. The speakers of primal lore will tell tales of your change and how your great sacrifice prevented nature's decline, thus quelling your anger. You now live as a more benevolent spirit of peace or beauty.

永恒狂怒 The Fury Eternal: Despite all your effort and all your rage, nature is subjected to more transgressions every day. You can no longer contain your outrage, and you permanently become a spirit of fury. You stalk the wilderness and rampage into cities indiscriminately, wreaking agony and destruction on all in your path. Your story is a cautionary one. Tribal leaders warn youths to avoid your path and say that you are proof that no matter how hard one fights, the enemies of nature can corrupt and destroy.

21级：愤怒之力 Fury's Strength

Benefit: 你的力量或感知属性增加2点。

24级：大地之怒 Land's Fury

Benefit: 当你造成重击时，离你10格内所有未重伤的敌人都会受到等同于你等级 + 你的力量或感知调整值的伤害。

26级：愤怒形态 Fury's Form

30级：无尽愤怒 Unstoppable Fury

Benefit: 当你使用随意攻击威能对一个未重伤的敌人失手，你能重骰失手的攻击骰但必须使用第二次结果。

Parable Epic Destiny.name: 隐喻 Parable
Parable Epic Destiny.description:
物质世界是一种幻觉。 看看世界的背后，但不是为了真相——为了另一层的错觉。

Prerequisite:

世界是虚幻的，它仅仅是宇宙自身讲述的一个故事。一个没有意识到自己正在变得更全面的存在的宇宙。时间也是幻觉，那只不过是用来展开故事的依托。时间并不存在，物质也只不过是想象。在虚幻的舞台上争斗，生存，死亡的神祗，凡人，荒神，天使，以及其他所有生物，都只不过是宇宙面貌的一种展现。看起来坚实的地球其实不然，天国与地狱的区分也只不过是纸上空谈。

又或者，至少，这是你的信条，而且你有充分的理由相信它是真的。智者知道，故事是带有知识结构的叙事，而你，最聪明的智者。这种叙事原则比大多数人的推测要深刻得多——你相信它是创造本身的核心公理。然而，认识到现实是一种幻觉，你已经开始改变你自己的故事。这样一来，你已然超越了那些仍然相信现实不过是掩盖在一切事物之下的虚无的大众。在参与你自己的故事时，你已经成为一个活生生的寓言，也许是一位能够把现实改写至你设计的路线上的寓言。

不朽？ Immortality?

完成你最后任务的行为也证明，你可以根据你自己的愿望改变正在展开的世界线的进程。你对作为现实之网的幻觉的掌握几乎已经完成。仅仅最后几根虚构的丝线避开了你。

所以你从世界上所有竞争性的事件中退出，褪变为幻象的一部分。当你迈出一步时，你不会是一个离你之前的位置只有几英尺远的离散的实体出现。相反，你的身体和心灵在上千个不同的时间和地点跃入上千个不同的故事。你寻求成为基本故事的一部分，最初的故事，在所有其他故事之前的寓言。如此，你试图将自己提升到所有其他人之上。你将不再是事中人，而是讲述者。

21级：犹如幻象 As if Illusion

Benefit: 当你移动时，你无视困难地形。

24级：未曾去往 Never Really There

Benefit: 你不会从失手的攻击中受到伤害。

26级：虚构环节 Figment Step

30级：生命幻象 Life's Illusion

Benefit: 每天一次，当你死亡时，你能在离你死亡位置的10格远处以最大生命值复活。事实上，你仅仅是看上去死了——你的敌人杀死了一个你的完美幻象，而当时你正站在不远处。

Eternal Defender Epic Destiny.name: 永恒守护者 Eternal Defender
Eternal Defender Epic Destiny.description:
你站在那些要撕裂毫无防备的世界的道路上。这个世界在你永远警觉的盾牌后面是安全的。

Prerequisite:

You have taken the defender ideal to heart. This devotion might have started at childhood, when you stood up for those weaker than you. Perhaps the ideal of the mighty protecting the weak was culturally instilled in you, as it is in all good-hearted dwarves. Whatever the case, rather than using your strength and power solely for personal gain, you willingly placed yourself in harm's way to make sure that others had a chance to survive and thrive.

At the core of your personal morals and beliefs is the certainty that it is your job to protect your allies. When among them, you stand in the forefront in times of danger, no matter how dire the foe. Your skill and courage ever prove an anchor for your companions during the tumult of battle.

不朽？ Immortality?

Bravery and immovability define you as a champion to your friends and the people you have saved over the course of your chronicle. To many, you are the mountain holding back the onrush of a monstrous tide.

永恒壁障 Everlasting Bulwark: You have laid low your final and greatest adversary. During the fight you, as always, formed the steady center around which your allies could operate, taking the brunt of the punishment without bending or complaining. Ever more will you be the supreme standard for those on the front line of any battle.

The world always needs someone of your strength and stature at the ready to come to its defense. Those wishing to take up sword or hammer to defend others refer to you as if you were a saint. Although your name might be spoken as a universally recognized synonym for the ultimate guardian, you're not ready to just lay down your shield and axe.

Perhaps, then, you take a place in divine dominions, next to or in service to a godly stalwart such as Moradin. Building a post somewhere in the cosmos, you might take it upon yourself to stand vigil over a primordial threat or against the machinations of evil deities. If something stirs or threatens, you herald the coming danger and stand the first to face it. Perhaps instead some power helps you eternally watch over a chosen people, infusing your watchful spirit into the land. Or you might make a pact to pass away but instill your defender's heart into your folk, awakening a new profusion of heroes.

21级：无尽力量 Unending Strength

Benefit: 你的力量属性增加2点。你的普通载重，重载和最大拖行载重翻倍。（分别是力量×20，力量×40，和力量×100）。每天一次，你能选择在一次力量属性检定或基于力量的技能检定上获得+10加值。

24级：类神身躯 Godlike Stature

Benefit: 你的体型不变。但你的身高和体重分别比你的种族正常范围增加25%和100%。你能持用如同你的体型大了一级一般的武器，并且如果你的通常体型为中型或更大，则你的近战触及范围增加1格。

26级：坚定毁灭 Implacable Destruction

30级：伟力 Great Power

Benefit: 每天一次，你能将你刚刚掷出的成功的近战攻击骰视作如同你掷出了20，或者你能将刚掷出的任何失败的近战攻击视作你命中。

Eternal Seeker Epic Destiny.name: 永恒探求者 Eternal Seeker
Eternal Seeker Epic Destiny.description:
你继续寻找着你最后的命运，但是命运不会令你放弃参加（或者说妨碍）举世震惊的大事。

Prerequisite:

你也许是一个仍在进行宿命任务的英雄；也许你有着自由的灵魂，想让自己成为这个宇宙的一部分，在之前你不得不去了解宇宙为你提供的所有东西；也许你与别人不同，你讨厌每人生下来就注定了自己的命运的说法，因此你对完成自己的命运毫无兴趣，或者你仅仅想要避开所谓的命运的袒护。无论是哪个，你在各种重大事件里都留下了自己的足迹，而当时机正确时，你的命运依然会准确无误地找到你。

不朽的探索？ Seeking Immortality?

没有人能猜到你最后的终点在哪儿。与其他的传奇角色相比，你的命运有着完全不可知的优势，所以在你完全可以在帮助你的朋友完成他们的命运时打造自己的命运。

21级：探求歧路 Seeker of the Many Paths

Benefit: 当你提升等级获得一个职业遭遇或每日威能时，你能从任何职业中选择一个相应的威能。

学习一个威能并不一定提供给你所有使用此威能所需要的属性。举例来说，一个战士可以通过永恒探求者的特性学会一个法师的法术，但他不会获得能让法师法术施放更有效的使用法器的能力。因此，你最好学习一些与你已知威能相协调的威能。

24级：永恒之行 Eternal Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来获得额外动作时，你的下一回合也能获得一个额外动作。下一回合的额外动作不会从因你花费行动点而产生的能力（包括大多数典范之道的特性）中获益。

26级：探求知识 Seeker's Lore

Benefit: 你获得一个任意职业的22级辅助威能。

30级：探求命运 Seeking Destiny

Benefit: 你从符合条件的其他传奇天命中，获得一个24级传奇天命特性。

Master of the Eternal Hunt Epic Destiny.name: 永恒追猎者 Master of the Eternal Hunt
Master of the Eternal Hunt Epic Destiny.description:
在整个宇宙中，那些想要玷污世界的人害怕你的愤怒。

Prerequisite:

As a seeker, it falls to you to search out those who would wreck the natural order. The primal spirits forced the gods and the primordials from the world following the Dawn War and still stand as sentinels against their incursions. You understand better than most the chaos and horror that such beings can unleash. Some gods are benevolent, but others are destructive and evil. The gods must attend to their own affairs and allow the mortal world to follow its own fate.

When you took your first steps along the seeker's path, you sought out demons, marauding orcs that burned and destroyed at Gruumsh's behest, and rampant elementals. As these enemies fell before you, your mastery grew. In time, the primal spirits called out to you. There were greater enemies to fight, and you took to the planes to slay them before they could release their horrors upon the world. Titans, aberrations, and other powerful threats fell before you. Though you have fought and defeated many foes, more and more take their place. You must now seek a new path, one that can help ensure the world's safety forever. As your skills reach their peak, you must seek out the deadliest hunting grounds, planes where the primal might of the world is but a whisper.

You are a Master of the Eternal Hunt. It is your fate to travel far beyond the world to battle those that threaten it. You might die alone and forgotten in some terrible corner of the Abyss, but if you survive, you will join the spirits as an everlasting guardian of all you value.

不朽 Immortality

Your quest is never truly complete, for as long as gods, demons, devils, and primordials battle in the planes, their struggles spill over to the natural world. Some day, when you have hunted the mightiest of the world's foes to extinction, you can finally find peace, but until then, you must fight on.

狩猎之魂 Spirit of the Hunt: In time, your body proves a hindrance to your efforts. The threats to the world far too often encompass more than physical destruction. The mightiest of creatures, particularly beasts that originate from beyond the bounds of the cosmos, seek not merely to destroy the world but to transform it. When your mortal life is at an end, you will join the spirits in safeguarding the world. In this form, you can hunt forever.

21级：无情猎手 Relentless Hunter

Benefit: 你的感知属性增加2点，当你对离你10格内的敌人进行远程攻击时，你无视所有来自掩护、超级掩护、隐蔽和全隐蔽的减值。

24级：无懈追踪者 Faultless Tracker

Benefit: 你获得黑暗视觉和震动感知10。

26级：无情步伐 Relentless Step

30级：不死猎人 Deathless Hunter

Benefit: 每天一次，当敌人的攻击使你的生命值降至0或更低时，你的当前生命值会变为1，并且你获得对该敌人攻击的20点抗力，直到遭遇结束。当那个敌人的生命值降至0时，你的生命值也降至0。

Cosmic Soul Epic Destiny.name: 宇宙之魂 Cosmic Soul
Cosmic Soul Epic Destiny.description:
你的思绪能接触远方世界，扭曲的现实，还有无尽的可能。

Prerequisite:

长久以来，宇宙一直让你着迷，因为它有关于遥远国度的奇特传说，那里居住着超乎想象的生物。在你大部分的冒险生涯中，这些地方的诱惑力一直在牵引着你前进，而每一次的发现都会加剧你对更多知识的渴望。然而，随着时间的推移，那些减缓或阻止你探索的物质层面的阻碍让你感到沮丧。你渴望成为宇宙之魂，仅凭心灵的力量就能窥探到不可能的远方。你只受限于你的想象力，没有你不能征服的领域。

不朽 Immortality

你的心灵之门大开，让你对周围的宇宙充满觉知。

无限认识 Infinite Awareness: 当你打开通往你潜力的最后一扇门时，所有阻碍你好奇心的物质层面的阻碍都会消失。就像花朵张开花瓣享受阳光一样，你的意识扩展至所有的地方，所有的人，所有的世界，如洪水般涌来。你的思想从一个世界跳到另一个世界，你通过内视，可以看到诸神的领域，或见证九层地狱和深渊的暴行。你的视野甚至延伸到笼罩着遥远国度之外，使你能够察觉到潜伏在现实边缘的全部恐怖。随着你的心灵得到解放，你不需要身体和它的限制。当你进入无限的意识时，你的身体形式的需求和渴望就会消失，准备无限制地探索，直到时间的尽头。

21级：宇宙意识 Cosmic Awareness

Benefit: 你能掌握并施展探知类仪式。任何你施展的探知仪式不需要器材，且你在作为施展仪式一部分的技能检定上获得+5加值。每天一次，你能施展一个你已知的探知类仪式而不需要花费材料。

另外，你获得真实视觉5。

24级：宇宙知识 Cosmic Experience

Benefit: 你已经身经百战见得多了，无论发生什么，看起来都有些眼熟。你在先攻检定，知识检定和怪物知识检定上获得+5加值。另外，你能说所有语言。

26级：宇宙合流 Merge with the Cosmos

30级：宇宙连结 Cosmic Connection

Benefit: 你的所有远程和区域威能的射程都变为“可见”。

Primal Avatar Epic Destiny.name: 原力化身 Primal Avatar
Primal Avatar Epic Destiny.description:
你是自然精魂的体现，一个藏于肉体强大的原始精魂。

Prerequisite:

You are one with the world around you. You hear the whispers of the trees as they speak of their ancient dreams, you taste the change of seasons carried on the four winds, and you understand the thoughts of beasts nearby. The world of spirit that exists alongside the physical world is as real to you as your own body; you perceive and move in both realms at the same time. Like the wisest and most powerful barbarians, druids, shamans, and wardens who have gone before you, you have no fear of death, for when you die, you will reside in the spirit world that you already know.

Many primal spirits are benign. Some are heedless of mortal concerns, and others are actively malevolent. Your power and attunement to their world draws these spirits' attention, for they perceive you even as you perceive them. Hostile spirits see you as a threat and seek to hamper your progress. But you have allies in the spirit realm too, friendly powers who nurture you, lending a measure of their own strength to support your cause. As your power grows, so too does your connection to the spirits of nature, until its sustaining power accompanies you wherever you go.

Your presence in the world has such resonance that a great primal spirit might seek you out to recruit you for a greater purpose. Whether you choose to bind yourself to the entity or not has no effect on your abilities, but service might result in physical manifestations that evoke qualities held by your patron. For example, if you ally yourself with a spirit of the woodlands, your hair might take on a leafy appearance that changes with the passing of the seasons; if you choose to serve a spirit of the hunt, you might acquire a bestial appearance and a shaggy mane; and if you serve an animal spirit of wisdom and guidance, you might grow a stagís antlers or develop hooves for feet.

不朽 Immortality

When your body's life comes to its end, you will continue to exist as one of the spirits of nature.

精魂强者 Mighty Among the Spirits: As you near the completion of your Destiny Quest, you feel the tug of something greater, some deeper force drawing you on and goading you to bring your mission to its conclusion quickly. Not long after finishing your final task, you walk from the world into the spirit realm, leaving your mortality behind. Freed from the bonds of your body, you join the host of spirits that protect the natural order and guide new champions to follow the trail you blazed.

21级：原力旅行 Primal Travel

Benefit: 当敌人用近战攻击命中你时，你能以一个即时反应传送3格。

24级：精魂之赐 Spirit Boon

Benefit: 每次长休结束后，选择一个属性。直到你的下一次长休结束，你在与该属性相关的攻击骰、技能检定和属性检定中获得+1加值。

26级：精魂同行 Walk with the Spirits

30级：永恒回归 Eternal Return

Benefit: 每天一次，当你死亡并且至少有两个回复力剩余时，你可以复活自己。在你死亡后10轮内的某一个你的回合开始时，你可以花费两个回复力来复活。你复活时的生命值等同于你的重伤值，并且移除所有可豁免终止的效果。然后你正常地进行你的回合。

Demiurge Epic Destiny.name: 造物主 Demiurge
Demiurge Epic Destiny.description:
对于像你这样的英雄来说，神的身份太局限了。你能达到比任何神祗的宝座更高的位置，因为在你的梦中，有一个新世界的种子。

Prerequisite:

对于崇拜他们的凡人来说，神灵是生命的最高形式。神明拥有不可估量的力量和智慧，他们有能力创造新的种族并随心所欲地摧毁整个大陆。然而，尽管神明是如此伟大，但他们也是有缺陷的生命，拥有与生活在他们目光下的凡人一样的判断力和性格上缺陷。

你不是第一个超越神性的人，你见证了一种甚至超越神力的无限完美。在创造的顶峰，有一个原因或目的，其意图甚至对神来说都是不可捉摸的。有些人可能会寻求向这个超越众生的存在——这个概念和上帝，负责所有事物的总和的造物主致敬。然而，你并不打算加入或服务于这种力量。相反，你希望为自己争取其权柄。你将按照你认为合适的方式塑造现实，以你自己的形象和想象力重建宇宙。

不朽 Immortality

你的目标如此傲慢，你的目标如此深远，以至于你发现你的四面八方都有敌人。宇宙中最强大的生命把他们最黑暗的争端放在一边，以对抗你不断膨胀的力量。

超越个体 Monadic Transcendence: 无数的敌人挡在了你的道路上，甚至诸神本身也试图否认你的目标。但没有人能够质疑你创造的价值，你的努力所创造的完美，或你内心所拥有的力量。你在探索中的每一次胜利都使你更接近创造的顶峰，直到你的伟大工作完成时，你的思想和上帝的思想相接触。

你长期寻求的接触导致了你的彻底毁灭，甚至连尘埃都没有留下，以纪念你的离去。那些认识你的人开始忘记你，对人们记忆中狂妄的你开始逐渐消失，好像你从未出现过。但在远离这个世界的地方，在现实的界限之外，在一个巨大的虚空延伸到无限的地方，你的虚无孕育了一个新的创造。你的本质成为催化剂，催生了新的世界、新的怪物和新的神。你启动了时间的永恒流动，一个完全由你自己不朽的想象力引导和塑造的未来。

21级：成为唯一 Becoming the One

Benefit: 你的魅力属性和另一个你的选择属性都增加2点。

24级：完美行动 Perfection in Action

Benefit: 当你到达一个里程碑，你获得2个行动点，而不是1个。当你到达第二个里程碑，你能在同一场遭遇中花费最多2个行动点。

26级：造物主抗力 Demiurge Resistance

30级：自我神化 Deification of the Self

Benefit: 你在豁免检定上获得+5加值。并且，你免疫任何等级等于或低于20级的生物的攻击。另外，当你在遭遇中第一次重伤时，你能传送至任意你能看见的未被占据的一格，你能花费一个回复力，并且你成为虚体直到你下一回合结束。

War Master Epic Destiny.name: 战争大师 War Master
War Master Epic Destiny.description:
你领导的军队不会遭受失败。只要你踏上战场，你的敌人就已经输了。

Prerequisite:

It is one thing to excel at personal battlefield prowess. It is another to extend that skill to a group of allies, a phalanx of warriors, an entire army, or even an entire nation. You were always talented with a blade, but you learned early on that a dozen blades raised as one could defeat the mightiest lone warrior. Combining many individual efforts into one force is a daunting challenge, one surpassed only by the hazards of battle itself.

As a War Master, you seek to forge order from the chaos of battle. Under your command, your allies fight with unmatched coordination and skill. Your tactical skill and insight make you a daunting foe. Under your command, even a mob of ill-armed peasants is a daunting fighting force.

With each victory, you set your sights ever higher. As you grow in power, you seek to prove that no horde or army the cosmos can muster can best you and your forces on the field of battle.

不朽 Immortality

You pursue not an escape from death's bonds, but the very conquest of death itself, for death is the only force that can stand against you and bring your armies to ruin. With death conquered, you will live forever in glory, hailed as a savior—or perhaps cursed by those no longer allowed death's release from a life of suffering.

死亡征服者 Conqueror of Death: At some point in your career, only one foe remains to you, and you set out to conquer what no one has ever been able to defeat. Perhaps you marshal an army and lay siege to the Raven Queen's palace, or perhaps doing that would only install you as a new god of death. Instead, you might take only your trusted adventuring companions on a final quest to slay death itself. Your final conquest might be hopeless, but you stand forever as a shining example to those who rage against the bonds of mortality.

21级：独步战术家 Unmatched Tactician

Benefit: 你和离你5个格内的盟友在先攻检定上获得+5加值。当你进行攻击时，如果你的盟友中至少有一人邻近目标，则你在此攻击骰上获得+1加值。

24级：不屈鼓舞 Unyielding Inspiration

Benefit: 每当你让一个盟友花费一个回复力时，与他相邻的每个盟友都会获得15点临时生命值。

26级：绝妙战术 Brilliant Strategy

30级：无边的士气 Boundless Morale

Benefit: 当一个离你5格内的盟友生命值降至0或更低时，你能以一个即时中断花费一个回复力。你不会因为这样做而恢复生命值，但该盟友会像花费了一个回复力一样恢复生命值，并恢复20点额外生命值。

Avatar of War Epic Destiny.name: 战争化身 Avatar of War
Avatar of War Epic Destiny.description:
你知道和平不能持久，当和平消逝时，你将会接管一切。

Prerequisite:

Battle calls you, for you are the god of war. For a mortal lifetime you are incarnated in humanoid shape, sharing the existence and consciousness of a mortal hero. When you speak, you speak for your true divine self. When you act, you act as your godly essence directs. You exist to champion causes worth fighting for, to provide the people of the world with a shining example of valor and skill, and to teach people how to survive in a world filled with darkness and strife.

As an avatar of war, you are probably the incarnation of Bahamut, Kord, Bane, or possibly a dead war deity such as Tuern. However, war is a cosmic force that seems to have its own guiding consciousness, and you might in fact be the incarnation of the principle of war, or an eternal hero reborn to fight in every conflict spawned upon the mortal world.

Life as an adventurer has opened your eyes to the fact that strife and evil are ubiquitous. You have journeyed through many lands, both civilized and wild, and the only constant is the fragility of peace. Others work hard to stop war, but you believe it is the natural state of the world. You recognize that conflict is everywhere, and you embrace it. The machinations of usurpers, tyrants, and warlords will always drive civilization toward violence and destruction— but sometimes it is exactly this destructive force that gives rise to the most powerful and enduring of civilizations.

不朽 Immortality

The route to immortality is fraught with danger for an avatar of war. Due to a thirst for conflict, an avatar of war engages in many mortal contests. History tells the tale of several avatars of war cut down in epic battles—it could be that your fate is to forge a legend of a hero who only succeeded in dying well. The ultimate challenge lies in giving battle to the gods and primordials. Whether you hope to usurp power from Bane and conquer his home plane of Chernoggar or to rain destruction down upon surviving primordials, you carry in your ambition a war the likes of which hasn't been seen in a thousand years.

神性再聚 Divine Reunion: When your final quest is accomplished and your last foe lies vanquished at your feet, your mortal incarnation ends. Your body falls into gray dust and blows away to the sounds of ravens croaking and tattered banners flapping in the cold wind. Your soul ascends to the astral dominions to rejoin your divine being, bringing with it a lifetime of memories: battles won, battles lost, deeds of courage, acts of cowardice.

21级：战场之主 Master of the Battlefield

Benefit: 你不会提供战斗优势

21级：冲突之力 Power in Conflict

Benefit: 你的力量，以及魅力或智力属性都增加2点

24级：战争召唤者 Invoker of War

Benefit: 你的引导神力威能@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.gTAsCa3uno87VHhk]{战争之路 Path of War}除了在攻击骰上提供+2加值之外，还提供伤害骰上的+4加值。

26级：唤醒冲突 Rouse Conflict

30级：战争之王 Lord of War

Benefit: 你在每场遭遇中第一次命中的攻击会造成25点额外伤害。
Avatar of War Epic Destiny.requirements: 21级，[[战争之路 <神力> Path of War <Divinity>]]专长

Warmaster Epic Destiny.name: 战争之王 Warmaster
Warmaster Epic Destiny.description:
历史是由胜利者书写的。现在有谁能说说你是如何走到今天的，成为历史上军事领袖中的传奇？

Prerequisite:

Surviving countless battles, endless engagements, you carry memories of faces—foes you have dispatched over your career of waging war. You have won more victories than you can count, defeated more enemies than anyone could hope to remember. Some call you lucky, blessed, or cursed. Others say you're brilliant, possessed of a tactical mind unrivaled in the modern age. The truth is that while you have benefited from uncommon good luck and a superior strategic skill, your successes stand on your unwillingness to give up and to use whatever advantages you had in order to win.

Your victories drew the interest of the great and mighty, from kings to exarchs, angelic lords to demon princes. You have crossed swords and wits with legendary leaders whose talents are every bit as sharp as your own. Each time you have managed to survive. If you didn't emerge with decisive victory, you left all your adversaries with a battle to remember.

不朽？ Immortality?

Is being clever in war enough? For a time, you thought so. You wore each victory as a badge of honor, and you used these triumphs as a means to validate the death wrought at your order. Yet as each victory became more and more sure, you began to wonder if you would ever face a challenge worthy of your talents.

永恒之战 Eternal War: As you have done countless times before, you set your brilliant mind to the task of defeating your enemies, bringing to a close your final quest. Though you are victorious, a realization crashes upon you as you understand that with this last triumph no mortal mind can outmaneuver you, catch you unawares, or surprise you with some unexpected ploy. Your keen wit and pragmatism have secured your place in the annals of history, your name written in the blood of the vanquished. Who will stand against you now that you have defeated the undefeatable? Wins are wins, to be sure, but you want—you need—a challenge. There will be none here, for who will stand against you? No, you must leave this world to pass into the realm of legend, where you might find a worthy foe.

The legend you see is the Eternal War, the ultimate battlefield that draws the greatest commanders to test their brilliance and cunning against their equals, to fight onward until the end of days when the best of them are chosen to lead the armies of light in one final confrontation against the hordes of darkness. Such a locale might be nothing more than a myth, but if there's a chance that you could find a place among these great warlords, it's a chance worth the risk of failure.

21级：战术意识 Tactical Awareness

Benefit: 你和任何能看到你的盟友即使是在被突袭时也能在突袭轮中行动，且不会因为被突袭而提供战斗优势。同时，每个能看到你并且没有被突袭的盟友可以在突袭轮中在他的回合中进行一个标准动作、一个移动动作和一个次要动作。

24级：震撼与敬畏 Shock and Awe

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，离你5格内的一个盟友也能在他的下一回合进行一个额外动作。

26级：跃动陷阱 Spring the Trap

30级：战术天才 Tactical Genius

Benefit: 在遭遇中你可以随意花费行动点。

Avatar of Justice Epic Destiny.name: 正义化身 Avatar of Justice
Avatar of Justice Epic Destiny.description:
你的唯一目的是平衡正义的天秤，惩恶，扬善。

Prerequisite:

You are a god of justice incarnated in mortal form. All your life you have fought for justice, but now you know yourself for what you are. Your self-awareness merges with divine truth, and your consciousness becomes one with the concept of justice. In years to come, people will remember that you were your deity in the flesh, a shining champion who battled against wrong and a golden example of a righteous and courageous life well lived, but for now it is up to you to forge that legend.

In your true self you might be Bahamut, some other active deity, or even a dead deity such as Amoth—avatars of dormant deities, interloper gods, or cosmic principles sometimes appear in the world. Regardless of which deity you are the incarnation of, you grasp your destiny as a great lawgiver and a force for righteousness. As you take the guise of justice itself, divine knowledge guides you along the right course.

不朽 Immortality

Your path might involve the elimination of a major source of injustice, such as an evil deity. The evil gods and their worshipers scoff at justice, reveling in cruelty, theft, and murder. Destroying one of these deities brings the scales of justice closer to balance.

神性再聚 Divine Reunion: During your Destiny Quest, you begin to change. You no longer make decisions—you merely do the will of justice. When your final foe is vanquished, you abandon your mortal body, which falls to silvery dust and blows away in the wind. Yoursoul finds its way back to your eternal being and reunites, bringing with it all the joys, the sorrows, the wisdom, and the compassion you have learned in your mortal years. Your mortal existence might be done—but as a god of justice you well remember the lessons you learned during your time in the world, and temper your judgments with memories of your mortal experience.

21级：公正代价 Just Consequence

Benefit: 当一个敌人命中你或一个邻近你的盟友时，在你下一回合结束前，下一个攻击该敌人的盟友在攻击骰上获得+1加值。

21级：正义之心 Justice's Mind

Benefit: 你的智力和感知属性都增加2点

24级：公正复苏 Just Revival

Benefit: 每天第一次你开始你的回合时濒死或死亡，你复活。你恢复等同于你重伤值的生命值，并且离你10格内的所有盟友在攻击骰上获得+2威能加值，直到你下一回合结束，并且离你10格内的每个敌人在攻击骰上受到-2减值，直到你下一回合结束。

26级：撤销之言 Word of Undoing

30级：即时报偿 Instant Retribution

Benefit: 每当离你5格内的敌人对你或你的盟友造成重击，那个敌人受到等同于他此次攻击造成的伤害。
Avatar of Justice Epic Destiny.requirements: 21级，[[即时正义 <神力> Immediate Justice <Divinity>]]专长

Sovereign Beast Epic Destiny.name: 至高野兽 Sovereign Beast
Sovereign Beast Epic Destiny.description:
You have focused the savagery of the Primal Beast through your nobility of spirit to become a monarch among the beasts of the wild.

Prerequisite:

You have channeled the ferocity of the Primal Beast through your limbs countless times, adopting a form that echoes the great spirit, the archetype of all beasts. Yet you are not a beast; you are more than just a reflection of the Primal Beast's manifold nature. By bringing its savage nature into balance with your humanoid spirit, you have become a synthesis that is more than either part. You are the Sovereign Beast, the quintessence of all that is noble and true in nature.

You are striking out on a path that none have previously walked to its conclusion, staking out a middle path between the way of beasts and the ways of the humanoid races. In you is incarnate the potential for the races to live in closer harmony with the world, in tune with their instincts but still awake to their finest qualities and highest ideals.

不朽 Immortality

For now, you are an incarnation of a new ideal, the first of your kind. When your time in the world is fulfilled, though, you will become an elder spirit in your own right, a pattern that future druids will attempt to follow.

新长者精魂 A New Elder Spirit: Your work in the world complete, you transcend your physical form and become a primal spirit. No longer simply in the world, you are now of it, part of the circle of spirits that protects and preserves it. In your spirit form, you roam free, sometimes wearing the shape of a noble beast, sometimes appearing as a humanoid, but always holding the twin aspects of your nature in perfect and everlasting balance.

21级：宏伟野兽 Magnificent Beast

Benefit: 当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.uIPQz3SRDEs59goh]{野性变身 Wild Shape}威能从类人型态转变为野兽形态时，你能把你的体型改为大型。当你在大型野兽形态时，你在伤害骰和速度上获得+2加值。

24级：至高冲锋 Sovereign's Charge

Benefit: 每遭遇一次，当你在野兽形态时冲锋，你能使用一个野兽形态遭遇攻击威能代替近战基本攻击。如果此攻击命中，则目标被击倒。

26级：辉煌野兽 Resplendent Beast

30级：主权继承 Sovereign's Inheritance

Benefit: 当你使用野兽形态攻击威能将一个非杂兵的敌人的生命值降至0或更低时，你能选择花费一个回复力或恢复一个你在此遭遇中使用过的遭遇攻击威能的使用。
Sovereign Beast Epic Destiny.requirements: 21级，德鲁伊，[[野性变身 Wild Shape]]威能

Deadly Trickster Epic Destiny.name: 致命诡术师 Deadly Trickster
Deadly Trickster Epic Destiny.description:
宇宙是为你而建的一个巨大舞台，是消遣和迸发灵感的地方。你——最伟大的诡术师——幽默、独特而又致命。

Prerequisite:

作为一名致命诡术师，你也许是一个流浪者、一个小偷、一个骗子、一个闹事者或者一个幸存者。但是无论如何，有一个称号是被认定的——一个英雄。从无尽的高空到深不见底的地下，没有一样东西不会引发你的好奇心。在你牢牢地抓紧了你的命运之后，你让人反感却又有魅力，让人心烦却又让人以与你冒险为荣。

一些预言指出致命诡术师最后将出卖他的伙伴，在这之后，推翻君主，覆灭王国，甚至搅乱天界。然而，另外一些相反的预言指出，诡术师会对世界的和平起到意想不到的重要作用。因此，致命诡术师是带来无尽的灾难，还是创造一个繁荣和平的年代，根本无从知晓。

游荡者和法术士都是最有可能成为致命诡术师的职业，但致命诡术师也可能出现在最不可能的职业里。

不朽？ Immortality?

致命诡术师不得不抵抗黑暗之道的诱惑。这里有一些致命诡术师在他们的战役中所做的选择。

黑暗之路 Travel by Crooked Paths: 当你完成你最后的任务后，你传奇的名声得到了保证，你那曲折的故事永远被人传诵。

也许，你接近并帮助与你的队友，一起冒险并见证他们通过他们的最终任务，你最后被人们称赞为真正的英雄。你过去的犯罪不再追究，如果可能，你将告别居无定所的生活，被邀请去一个你一直憧憬的国度，在那里他们为你提供了宫殿、财宝、真正的朋友，还有上古的遗训。后来，一个故事在千百年里流传，讲述了一个诡术师如何改变了邪恶的本性，最终变成了一个善良而纯洁的人。

也许，尽管如此，你最后还是背叛了你的队友，并完全打乱了他们的最终任务（或者仅仅是没有成功地帮助他们），你被那些那些曾经爱着你和相信你的人驱逐出去。你曾经那些最可怕的敌人却在这时就像找到新朋友一样向你伸出援手，你的名字成为了一个黑暗的诅咒，永远地被所有听说过它的人鄙视。

21级：诡运青睐 Sly Fortune's Favor

Benefit: 娴熟的手法使你从困境中逃脱出来。每天3次，以一个自由动作，你可以重骰一次d20掷骰（攻击骰、技能检定、属性检定或豁免检定）。

24级：诡术操控 Trickster's Control

Benefit: 当你在使用遭遇或每日攻击威能时，如果在第一次攻击骰的d20上掷出18或更高，则你不会消耗这个威能。

26级：传奇诡术 Epic Trick

30级：诡术支配 Trickster's Disposition

Benefit: 每天一次，你可以要求DM把一个他刚掷的d20结果改为1。那次掷骰不能重骰。
Deadly Trickster Epic Destiny.requirements: 21级；敏捷21或魅力21；在杂技，唬骗，隐秘或贼活上受训

Reborn Champion Epic Destiny.name: 重生英雄 Reborn Champion
Reborn Champion Epic Destiny.description:
多鲁尔(Dolurrh)无法容纳你的灵魂，而你在这个世界需要的时候回到了这个世界。

Prerequisite:

Some say that the souls of the greatest heroes are tied to the Prophecy, and that they cannot truly rest until their destiny is fulfilled. You are the vessel for such a spirit—a champion of the past reborn in an age that needs you. It's possible that you are truly the hero returned and that your body was somehow reconstituted or preserved. Dolurrh's Dawn is one example of how this could happen, but you could just as easily be a hero spirited away to Thelanis or bound in mysticslumber by Sora Teraza, whose true memory has only just returned. Alternatively, you could be a modern vessel for an ancient spirit. The Valenar elves have long claimed that a great hero could become an avatar for an even greater champion of the past; whether you are an elf channeling one of the warriors of Xen'drik or a paladin drawing on the soul of Tira Miron, you are living proof of this theory.

As a reborn champion, your greatest strength is the skill that you possess. You might not have the raw might of a Demigod or the impossible luck of a Deadly Trickster, but your skills and heroism are the stuff of legend. You're not just a cutpurse, you're the greatest pickpocket history has ever known, and Thievery comes as easily to you as breathing. You might not possess the sheer spellpower of the Archmage, but you might know more about Arcana than anyone alive.

Every reborn champion has a different destiny—a quest tied to your past. This is something you need to determine with the DM, but be sure to clearly tie it to known legends. For example, if you are the reborn champion of Tira Miron (founder of the modern church of the Silver Flame), you might need to defeat a great uprising of the demon Overlords. If you are the reborn champion of Galifar I, it might be your task to reunite the Five Nations under the banner of Galifar; if you are the reborn champion of Karrn the Conqueror, you might also want to unite the nations, but under the banner of Karrnath. A Valenar champion might seek vengeance against the dragons who destroyed all the nations of Xen'drik. A kalashtar reborn champion might be the key to transforming Dal Quor from a realm of nightmares to a place of light. Sometimes, you might not even know why you've returned. You're the greatest pickpocket in the history of Galifar, and your skills are the stuff of legends, but you never planned on saving the world. But the Prophecy has a plan for you—and it will take your nimble fingers to pluck the Ring of Deepest Shadows from the fingers of Erandis d'Vol when she seeks to claim the Throne of Endless Night. All that is certain is that this is a task that only you can accomplish—one so important that your spirit could not be allowed to pass on until it was done.

Depending on whether you are truly the hero reborn or a spirit possessing a new body, the other people of the age might recognize your true nature. Being known as a reborn champion can be a blessing and a curse. Some people are quick to offer their allegiance, either out of respect for your ancient deeds or because they hope to be part of your new legend. But others might not be so helpful. Queen Aurala won't be happy to hear about the return of Kaius the Conqueror, and Cardinal Krozen might see a reborn Tira Miron as a threat to his own ambitions. Some might call you a fraud. Beyond this, the many stories about you ensure that your enemies know about your skills and talents; a successful DC 20 History check can provide a character with a clear rundown of your abilities.

永久不朽 Once and Future Immortality

Your return is proof that death cannot hold you. It's possible that you've returned many times in the past; you might be looking forward to true death when you've completed your destiny. Or perhaps the prophecy has further need of you. If this is the case, odds are good that you vanish into the shadows of time and the planes. No one knows exactly where you've gone— but you'll return again when you are least expected and needed the most.

21级：故事与歌的事迹 Deeds of Song and Story

Benefit: 你的天赋激发了传说。每天三次，以一个自由动作，你能放弃在技能检定中掷骰，而是将那次检定视作你掷出了20，你必须在技能检定前使用此能力

24级：传奇不朽 Legends Never Die

Benefit: 当做一个死亡豁免时，使用下列效果。

低于8：你离死亡更进一步。如果你在休息前获得四次此结果，你死亡。

8-17：无变化

18或更高：花费一个回复力。若你如此做，你被视为拥有0点生命值，然后你的回复力像通常那样恢复生命值。你不再濒死，你意识清醒，但依然倒地。若你掷出18或更高但没有回复力剩余，则你的状态无变化

26级：传奇架势 Stance of Legend

30级：传奇行动 Legendary Action

Benefit: 在遭遇中你首次在你的回合造成重击时，你能以一个自由动作执行一个额外的标准动作。

Punisher of the Gods Epic Destiny.name: 诸神惩戒者 Punisher of the Gods
Punisher of the Gods Epic Destiny.description:
你是终结的容器，是末日的使者，是命运的清除者。

Prerequisite:

毁灭在你周围旋转，死亡在你脚下徘徊。你是结局的预言家，末日的使者，束缚的破坏者，毁灭者，杀手，神明的死亡之手，以及最终的杀戮者。鲜血充斥着你的脚步，无数尖叫的灵魂在你身后怒吼。摆在你面前的这项任务几乎是一种难以忍受的负担；你的职责是寻找并摧毁那些反对诸神和他们意志的人。

成为诸神的惩罚者从来不是你的选择；是诸神自己选择了你来完成这项任务，指定你为他们的敌人和他们的死亡交易者的敌人。你没有向任何一个神宣誓，而是为他们所有神服务，无论善恶，以及那些中立的神。你被选中是因为你有一颗不可动摇的决心和动力，帮助你看到更多的胜利而不是失败，基于你的成就，你现在有机会不朽。

不朽 Immortality

你吸引的不只是一个神的注意，而是所有的神。也许他们害怕你，或者试图控制你。也许他们希望将你的破坏性能量用于其他目的，但无论他们的动机如何，如果你接受他们给你的重任，你的不朽是有保证的。

复仇之手 Hand of Vengeance: 你不是那种宽容的类型；你不会让僭越者不受惩罚。当有人冒犯你时，你会怀恨在心，直到你把他们给的东西给他们，七倍。在你的工作中，这经常意味着你的双手因无情地屠杀那些反对你的人而沾满鲜血。杀戮丝毫不影响你，因为这是你的工作和你的身份。

在杀戮事业上的长期成功赢得了宇宙的推动者和摇摆者的一些赞许，也可能与一个神祗、一个荒神、一个至高妖精或其他有偏见的力量发生了一些讨厌的遭遇。当你引起众神的注意时，你已经积累了很多敌人，以至于你很难在不面对另一场战斗的情况下去任何地方。

在你所有的冒险中，你有一种感觉，你一直在为一个更大的目的工作，并完成一个或多个更高的权力所制定的宏伟设计。起初看起来像是在报复，但后来变成了更多的东西——几乎是神圣的东西。当你消灭了最后一个恶棍，一个早就该死的可怕的小人时，这种启示就变得很具体了，因为众神派他们的人去祝贺你的成就。由于你的成功，他们把惩戒者的衣钵留给了你，命名你为他们的复仇之手和神圣正义的分配者。你的任务是寻找并消灭那些威胁到诸神和他们的创造物的人，无论是原始人、恶魔王子，甚至是其他神。作为服务的交换，你在诸神中赢得了一席之地，可以在宇宙中自由活动，并作为受宠的仆人参加你主人的神圣法庭，也许最终会成为一个有价值的同僚。

21级：不朽诅咒 Immortal Curse

24级：吞噬命运 Devourer of Fate

Benefit: 你在对抗由你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.JEpLomfv6UHx7sR9]{不朽诅咒 Immortal Curse}目标施加的可豁免终止的效果的豁免检定上获得+5加值。另外，当你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.JEpLomfv6UHx7sR9]{不朽诅咒 Immortal Curse}目标做出一次将要让你的生命值降至0或更低的攻击，做一次豁免检定，若成功，则你将那次攻击的伤害降至0，并能花费一个回复力。

26级：击退军团 Repel Legions

30级：毁灭使者 Bringer of Dooms

Benefit: 当你命中你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.JEpLomfv6UHx7sR9]{不朽诅咒 Immortal Curse}目标时，你造成最大伤害。

Disincarnate Epic Destiny.name: 转世 Disincarnate
Disincarnate Epic Destiny.description:
你死亡和重生的时间到了，但你是作为一个天族还是作为一个罗刹重生，尚未确定。

Prerequisite:

Death holds few mysteries for the devas, who know—for a fact—that a new life waits for them beyond death.
